name: Team AOC
subject: Unsustainable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria warned about the connection between petrostates, authoritarian regimes, and the rise of fascism.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220309-2851-header&t=1&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)
The House of Representatives is expected to vote to ban Russian oil imports amidst Putin's invasion of Ukraine.
In October 2019 at the C40 Conference in Copenhagen, Alexandria warned about the connection between petrostates, authoritarian regimes, and the rise of fascism.1
Organizing our society as we have – centered on prioritizing personal gain and fossil fuel profit over any and all human or planetary considerations – has consequences.
Climate change is a consequence. Russia’s invasion is a consequence.
It is unsustainable to continue to believe that our system of runaway, unaccountable, lawbreaking pursuit of profit – whose inequality is so socially destabilizing that it is giving rise to authoritarians who burn our forests and challenge the democracies that listen to basic science – has nothing to do with these duel crises.
**They’re inextricably linked and it's time that we use this moment to not just replace one source of fossil fuels with another, but to invest in a new path forward.**
**It’s past time to phase out all fossil fuels, which is why Alexandria has pushed since day one for a Green New Deal that invests in renewable energy while creating millions of good-paying, union jobs.**[If you’re able to support our movement to keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for a Green New Deal, please chip in $3 now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220309?refcode=em20220309-2851-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2851_2526796_mBENpX&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220309?refcode=em20220309-2851-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2851_2526796_mBENpX&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)**
In the words of Ukrainian climatologist Svitlana Krakovska, _“Human-induced climate change and the war on Ukraine have the same roots: fossil fuels, and our dependence on them."_
Thank you for reading and taking action.
Team AOC
1 - [Team AOC Twitter](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10439?t=22&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220309?refcode=em20220309-2851-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=23&refcode2=2851_2526796_mBENpX&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220309-2851-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=24&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2851%2E2526796%2EmBENpX)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Wisconsin Senate Alert
subject: Politico: "Ron Johnson could give Republicans the Senate majority"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
"Ron Johnson could give Republicans the Senate majority this fall." | **RonJohn, the GOP thorn who might grow McConnell a majority** "Ron Johnson could give Republicans the Senate majority this fall." **Republicans have more than $200 million to help Ron Johnson win re-election — virtually guaranteeing a GOP Senate majority. Rush a donation to make sure we have the resources to stop them:** | [Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-march22?refcode=em22_220309_politi_fnd_gq_act___wsa_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220309_politi_fnd_gq_act___wsa_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

_Politico_ just reported what we've known all along: **Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control.** Democrats must defeat Ron Johnson to protect and expand the Senate majority, but it’s going to be difficult.

Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone else in the race. Combined with Donald Trump and national Republicans, they have more than enough money in the bank to pour into toss-up races like Wisconsin and buy back the Senate.

Here’s the good news: The most recent head-to-head poll out of Wisconsin shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can beat Ron Johnson, and _The Washington Post_ even reported that she “could be the best chance to rid the Senate” of this guy.

We have what it takes to win this seat. The GOP might outspend us, but they sure as heck won’t outwork us. That’s why we’re counting on folks like you to help us build a campaign strong enough to combat the attacks and grow our lead in the polls.

**[Will you support Sarah's campaign with a grassroots donation today? Anything you can give will bring us one step closer to unseating Ron Johnson and stopping Mitch McConnell. clean_body: "Ron Johnson could give Republicans the Senate majority this fall." | RonJohn, the GOP thorn who might grow McConnell a majority "Ron Johnson could give Republicans the Senate majority this fall." Republicans have more than $200 million to help Ron Johnson win re-election — virtually guaranteeing a GOP Senate majority. Rush a donation to make sure we have the resources to stop them: | Politico just reported what we've known all along: Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. Democrats must defeat Ron Johnson to protect and expand the Senate majority, but it’s going to be difficult. Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone else in the race. Combined with Donald Trump and national Republicans, they have more than enough money in the bank to pour into toss-up races like Wisconsin and buy back the Senate. Here’s the good news: The most recent head-to-head poll out of Wisconsin shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can beat Ron Johnson, and The Washington Post even reported that she “could be the best chance to rid the Senate” of this guy. We have what it takes to win this seat. The GOP might outspend us, but they sure as heck won’t outwork us. That’s why we’re counting on folks like you to help us build a campaign strong enough to combat the attacks and grow our lead in the polls. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Our campaign isn’t taking any money from corporate PACs. We’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to fight back and send Sarah to the U.S. Senate. Thanks so much. — Team Sarah Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 576 Madison, WI 53701 United States

LCV Action Fund is one of the nation’s leading environmental organizations dedicated to electing pro-environment candidates to office, and they know Gabe is the best candidate in this race. Take a look at what they had to say:
_“Gabe Vasquez is a true climate justice champion whose passion for conservation and racial equity permeates every aspect of his work and we are thrilled to support his campaign for Congress. From his career organizing to solve problems for New Mexico business, communities and families to serving on the Las Cruces City Council – we know he will listen to and prioritize the needs of communities and fight for clean energy, justice, jobs, and a healthy, equitable future for all.”_
---
Gabe has dedicated his career to protecting the environment. He began working as a field representative for conservation champion Senator Heinrich, where he was instrumental in the designation of the Organ Mountains Desert Peaks National Monument, protecting it from harmful development and safeguarding it for future generations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42784643/334328617/-1974749538?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc4YjZlYy0wOGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSi6I_14KLaNbGVbM730kb0XDmAAWtBlMH8CK7RZfvA=&emci=5cc0a8e6-08a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6578b6ec-08a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565)
_Gabe Near Cooke's Peak in Luna County_
---
In 2016 he served as the Community Outreach Director for the New Mexico Wildlife Federation. He was later elected to the Las Cruces City Council in 2017, where he delivered millions of dollars in investment to create and improve parks, updated his council district’s infrastructure, promoted policies that created thousands of jobs, and helped craft a comprehensive development plan that focused on lifting families out of poverty. In 2017, he also founded Nuestra Tierra Conservation Project, which aims to ensure that marginalized communities have access to the outdoors.
**It’s clear: Gabe is the candidate in this critical toss-up race who will prioritize protecting our environment, conserving our land and wildlife, and taking bold action on climate change.**
[**Give him the support he needs to defeat far-right Republican Yvette Herrell this November and fight for our planet in Congress: pitch in whatever you can afford today through GiveGreen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42784644/334328619/-1974749538?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc4YjZlYy0wOGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SSi6I_14KLaNbGVbM730kb0XDmAAWtBlMH8CK7RZfvA=&emci=5cc0a8e6-08a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6578b6ec-08a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565)
— Team Vasquez

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1467%2E878179%2EMzQzeX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1467%2E878179%2EMzQzeX).**

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: I have your back.

And I can prove it. My position is clear: [**As your governor, I will never allow the government to infringe on your personal liberties.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=870c04ed2b974834b3cfab80eb567961&_e=5Cxhmqc_AsAMlWaJRv8dOtjioSOIzSRwELM51HrRsMT5XrbESXYVD75zd3kzEHu3uczAOZKOFD-fWLsjzmgqz2ch29b5kSudAjEe3BhmajSwalKGO_JIVrdz039tc259f9IP0T2qxzSddg34z5S67znEQjPwoXO98W6BmCkW0r_v6SnS7VFvOZBPnO220gtSdIFDpi4d6sCDtSrkrBBERmr6rbD4IkKNLR9N3A93hQtaZtvuwFaBYLkulKO_b7a_em969AS0Hol7Sat_KnFRZFNgOFLeGh-LQcFvQ_MZUiQY24N2NEfm9M7jdPNFdasNPBIX4VBQMFoWP-psax_C2M5ZGjb2DrqPBLb96bhq_PY%3D) [**Tired of Walz's Reign? >> Chip in!

name: Rand Paul
subject: A Disaster Like We've Never Seen Before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
| Dear Patriot, Biden's economy is about to become a nightmare. And now the American people have to suffer the consequences for his bad decisions. **Did you think prices were bad before? Wait until you see how bad they get over the next few weeks.** Gas prices are going to skyrocket. Food prices are about to go up. Basic life necessities are about to become unaffordable for many people, and it was all so avoidable for Joe Biden. He could have ignored radical Left-wing activists and built the Keystone Pipeline to make America energy independent. He could have continued the common-sense policies of President Trump that prevented war from breaking out in Ukraine during the Trump administration. But he did none of those things. And working-class Americans will be the primary victims of his incompetence. Of course, Biden and his Left-wing donors in the Hamptons don't care. They have more than enough money to weather this economic storm. Rising gas prices are a drop in the bucket to them. It's ordinary people who will have to pay the price. But Biden isn't looking out for you -- he's looking out for the wealthy elites who spent millions to get him elected. Joe Biden may not care about how his policies impact you and me. **But we do still have one tool in our back pocket -- our votes.** And we have an excellent opportunity coming up to use our votes to get America going in the right direction again. A resounding defeat for the Democrats in this year's elections will show that there are consequences to ignoring working Americans and tanking the economy. Right now, I am up against a Democrat machine in my home state that is looking to take me out. They think they have me on the ropes, but I'm ready to prove them wrong. **And with your help, you and I will show them that working Americans are not to be messed with.** [I am asking you to stand with me today and chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to defeat the Democrat machine and take back America from the liberal elites.](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) Unlike most Democrat politicians, like Joe Biden, I have not spent my life climbing the political ladder. I was an eye doctor for years and didn't even think of running for office. Biden may not know how much his policies affect everyday people -- but I sure do. In fact, the only reason that I decided to run for Senate is that I could not sit back and watch my country suffer and decline -- I had to step up and do something about it. And I am asking you to step up and join the fight as well. It won't be easy to turn around the economic mess that Joe Biden has made. But the American economy has gone through hard times before. **And there is no way I can sit back and watch gas prices climb up toward $5 a gallon while working-class people suffer.** Biden is making an absolute mess, but it can be reversed. And the most important thing you and I can do is throw his party, the Democrats, out of power in this year's elections. But in order to do that, I need my message to reach as many voters as possible. And that's where you come in. I don't know what you are able to afford in this midst of this economic downturn. If you are able to contribute $100 or more, that will make an enormous difference. But even if you can only give $25 or $10, your contribution will be greatly appreciated, and I pledge to spend every dollar of it on saving America from this disaster of the Democrats’ making. [You can help me defeat the Democrats and fix Joe Biden's economic mess. Will you make a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
|
---
| **** P.S. Biden's economy is an absolute mess, and it's about to get unimaginably worse. Gas prices, food prices, and the prices of other basic necessities are about to skyrocket to levels never seen in history. How did we let such an incompetent man become President? **I know this economic downturn affects you. It affects me too. But if you and I don't do something about this incompetent administration, it will only get worse.** I am up against the full strength of the Democrat machine in my re-election campaign this year, and it is urgently necessary that I defeat them. That's why I must ask you for your help. [Please, stand with me by making a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 today, and let's get this country turned around.](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/u-FhAMPbuLgkVOF-EiCooA~~/AASl5QA~/RgRkC9ZbP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYidbUSli4IoFf1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Officially on the ballot
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=d9ee48ff39&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Today, David Perdue [officially qualified](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=bad5b95148&e=89fb4d5220) to have his name on the ballot in the Governor's race. Georgians need a fighter who will stand up for them every day of the week, and that's exactly what David will do as Governor.

_"I'm concerned about our state. I want to make sure we don't turn it over to the liberal Democrats," David said. "I believe I'm the only one who can pull our party together and beat Stacey Abrams in the fall."_

David is proud to be the only Trump-endorsed candidate in this race, and he's laid out a bold vision that conservatives can unite behind. As Governor, David will secure our elections, abolish the state income tax, put parents in charge of their kids' education, and make our cities and state safe again.

_**See photos of David qualifying below:**_

To learn more about the race, visit [V](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b59723ab8d&e=89fb4d5220)[otePerdue.com](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=423507c88e&e=89fb4d5220). David is proud to be the only Trump-endorsed candidate in this race, and he's laid out a bold vision that conservatives can unite behind. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Too Little. Too Late?
body:
What should we do about Russia's assault on Ukraine? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Too Little. Too Late?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Russians continue their relentless campaign against Ukraine. Innocents are being slaughtered, particularly from the air. What should we do about it? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Ukraine](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-d/)
The battle for Ukraine is literally life or death. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Wave is Coming](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats have screwed up a lot of things since they took over complete control of the government. None more so than our children's education. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Key to Saving the World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the five principal challenges we face on the international scene, and what to do about them. Let me know what you think. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tybdrdl-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tybdrdl-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. ---
| | Peter,
We’re reaching out to some of our top supporters today because we are 8 months away from election day. That may seem like a long time, but in political terms, it’s actually very short.

And, the dollars we raise now are actually even more important than those we raise closer to election day because they allow us to establish early campaign operations that we can build on over the next few months.

Unfortunately, **Katie Porter already has more than $16 million in the bank to defend her seat** – that’s putting a lot of pressure on us to come through for Scott and the Republican Party.

You see, Porter has raised millions from far-left allies in Massachusetts and Hollywood.

**We are relying on patriots like you to help us catch up!**

We can’t afford to let her win. If she does, she’ll continue praising Joe Biden’s failures and pushing for even more federal spending that will bankrupt us all...

So, Scott would be forever grateful to have your support in this campaign. Please, will you consider even just a small donation today?

name: Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Stop the Left's Socialist Agenda
body:
Today, I’m writing to call on you to defend America’s heritage. America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultur
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7i5uh3bk23mg23k2u48vuqgukmvpvbai1f67p1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0ob46sob4dtiedpn3chi6opbfcj0cuor8tpmmlrm7c756lij1c9le6qrcppie1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1ddks1r60phkcapm0ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jhu2uqosk21s3qlf18inn1rael05i8i0comec8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m writing to call on you to **[defend America’s heritage.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh09ufeap7perqohmbpseh9s3b2neo968bbq0180_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs)** America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultural revolution of far-left extremists who are pushing their radical agenda in an attempt to break down all we cherish and know to be true. They sow the seeds of fear, disorder, violence, and hatred. They are a threat to democracy. They use the powerful weapon of “cancel culture” to destroy any brave person who stands against them—getting that person fired and excommunicated from society just for disagreeing with them. **And they use your silence as consent and momentum to propel them forward, unopposed.** These radicals aim to rewrite history and destroy what you know to be true about our founding and American history. Why? To reshape it to fit their ideals. **Enough is enough. It’s time to take our country back.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcvjotsv9h16975v6vos8ibs1rv731i7g4mrpj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs)
---
We will find strength in numbers. We must band together to protect each other and our American heritage from “cancel culture”. Together, we are stronger and cannot be defeated by the angry horde. For this reason, [**we've put together this pledge to stop the Left’s socialist agenda and are looking for 100,000 people this year to sign the pledge to defend the country they love.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zil0gptulm1rkir7ho98ms0mitol0f6ckruvmhqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs) Will you stand up for America’s heritage today? We are under attack, and we must band together to mount a strong enough defense to protect the truth about America for another generation. **Will you read the pledge and consider signing it today?** Use this link to sign your Pledge today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/stop-the-lefts-socialist-agenda/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg243korsickkspga7el9t5afefmg81695kh03f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs) Please also forward this email to anyone that you believe will stand alongside you and others within this community pledging itself to defend America today. Thank you. All the best, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zak7h69p3rus8dedsr7rmgldsrfij5gv5j5srb28_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji60o36c1h2bs)
---
The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002
---

subject: New Free Online Course: "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today woul
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm96uadd4r6agahn4cats2e53pm8pvis7noa9n2g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4rr1ddgs9inedhge9j34obkchgbas5hehg7fdtj65ij8t37cir64c32epqebc77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2qr9o3mcdj32d5jcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cdie8pj3chim49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5sp7hvp4av4mdtqt9htmqr5g0n57jdn600he00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z30jq64530p1tpnains6ec72otqbcal8tl8v2pdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4clh2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7fpe8stklki0fji9uvh0175vlperraf4oj11ctg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4clh2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Stop the Left's Socialist Agenda
body:
Today, I’m writing to call on you to defend America’s heritage. America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultur
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj7bm42724uhh79gv8k9tp9v695g5gqdoro2jgbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5mmpqb3d5nmpi3bchhehp78pjheur64tple2qm7c9h64pjdcj4cpjr2cb2mcoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphimipmcdtie5j39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkuf2c3rkejahk4951rv9r01bpq1ll4e5g8vj7f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m writing to call on you to **[defend America’s heritage.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9c8kn7rptlm6f467o0qs12fn3jhsns0v346ialo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs)** America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultural revolution of far-left extremists who are pushing their radical agenda in an attempt to break down all we cherish and know to be true. They sow the seeds of fear, disorder, violence, and hatred. They are a threat to democracy. They use the powerful weapon of “cancel culture” to destroy any brave person who stands against them—getting that person fired and excommunicated from society just for disagreeing with them. **And they use your silence as consent and momentum to propel them forward, unopposed.** These radicals aim to rewrite history and destroy what you know to be true about our founding and American history. Why? To reshape it to fit their ideals. **Enough is enough. It’s time to take our country back.**
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zglka8d7vo641ia7q8b20nourusuqglkmhr42t7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs)
---
We will find strength in numbers. We must band together to protect each other and our American heritage from “cancel culture”. Together, we are stronger and cannot be defeated by the angry horde. For this reason, [**we've put together this pledge to stop the Left’s socialist agenda and are looking for 100,000 people this year to sign the pledge to defend the country they love.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znk1bmrbrq2q48hbv92i0q7578asale7leh1r9ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs) Will you stand up for America’s heritage today? We are under attack, and we must band together to mount a strong enough defense to protect the truth about America for another generation. **Will you read the pledge and consider signing it today?** Use this link to sign your Pledge today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/stop-the-lefts-socialist-agenda/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z300h2lcacu7f1kmomkedi5g3nmcmdb4258ejk1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs) Please also forward this email to anyone that you believe will stand alongside you and others within this community pledging itself to defend America today. Thank you. All the best, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh39s45eev8duluspij93m585fa00iurbaa1lo3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cji6cor4c9h2bs)
---

America deserves total energy independence
Friend -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on Russian oil.**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Now we know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

Mike Pence has joined Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and the other RINO anti-Trumpers.

If we didn't know it for sure...**__we do now__**.

Pence made it very clear in his recent speech by declaring "President Trump is wrong."

**That's why it's more important than ever to elect a solidly conservative, America First majority to Congress in 2022.** [_**Help Me Elect an American First Majority to Congress - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59774865:sQMLw9H2N:m:1:2365227053:18B929517B09F2E7C0A56E2DC546B698:r) **Democrats are already using January 6 as a reason to stop America First conservatives like me from even running for office...**

...we sure don't need RINOs like Mike Pence joining Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats in this effort.

It's time we fight back and fight back to win!

Anything less than that is a waste of our time and resources.

**Mike Pence, Liz Cheney, and the rest of the RINO crowd want to move us away from Trump.**

I still stand with Trump and America First.

And I proudly say it every time I speak, everywhere I go, I will say it again and again, every day, every time, I am ...

...America First.

**I'm an unapologetic America First conservative.** [_**Help Me Elect an American First Majority to Congress - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59774865:sQMLw9H2N:m:1:2365227053:18B929517B09F2E7C0A56E2DC546B698:r) I understand that the number one role of Congress is to support and defend the Constitution...of the United States.

**That's why I am fighting, not just for my reelection but also to bring dozens of new America First conservatives to Congress.**

America First conservatives who will reject Mike Pence, reject Liz Cheney, and reject the RINO sell-out establishment.

Because we can't rely on just a GOP takeover to make changes, we need a GOP takeover by solid conservative, America First patriots ready to fight and take back our nation.

**[I hope you will join me in this all-important fight with a contribution right away of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59774865:sQMLw9H2N:m:1:2365227053:18B929517B09F2E7C0A56E2DC546B698:r).**

clean_body: Dear Peter: Mike Pence has joined Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and the other RINO anti-Trumpers. If we didn't know it for sure...we do now. Pence made it very clear in his recent speech by declaring "President Trump is wrong." That's why it's more important than ever to elect a solidly conservative, America First majority to Congress in 2022. Democrats are already using January 6 as a reason to stop America First conservatives like me from even running for office... ...we sure don't need RINOs like Mike Pence joining Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats in this effort. It's time we fight back and fight back to win! Anything less than that is a waste of our time and resources. Mike Pence, Liz Cheney, and the rest of the RINO crowd want to move us away from Trump. I still stand with Trump and America First. And I proudly say it every time I speak, everywhere I go, I will say it again and again, every day, every time, I am ... ...America First. I'm an unapologetic America First conservative. I understand that the number one role of Congress is to support and defend the Constitution...of the United States. That's why I am fighting, not just for my reelection but also to bring dozens of new America First conservatives to Congress. America First conservatives who will reject Mike Pence, reject Liz Cheney, and reject the RINO sell-out establishment. Because we can't rely on just a GOP takeover to make changes, we need a GOP takeover by solid conservative, America First patriots ready to fight and take back our nation. . I'm running for reelection to fight back and help end the stranglehold the Democrats and RINOs have had on Washington, DC for far too long. But to make it happen, we are in for a real fight. That's why I must have your help right away. . name: Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Stop the Left's Socialist Agenda
body:
America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultural revolution of far-left extremists who are pushing their radical agend
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbhriovsrd4e8s2c25dp1jngaf70bj9oq6boq00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m writing to call on you to **[defend America’s heritage.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhe8q3ccs6jn0snuakh4acsl0ftccmmadf66bm40_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs)** America’s great heritage is under attack from a cultural revolution of far-left extremists who are pushing their radical agenda in an attempt to break down all we cherish and know to be true. They sow the seeds of fear, disorder, violence, and hatred. They are a threat to democracy. They use the powerful weapon of “cancel culture” to destroy any brave person who stands against them—getting that person fired and excommunicated from society just for disagreeing with them. **And they use your silence as consent and momentum to propel them forward, unopposed.** These radicals aim to rewrite history and destroy what you know to be true about our founding and American history. Why? To reshape it to fit their ideals. **Enough is enough. It’s time to take our country back.**
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu0mua4muknvskr9dq5oc128n7188vpk9ibvrga0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs)
---
We will find strength in numbers. We must band together to protect each other and our American heritage from “cancel culture”. Together, we are stronger and cannot be defeated by the angry horde. For this reason, [**we've put together this pledge to stop the Left’s socialist agenda and are looking for 100,000 people this year to sign the pledge to defend the country they love.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvekdr2o1nahuj05r7uuhrotc4a91ebaav9c7jp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs) Will you stand up for America’s heritage today? We are under attack, and we must band together to mount a strong enough defense to protect the truth about America for another generation. **Will you read the pledge and consider signing it today?** Use this link to sign your Pledge today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/stop-the-lefts-socialist-agenda/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7loom5s87h2e3q0vlokuf3mif2cac1hstcc2ec0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs) Please also forward this email to anyone that you believe will stand alongside you and others within this community pledging itself to defend America today. Thank you. All the best, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8qv24rlh7n5090lundq76put829dr2qk742g310_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60o74sph2bs)
---
The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002
---

subject: Campaign Meet and Greet on Monday
body:
Kavanaugh's Esquire Club
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IKvvn3vjkNPUFNMpS0U9q8jFo0Q7E2m1XyTBibxTaFlW-XhH6YrKQ_GWiX0GKAvUXBroYG3SbdyTQ2r20-C6ICbuQcR54h-WqUu6XE95nzNTYO44r92SMnhgGWHZ6SPXVkDl9EYvY4xJ-UX9FWh-wGXBkrV4Sms8&c=br_gmMtbdLEQsGN2k0K-Am2XmiEm079mCg4dEMDktUDePGjIbxOHjQ==&ch=K1QL36zR3_3fU_yURwpexOYSVE0kBPAnz8ltB7Tlp464c5i6zexgIQ==)

|
---
| Campaign Meet and Greet
Our campaign is holding a meet and greet on Monday, March 14, from 5:00-8:00pm at [Kavanaugh's Esquire Club](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IKvvn3vjkNPUFNMpS0U9q8jFo0Q7E2m1XyTBibxTaFlW-XhH6YrKQ51VGkN17I0q_68NF9YcsL9c2E57u2Nif5OHcJu2sCjZG0oRlm2QFk8-XtXY15WWs-D2iSwiMhveLiXliKnkIpcjVMLcUYa8_Q==&c=br_gmMtbdLEQsGN2k0K-Am2XmiEm079mCg4dEMDktUDePGjIbxOHjQ==&ch=K1QL36zR3_3fU_yURwpexOYSVE0kBPAnz8ltB7Tlp464c5i6zexgIQ==), 1025 N Sherman Ave., Madison. Stop by and be a part of making history! Our campaign is growing by leaps and bounds towards the goal of retiring Mark Pocan here in District 2. Hear about ways to make a difference in your own community and have your voice heard by your future representative. I have spent my entire campaign travelling around the district, touring businesses and factories, talking with constituents from multi-generational farmers to college students, and people are all ready for change! Let's retire Pocan together! Join us on Monday!
---
| Charity Barry
---

name: Terry Schilling
subject: Trans radicals are coming for your kids!
body:
Leftist educators are accelerating plans to sexualize and indoctrinate America's kids!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zek5c6c6k5oi5m35jhsrcg0qut86t5vj6uf30a48_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcs3nc6p68t1gm2pb0s3i65gr0o3h64p3ap75egqeeoj1egq76pb3mdg68s9kcurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cclgmdg60tr0cpor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ikjvu637rk5o4189s4i698o35r7dikjn7rvj8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
I know your time is valuable, so I’ll get straight to the point.
Woke progressive educators, including radical trans activists, are continuing to accelerate their efforts to use schools to sexualize and indoctrinate our kids!
Making matters worse, they’re trying to hide their extremist plans from you. These disgusting creeps don’t think that your children belong to you...
**...they believe your kids belong to THEM!** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu76uou6etgm4uj6ds33btct8p3ee0th33i5eo9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
I’m writing to you today because I know you agree that this leftwing madness MUST END immediately.
That’s why [I’m urging you to make your voice heard today by standing with American Principles Project](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7q7nmgbam3odsg93paa409dte4av8nlt6pndqgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs) in the fight to protect our kids!
**[Can I count on you to make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now to support our crucial work ahead of the 2022 midterm elections?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorn6eq88rp9bu9c4904qmfatjtqcdokce8l232o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)**
My name is Terry Schilling, and I’m the President of American Principles Project.
My wife Katie and I are the proud parents of five amazing kids – and I’m excited to share that our sixth is on the way!
Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, is more important to me than my kids, my wife, and my personal relationship with God.
So, when it comes to fighting the Left’s anti-family extremism: **I AM ALL IN!**
I know you are too, so you’ll be excited to hear that as the ONLY pro-family organization in America engaging directly in campaigns and elections...
**...American Principles Project continues to rack up MAJOR victory after MAJOR victory in states across our great nation!**
Just last year in Virginia, with the support of our 300,000-plus members and activists, APP played a key role in helping to: [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2mln1qiaaqeia1qp4o8og7b78mcgd3j5moggr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
* **Defeat** the radical, far-Left COVID tyrants at the ballot box, AND

* **Turn** Virginia RED for the first time in more than a decade!

And as I write, our team is preparing a **2022 National Battle Plan** to massively expand our winning model to critical swing Senate and House races across the country ahead of the November midterm elections.
_But American Principles Project is a nonprofit, so our team WILL NOT succeed without amazing patriots like you generously supporting our work._
**[That’s why I hope I can count on you to stand with me and my team now by making your best donation of $25, $50, $100 or more right away!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziv9eblv4u52m94t3ldoonmmr637rl8u3e7rjjp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)**
The sad truth is...pro-family forces have been missing-in-action in this battle.
The result has been disastrous as woke progressives have grown more and more comfortable attacking the family and our conservative values.
And it’s why radical trans activists and far-Left extremists continue to make it harder for good and decent parents like me and you to raise our kids!
**_Did you know that American parents are losing custody of their children, with growing frequency, for refusing to cave to Leftist demands to mutilate their genitals and allow them to sexually transition to the opposite gender?_**
**This is even happening in conservative states like Texas!**
Call me crazy, but I believe that children can’t consent to sex, which means...
**...kids also CANNOT consent to sex changes!**
It really is that simple.
And if you agree with this commonsense, conservative belief, I urge you to stand with American Principles Project today and [help us fight this leftwing lunacy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7pb1u48dgrgv3uq4p5ctp0iafhkbj5l3en5nmbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs).
**[Can I count on you to support APP’s work to expand our 2022 National Battle Plan project to swing Senate and House races across the country ahead of November’s midterms with a generous donation today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvvtfo4e058q715ls6n4imsrblh2vb8q6mvrjmoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)** | | | | [Donate $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3qgjtt7q2a694vtb8afpmr2isptohi3qfopnv8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zplk1fic8utv44c1ft75rtcmlessheu2g3iqreg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
---
| | | [Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrkq1jacljstrsud7v9jbrgvaia14qa77jr09ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
---
Thank you in advance for supporting American Principles Project!

Fighting to protect our kids,

Terry Schilling
American Principles Project
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjepodc2l3mpuhu4qv2ok6pv8d9cr69j4qntt78_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)

| | | | [Donate Today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqurpnfenm4nl23fc0hq98vqfpceaebnamiv8qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjh60p70slh2bs)
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42796149/334378692/1927938479?refcode=20220310_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=)
Friends — I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, [**and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Seth Moulton's campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42796150/334378694/1927938479?refcode=20220310_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=) Your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money. You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: Re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you. So please: [**Will you split a $15 contribution between my re-election campaign and Seth Moulton's? We can’t win and protect our Senate majority without your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42796151/334378696/1927938479?refcode=20220310_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42796152/334378697/-1534947712?refcode=20220310_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=)
Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42796153/334378698/-1534947712?refcode=20220310_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=)
---
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7eacdb3e-7ca0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/7e331498-7ca0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTMzMTQ5OC03Y2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzqJfBG4xvF68pKglAodFEtV_nDVwsyWTF0z7V5zl-4=&id=100807537). | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Biden is Putin 2.0
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter, We just witnessed a major injustice wrought by a despot who has zero regard for human rights. No, not Putin... President Joe Biden. Just like in Canada, a Freedom Convoy of Truckers descended into Washington to protest the unjust vaccine mandates and mask laws. They planned to exercise their 1st Amendment rights and petition their government with a list of grievances. How does King Joe respond? He threw up a fence around the Capitol and deployed National Guard Troops to prevent these truckers from even coming INTO Washington D.C. **ARE YOU KIDDING ME?** Under King Joe you aren't allowed to even protest your leaders! **[I refuse to let Biden's tyranny go unanswered, which is why I need your help to make sure I stay in Congress and fight back. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me stop Biden the Tyrant.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59795677:6HtRe0ENP:m:1:3103520637:5815AD352448FB49C00009754969472C:r "I refuse to let Biden’s tyranny go unanswered, which is why I
need your help to make sure I stay in Congress and fight back. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me stop Biden the Tyrant.")** You know, Biden and Putin are two peas in a pod. Both are working overtime to end democracy in their country. **Have you seen Sleepy Joe lose it when someone dares question him?** **That 's why I say Biden is Putin 2.0.** He and the Left have been following Putin's lead and heading toward a China-style dictatorship. Just look at what they've already done under the auspices of COVID. Harmful mask mandates for school children, vaccine passports, and vaccine mandates on most businesses And he's not stopping there because Biden and the Democrats will use any excuse to trample on our rights from COVID to the unjust war in Ukraine. You can be assured Biden is studying Trudeau's unconscionable move in Canada to freeze the bank accounts of those who simply disagree with his policies. Just imagine if Biden does the same to these Truckers who came to Washington D.C. or those of us who question the legitimacy of the 2020 Election results. **[That's why I need you to chip in $50, $100 or $250 today and help make stay in Congress to fight back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59795677:6HtRe0ENP:m:1:3103520637:5815AD352448FB49C00009754969472C:r "That’s why I need you to chip in $50, $100 or $250 today and help make stay in Congress to fight back.")** Biden and the Leftists know I'm a threat to their plan to usurp our democracy. That's why they've enacted a plan to defeat me in November by gerrymandering my district and funding both my Democrat opponent, and a RINO to primary me. You've been here for me before, and you know I'm here fighting for you, but I truly need your support of any amount to keep up this fight. I can't count on the GOP Establishment to help me or else they risk upsetting Liz Cheney's supporters. **[If you value liberty and freedom, I need you to dig deep. I'm not facing one, but TWO of the biggest elections in my life. Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or any amount up to the Federal Maximum of $2,900?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59795677:6HtRe0ENP:m:1:3103520637:5815AD352448FB49C00009754969472C:r "If you value liberty and freedom, I need you to
dig deep. I’m not facing one, but TWO of the biggest elections in my life. Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or any amount up to the
Federal Maximum of $2,900?")** The more Biden fails, the more he will try to tamp down dissent through any means necessary. I won't let that happen, but I desperately need your help to make sure I'm still in Congress to stop Biden's tyranny. **[Please donate today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59795677:6HtRe0ENP:m:1:3103520637:5815AD352448FB49C00009754969472C:r "Please donate
today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

That's why they've enacted a plan to defeat me in November by gerrymandering my district and funding both my Democrat opponent, and a RINO to primary me. You've been here for me before, and you know I'm here fighting for you, but I truly need your support of any amount to keep up this fight. I can't count on the GOP Establishment to help me or else they risk upsetting Liz Cheney's supporters. "If you value liberty and freedom, I need you to dig deep. I’m not facing one, but TWO of the biggest elections in my life. Can I count on you to donate $50, $250, $500, or any amount up to the Federal Maximum of $2,900?" The more Biden fails, the more he will try to tamp down dissent through any means necessary. I won't let that happen, but I desperately need your help to make sure I'm still in Congress to stop Biden's tyranny. "Please donate today." Thank you. God Bless America. Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service free of charge. The sponsorship above reflects the opinions & representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion of USA Freedom Fighters.

name: Patrick Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit is back next month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Are you ready for Keystone State’s biggest gathering of progressive thinkers and doers?

Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit will take place virtually from Friday, April 8 - Saturday, April 9, 2022, and you're invited!

Take a look at our Summit webpage [https://www.keystoneprogress.org/summit] and sign up to receive updates! We’re also looking for topics you’d like us to explore on the three themes for this year — American democracy, global health, and climate change — and share some names of participants and speakers you'd like to see at the Summit. Submit your ideas here.

SUBMIT [https://www.keystoneprogress.org/summit-suggestions-submission]

Every year since 2009, progressive champions have gathered at this Summit. We cannot wait to meet with you this year again and work with you to envision the future we want to see. We will plan, organize, and mobilize to make it happen. Our state and country need this kind of dedication and action now more than ever.

We know you’re with us — and that makes all the difference in the world.

Thank you,

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

P.S. If you can, please DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/contribute-to-keystone-progress?refcode=031022] today to support us as we work overtime to preserve democracy and to protect our rights. Every dollar helps.

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org.

Keystone Progress

Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: We're targeting 300+ School Board races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This is my plan to take our schools back from leftists.... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9684%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6dCZCC80veo6sXLb3yQgaA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25180%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2bgZMsd0cwZcIHZWXJVHCQ&sysid=1) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25181%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IIzWToSf1c8AE2kJX2x6oQ&sysid=1)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can’t do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25182%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5otYhmqoSDtD1SUr%2b2%2fD6A&sysid=1)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25183%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eptqnr0G2vCxJyzk2wSQxQ&sysid=1).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25184%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wSwsFN85wUegPEyb8pyxVQ&sysid=1) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25195%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zf8FVGs4NVjIysACvvnz1w&sysid=1) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25196%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SRlZ1OkKv5h0vnNpepPYYA&sysid=1) Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... **....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here’s what each of them said: **>>>> Tucker Carlson: "** Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **>>>> Laura Ingraham:** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **>>>> Donald Trump Jr.:** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _"lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pCQfzmBBh3hG09da0dwMMg&sysid=1) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25180%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2bgZMsd0cwZcIHZWXJVHCQ&sysid=1) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25198%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TRrCqnxKb1fw0RvX%2bhMIOg&sysid=1) [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25199%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3sOLORCnvsWTjqsuAMJ%2bJw&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25190%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wd%2b8f8FSr5IY7eInQRCPhQ&sysid=1) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25191%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=55s88j%2fg26b1laXb7F1LGw&sysid=1)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9684%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6dCZCC80veo6sXLb3yQgaA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9684%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6dCZCC80veo6sXLb3yQgaA&sysid=1)

We need leaders in Washington who will stand up for ALL Americans... not just the ones that comply with the corrupt establishment's radical orders. I have dedicated my life to protecting the constitutional and God-given rights of all Oklahomans. With your support, I will take my fight to the US Senate. Senator Nathan Dahm Candidate for United States Senate Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 | | Nathan Dahm, PO Box 2323, Broken Arrow, Oklahoma 74013

name: Nikki Fried
subject: This is unacceptable, Peter.
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

With gas prices soaring in our state, Ron DeSantis and the GOP-run legislature are once again showing their absolute disregard for the well-being of Floridians.

Sure, they’re throwing their tantrums over inflation and rising costs. But, instead of suspending the gas tax immediately , they decided to suspend it for ONE MONTH IN OCTOBER — right before the 2022 election.

If DeSantis and his GOP allies suspended the gas tax now, gas prices would go down by 27.3 cents, giving Florida families critical relief from rising prices.

But, instead of helping Floridians make ends meet while prices are at their peak, they’re going to wait to lower the price of gas until it serves their political interests.

This is unacceptable, Peter. And today, I’m calling on Ron DeSantis and the Florida GOP to stop milking this situation for political points, do their jobs, and suspend the gas tax NOW. Click here to join me and sign our petition. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/k56ky1yRvkee-NviwMKsgQ2]

Add Your Name [https://secure.ngpvan.com/k56ky1yRvkee-NviwMKsgQ2]

When gas was a dollar cheaper than it is right now, DeSantis pretended to be all for gas tax relief.

But now that Floridians actually need help, he’s decided that he’d rather score cheap political points than take on any responsibility for our well-being.

That’s just the kind of leader DeSantis is — conniving, petty, and ineffective in any way that matters. And, as usual, it’s up to us to wake him and his GOP allies up to the reality of life here in Florida.

If you’re sick of DeSantis and the Florida GOP playing politics instead of helping Florida families, click here to DEMAND they suspend the gas tax and help Floridians make ends meet NOW — not in October. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/k56ky1yRvkee-NviwMKsgQ2]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=310gastax]

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

**NOW:** With all the pieces falling into place for Governor DeSantis’ planned presidential run, the only thing standing in his way is our campaign. And since polling shows our campaign has what it takes to defeat him, you can bet that he’s going to go all-in on taking us down.

| Greetings from Team Gibbons!

The latest public polls continue to prove that WE ARE WINNING!
This week, a [Fox News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CbRzKu2JRcuexHRuY-X71lYfFOnKQ7a2Z7VT0Z_TITez79j0dDKse-1oVP_cLMNeq4kOksEV6GF3Quey4rjTSy7hq8YqkTOC61yyC_49Bo3RAgv1UpP1o0Bq-Ul8y8rdsFeWTrDkatXq6dcX3ZDtK6zxfugrnQ7-oh4xankEms7IgK8w5BhRpzLt1SZlCr6ByQseKRyGcu2HJ7ZLP5gNcOuKroLG4zh7&c=O-lZrGLCxOEO9hL8h_nuqBlY7mqdnGNrLel20VDKcqSFVL5l8ECXcw==&ch=AaKNM5ZMCoKLJFLR-6SLKpH5BTvO90zVmYT9sTYNz-HgFwOC4nV4rQ==) poll has the Gibbons campaign in first place, confirming our internal findings that we are in the lead.

| | |
---
| We officially opened both our Cleveland and Columbus offices this past week and had a great turnout of supporters and volunteers to celebrate. Thanks to all of our great volunteers, our Super Saturday event was very successful.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CbRzKu2JRcuexHRuY-X71lYfFOnKQ7a2Z7VT0Z_TITez79j0dDKse-1oVP_cLMNeI7_TUCufBbnFPXvhRNqo24I0xPd5yenGJvsEkwpygEv4dNZ7wPNo7Wg9IUZUvn55gXGWn5AlU2MxrBHBZzSY3t61vSMnMby7KzqQd9a3G2Swz0p2Ik22rfqeyFL7af4k1G6sWRTMiJw=&c=O-lZrGLCxOEO9hL8h_nuqBlY7mqdnGNrLel20VDKcqSFVL5l8ECXcw==&ch=AaKNM5ZMCoKLJFLR-6SLKpH5BTvO90zVmYT9sTYNz-HgFwOC4nV4rQ==)

| This past week, I traveled all over the state to meet with voters, from Scioto County to Cincinnati, and today I will be visiting Stark County. I am so grateful to have received the endorsement of the Scioto County Republican Party as well!
---
|
---
| I chatted with some great radio show hosts this week including [Bruce Hooley](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CbRzKu2JRcuexHRuY-X71lYfFOnKQ7a2Z7VT0Z_TITez79j0dDKse-1oVP_cLMNevhyY6o-cgbPWXXOLnm3H5FRuHupQBtfspCW-M2gWexFKLc72N9gS2cDxQAcB_nsX0DwGwZO1coN6biqjw3_MMYy0UXDTEyjF-P6jodmIite6-ftVibBnEMVrT4aO1R68kB3uVWhbcWM=&c=O-lZrGLCxOEO9hL8h_nuqBlY7mqdnGNrLel20VDKcqSFVL5l8ECXcw==&ch=AaKNM5ZMCoKLJFLR-6SLKpH5BTvO90zVmYT9sTYNz-HgFwOC4nV4rQ==) and [Mark Blazor](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CbRzKu2JRcuexHRuY-X71lYfFOnKQ7a2Z7VT0Z_TITez79j0dDKse-1oVP_cLMNehe3dpUtbYm6f-_ygKClZBztocpSeqEKzuBXMyrQKQMEo5-WP-aEqTdSu1quKt2r-f7sH4wlupiMkP5fhgW4s4V77NaS6WQHVKMoCPiMBkRoH8_Ae6YON-g==&c=O-lZrGLCxOEO9hL8h_nuqBlY7mqdnGNrLel20VDKcqSFVL5l8ECXcw==&ch=AaKNM5ZMCoKLJFLR-6SLKpH5BTvO90zVmYT9sTYNz-HgFwOC4nV4rQ==), and I also appeared on Newsmax. Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

I wanted to set time aside to connect with the people of New Hampshire. My campaign for Congress is gaining momentum, and I want to make sure that your voices are represented in Washington. Join us at one of these locations to learn more about our America-First movement and our plan to retake the House. [If one of these dates works for you, click here to let me know >>>](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VWF_rt6cYFRsW8qSbQX45bPxxW5n2k0f4GtWlCN824Dz53lLBmV1-WJV7CgH59N30gykLxdkl7W4JWpGw3t6C-7M4ZQPxs8_nJW8rKg1y52w64dW9c9P0t2pC0D5W2Y6zsj6Xq9BsV1DkdS9h00DKW639XPb5Db_R3W6k2Lxw3_ZMqqW3bl7MK5ZMrCjW2_Vf6K3Qh7B2W6L69QZ6RyNjpW7FF3sZ3JPySvW7zfrjR2CbMT8W2S6Rfk795qwwW8Dw-YQ2j4ppnW2ZJWtx1f51lXW14XlSC2-PBsLW25MkQ44kwlLsW66Mns51mwWs5W83Khxr7PZdBFW79hJ0w8dc6wv3gR61) I look forward to seeing you soon.

Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress

clean_body: I wanted to set time aside to connect with the people of New Hampshire. My campaign for Congress is gaining momentum, and I want to make... | Peter, I wanted to invite all of my America-First patriot supporters in New Hampshire to join me for a cup of coffee! I added multiple dates to my calendar in hopes that at least one will work with your busy schedule... I wanted to set time aside to connect with the people of New Hampshire. My campaign for Congress is gaining momentum, and I want to make sure that your voices are represented in Washington. Join us at one of these locations to learn more about our America-First movement and our plan to retake the House. I look forward to seeing you soon. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

body:
---
| | Friend,

I have a major announcement to make, and I wanted you to be among the first to know: **[We just added Greg Landsman to our highly competitive Red to Blue program. That means he is a top-tier candidate running in one of Democrats' top pick-up opportunities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807104/334428254/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)** **_[This is a huge moment for his campaign, friend. That’s why I’m urging you to join me in support of Greg by making a grassroots contribution of $15 to their campaign right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807105/334428255/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)_** I’ve been keeping close tabs on Greg’s campaign, and I’ve been very impressed with what I’ve seen. Now that Greg is running a Red to Blue race, he is at the center of our efforts to protect our House majority. **[National Republicans only need to flip _five seats_ in November to regain control of the House, and Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump are devoting every resource to help their extremist candidates. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807106/334428256/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)** With stakes this high, we can’t afford to take anything for granted. We need grassroots Democrats like you to step up and chip in, friend. **_[So, I’m asking: Can I count on you to chip in $15 right away to help Greg win their race and protect our Democratic House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807107/334428257/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)_** One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairman of the DCCC is getting to know the incredible candidates from around the country. Team, Greg is running a people-powered campaign in OH-01, so he is relying on Democrats like you to chip in what you can. **_[Will you rush a donation of $15 right away to help him flip this seat from red to blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807108/334428258/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)_** | | [**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807109/334428259/1092196856?refcode=20220310_em_fr_b1_spm_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)

Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind.

Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district.

But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807124/334428274/1092196856?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=)** We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help.

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please [_let us know here._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807127/334428276/1693227343?source=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=&emci=7f453cba-8ca0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9d578a6a-8fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=10283101)

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7f453cba-8ca0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/9d578a6a-8fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3OGE2YS04ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JnO0H0VDchHw03K_9FbaiOJC4Qzbhu_qVd8Oqs2SADw=&id=112986698), and we'll make sure to process your request. **_**_ _**_**
