name: MarkKelly.com
subject: NOT GREAT
body:
Derek,
Our mid-march fundraising deadline ends soon and we’re short of where we need to be to hit our goals for the month. The timing is NOT GREAT and Mark needs your help.
Can you PLEASE split a contribution of $25 or more between Mark's campaign and CommonGood today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220310_CGVA_Kelly]
Things are really heating up...
FIRST : A Mitch-McConnell-backed dark money group started spending millions of dollars to defeat Mark Kelly.
THEN : One of our opponents unleashed a $10 million super PAC to beat us.
AND THEN : Trump told his supporters that beating Mark was one of the most important things they can do this year.
This monthly fundraising deadline is serious. The goals are NOT arbitrary. Hitting them is what we need to win. Falling short is not an option. So, please. This is so important:
Can you PLEASE split a contribution of $25 or more between Mark's campaign and CommonGood today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220310_CGVA_Kelly] Every donation means a lot when so many people are chipping in. That's why it's so important to get our message in front of as many people as possible. We've launched ads, done interviews, and even embarked on a bus tour all around Ohio to let conservatives know that I am running to earn their vote.
It's why I've set a goal to raise $30,000 before the end of the month to help me reach more voters.
---
| | | [Help Me Spread Our Conservative Message >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mPYqCxKJGgT3M7aJybSdNjsFiYyaD4hZa1dJUwf6udxTeP80J0WioGsG-LxjPTTgmvy8ioqmiHU_wfjzu2NYxs2nxwm6zhkNJ3uje_nBL-Y7BUccKJy6iFG24MDs4xn_u0KjlexkIiRX40Ekg90Fli-5W2aHO7UR4st-JC1d1wsEpXXyT2kbcA==&c=Hd-OnPJvJCI3cXC0cL-r2dOW7pAJD23EkIE7datiuy5HCFhWQ3AbuA==&ch=PFRDmSBgsbYuIbFwJbmRDmTr7TG7rcDIqb0KKEzOOYD1QYdo6Lgb3g==)

| Ohioans are tired of establishment politicians and their empty promises. That's why I'm running to get things done and enact real change in Washington.
Once I'm in the Senate, I will
* Control our borders and continue to build the wall.
* Protect Life and defund Planned Parenthood.
* Secure our elections by enacting voter ID laws and ending ballot harvesting.
* Get our economy back on track and inflation under control.
* End Big Tech censorship and defend free speech.

I'm a businessman with a backbone, not a politician. I promised to stick to my word and take on Washington elites.
But if we're going to secure victory on May 3rd, I need to get 10 more people from the 43199 area to donate to our campaign.
Patriot, will you donate today and help us win this election?

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: Friend, help fund my summer fellowship program 📚
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're so proud to be training the next generation of El Paso leaders

| |
---
Hey there! Did you see Daniela's email? I’m proud to be bringing back the Frontera Fellowship this year, my paid summer internship to train the next generation of El Paso leaders. Last year 8 outstanding fellows joined my team. This year, we’re looking to hire 10. I believe this opportunity should be accessible to everyone, which is why every Frontera Fellow is paid. **For every $500 we raise, we can afford to hire another Frontera Fellow.** My Frontera Fellows will get hands-on campaign and public service experience while also attending exclusive virtual seminars with some of our nation’s top Democrat leaders. It’s truly a one-of-a-kind experience, and I’m proud to offer it to El Paso students. With your help, I can expand this program and offer these experiences to more local youth. **[If you can, please chip in below to sponsor a Frontera Fellow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807968/334431773/1286048891?refcode=220310_ve_primary_win_l1&refcode2=db48bef0-92a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ4YmVmMC05MmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkY7t7UxC_AlZ515w_5-9gSYVRbZAXdmRBajg2A1WkA=)** From: Daniela with Team Veronica, info@veronicaescobar.com
Date: Thu, Mar 3, 2022
Subject: 2022 Frontera Fellowship applications NOW OPEN!
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>_ **Applications for the 2022 Frontera Fellowship are now open, team!** I joined Team Veronica as a Frontera Fellow last year, and now I work as a Voter Registration Captain on our GOTV team. I can't recommend the Frontera Fellowship experience enough! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807981/334431791/1286048891?refcode=220303_dc_fellowship_img&refcode2=db48bef0-92a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ4YmVmMC05MmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkY7t7UxC_AlZ515w_5-9gSYVRbZAXdmRBajg2A1WkA=) As a Frontera Fellow, I gained first-hand campaign experience and was able to transition to multiple roles within Veronica campaign. We knocked doors, made phone calls, organized community events, registered over 1,000 new voters, and learned all about what it takes to build a grassroots campaign from the bottom up. | **If you know a young person who's interested in progressive politics, please encourage them to apply for the 2022 Frontera Fellowship! Forward them this email, or check out the application right here 👇** [Apply to be a Frontera Fellow →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807982/334431792/-794023787?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ4YmVmMC05MmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkY7t7UxC_AlZ515w_5-9gSYVRbZAXdmRBajg2A1WkA=&emci=944af1ed-8ca0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=db48bef0-92a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14565883)

Because Veronica supports fair wages, she’s adamant about making this fellowship a paid opportunity for students. If you’re interested in helping us expand our program, please consider chipping in a few dollars to help support this year's Frontera Fellowship.
We’re looking to hire 6-10 Frontera Fellows.
**For every $500 contributed, we can afford to hire one more Frontera Fellow.** You'll be directly investing in creating a strong pipeline of organizers and leaders who will shape El Paso's future!
**[Click here to support the Frontera Fellows program »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42807983/334431793/1286048891?refcode=220303_dc_fellowship_l1&refcode2=db48bef0-92a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ4YmVmMC05MmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkY7t7UxC_AlZ515w_5-9gSYVRbZAXdmRBajg2A1WkA=)**

| Veronica Escobar made history as one of the first Texas Latinas elected to serve in Congress. She's an outspoken advocate for El Paso's progressive values in Washington. For every $500 we raise, we can afford to hire another Frontera Fellow. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: We're targeting 300+ School Board races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
This is my plan to take our schools back from leftists...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3n9pe86u3emq2e7ham5d1660c3u4lste6r7n7no_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjmpr78pdlepi78p3jeapj4d31mjimbcdj6opm4t9nm5i3cd5gc8r6cdpjcspneduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mmqe0slgcopb9ddhcuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob3cjj60p75c9h2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbife77vgo7dm55vg7u7tbfgce27ca4aq8mihjp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj60p75c9h2bs) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztkcrpsfom8vbsthbjuj3e7ml7i4si0jvl9r1pd0_)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can’t do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuciijqkkapdkimbps6mm1gi8uu13pnolb2boc78_)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6oreqlgpienrd5bm30qrheimf8euithuclmcb6g_).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znp81mbp1grqh7ehksgt6f2l0h71v5p97qfbo5r0_) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9mee5migqpej105a3dd02o83j22q0gt9t0deo90_) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2c20i88f9k1o2eckjpm4d0tb7u5nlvc1u8mu0so_) Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... **....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here’s what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _"lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znsbsbsruf2j5thkktaglfb33qpmaek7qntdms9g_) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8m904hulv2l2c27ql0ih64j4vgue27q5hq70log_) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi2ihsdlpflt65uia7frd118vnmmsddlimvj7vu0_) [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z51u3tvqa104lohd8vjs5ceh6ajck3lae9m8l5cg_) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zur3jm0q59k20roe2qsavj8nm00unjl9c2qbpo7o_) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo44p3vqm9d2cru75soc9knoja1kbbhsm0dhu398_)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee
---

Dear Self Reliant Thinker,

name: Democratic Senate Alert
subject: You can help guarantee a Democratic majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
To make it happen, we have to win Iowa
| | |
---
**Peter – With the Senate split 50-50, Democrats will be virtually GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control ****if Abby Finkenauer defeats Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa. ****Here's the latest update on this critical race:**
**_FIRST:_** Abby launched her Senate campaign against seven-term incumbent Sen. Grassley with a massive outpouring of grassroots support – receiving donations from all 99 counties in Iowa.
**_THEN:_** Polling showed that Sen. Grassley is facing** RECORD LOW approval ratings** – and Iowa's most prominent pollster pointed to "weakness" in his reelection bid. **Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable.**
**_BUT NOW:_** The GOP establishment is mobilizing to keep Iowa red at all costs. name: Team ODP
subject: We endorsed Tim Ryan for Senate. Here's why:

body:
| We want to talk to you about Tim Ryan's campaign for Senate.

Tim has lived in Ohio his whole life, so he understands the issues hardworking Ohioans are facing because he's seen them firsthand. He's dedicated his career to fighting for Ohio's workers -- opposing unfair trade deals, pushing to raise wages, and fighting to protect Medicare and Social Security.

And he'll continue to work for Ohioans in the Senate.

That's why the Ohio Democratic Party was proud to endorse Tim Ryan's campaign for Senate. But here's the thing, beating the Trump-loving Republican who gets the nomination won't be easy -- Tim is counting on every one of us to help him flip Ohio blue in November.

While Republicans continue to battle it out over who their nominee will be, we're focused on how we can help Tim win and expand the Democratic majority in the Senate.

It's not going to be an easy fight, but the fights that are worth it never are.

We have just under eight months to help Tim flip this seat -- and national Republicans are gearing up to spend big to make sure they keep this seat in their grips. We're working around the clock to help build the infrastructure Tim needs to win, and your support is crucial, especially in the coming months.

[**Show your support for Tim Ryan by splitting a donation between his campaign and the Ohio Democratic Party. Every dollar helps us get closer to a blue Ohio in 2022.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810179/334441643/1312108663?refcode=em22_220310_trtand_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220310_trtand_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWI5MjJjZi05N2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jU7c8TVwVfoRLESyvyaETDTkUmnR89DaQBGNartDBh0=)

Growing up as our mom navigated working and raising a family as a widow, the three of us always protected and looked out for each other. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810390/334442390/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220310sisters_NS_60da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UzZGU4NS05OGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkhGB-_cfx7xHaeBDDFyoyaamHzI7BpYAZt-IaZ6Ip8=)
_With Wes and our mom growing up_[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810391/334442391/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220310sisters_NS_60da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UzZGU4NS05OGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkhGB-_cfx7xHaeBDDFyoyaamHzI7BpYAZt-IaZ6Ip8=)
---
Wes always had a knack for caring about others, so it’s no surprise he’s devoted his life to giving back. Though there were some challenging times during our childhood, Wes has made us so proud by working hard to join the U.S. Army and serve our country in Afghanistan, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, creating a small business, and overseeing one of the country’s largest non-profit organizations dedicated to lifting people out of poverty and helping young people — and now, he’s doing it again by running for governor of Maryland.
We know Wes cares so deeply about the people of Maryland, and will look out for them like they’re his own family. We may be biased, but in our opinion, there’s no one better to lead and bring positive change to this state!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810392/334442392/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220310sisters_NS_60da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UzZGU4NS05OGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkhGB-_cfx7xHaeBDDFyoyaamHzI7BpYAZt-IaZ6Ip8=)
_With Wes and our mom today_
---
Wes has ALWAYS been there for us — and we want to be there for him on his journey to lead the state he loves. We heard fundraising has been slower recently, so we wanted to reach out personally and ask if you’ll support our brother as we get closer to the primary election.
**[Can you pitch in a few dollars (even just $10!) today to help sustain this people-powered movement and make Wes the next Governor of Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810393/334442393/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220310sisters_NS_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2UzZGU4NS05OGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkhGB-_cfx7xHaeBDDFyoyaamHzI7BpYAZt-IaZ6Ip8=)**

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: VOLUNTEER MEETING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor
body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# Volunteer Meeting Reminder
# WE NEED EVERYONE ON THE CALL
### **We Need Your Help!**
Well we have made a huge leap as you know and are now in another dimension as running for Governor on the independent ticket. This has become a mountain that we had not expected, but we are prepared for the challenge of climbing that mountain. We have been told that no one has ever achieved the goal of getting in the race as an independent because of the ballot access barriers put into place by the different parties. In this case the Democratic party.As an independent, I must acquire 83,000 signatures to get on the ballot in November. Texas has made it very difficult to run as a third party candidate, where the independent candidate is the only third party required to petition that many signatures. They are also going so far to contest petitions to keep candidates from being able to run for office. The question is do we allow these barriers to hinder us or do we keep moving and fight to the bitter end? I think we should fight back because Texas voters have the right to their candidate of choice. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We truly believe if we weren't consider a threat that we would not have to fight this battle. Can we depend on you?https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *
### **VOLUNTEER LINK**
[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-j/)
## * Donation *
### **WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT!**
[DONATE TO HELP US WIN!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-t/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-i/) | [ Tweet ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-d/) | [ Share ](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-li-btynhk-iduiyhurdd-h/) | [ Forward ](https://gilbertforgovernor.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-iduiyhurdd-E305D3C8-btynhk-l-k)

body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
I’m reaching out today because I need your help. This campaign isn’t traditional. We’re taking on dark money in politics. We’re taking on tough issues that often get ignored. We’re willing to go there when other politicians aren’t because Nancy and I are in this because of the PEOPLE.
We have an opportunity to unlock another $1.5M in matching funds if we can raise another $250,000 by the end of the month. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
To be blunt, we cannot afford to miss this opportunity. Not accepting checks from corporations and political organizations means we need to fundraise on the ground that much harder. We are counting on you, just like you can count on us, to bring the right kind of leadership to our blessed state.
Will you donate today, and help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,

| | Peter,

Tuesday evening we had hundreds from across the state join us as I announced my running mate, Matt Birk. You can [view the whole livestream here](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=89537e8660&e=33b11688c1).

But I wanted to invite you to another opportunity (there will be many more around the state if you can't make this one either)! Matt Birk and I would love to invite you to a "Give Anything" small dollar fundraiser. Here are the details:
RSVP: [Barbara@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=March%2015th%20RSVP) (or click the flyer below)
_March 15th, 6 PM - 8 PM_
Hamel VFW Post 5903
19020 Hamel Rd
Hamel, MN 55446

With my Running Mate [Matt Birk](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a2f0bb626b&e=33b11688c1)
Any contribution is welcome!

Click the flyer below! We'd love to see you there! Please also [click "going" on our Facebook event,](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=58a66bb543&e=33b11688c1) to show your friends you're "IN"!

name: George Bochetto
subject: Welcome and thanks for signing up!
body:
Thank you for signing up for updates!

It is the strength of supporters like you that will help us to bring Pennsylvania values to Washington.

Please take a moment to learn more about who I am and what I stand for by clicking below.

[**Click here to learn more about my campaign!**](https://www.bochettoforsenate.com/about/)

Thank you for joining me in the fight to fix our state.

For Pennsylvania,

George Bochetto

subject: Did you get my last email?

body:

Peter,

This is **huge.**

Since announcing my run for Ohio Senator, I've already received an **incredible response** from **everyday Ohioans.** I'm **humbled** by how many **regular folks** from **_every_ corner of Ohio** have voiced their support, including YOU.

This response has**deeply strengthened my resolve** to **FIGHT for Ohio against the Elites in Washington.** Never has it been more apparent that Ohio needs someone to represent **common-sense, conservative values** in the Senate - and I am _honored_ to do that.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://click.email.jdvance.com/?qs=de88dca67d4f25c5e783e8d2656e48b6b055198deb9cc092546965546cd1fb7ccc7549bdabe5c591d430fc266b84b5dc283867b7a58bf8fb)**
I didn't come from an easy life. My experiences have prepared me to **take** on those who try to destroy this great country and to **stand strong in the face of political pressure.**

name: Eli Bremer
subject: It’s time to put the common back in sense
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eli For Colorado
body:
How a U Penn swimmer has shown what happens when “woke” starts making policy decisions.
|
---
| [ **DONATE** ](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/MW9DMN1b6PqW6bMSNJ1Gs2_bW3trWRD4Gv5tDMDyKmQ3q905V1-WJV7CgC1rW2998rC1Cn9L0W5Ydb4h2RD7CvW4Q3Wcp60LWN4VnRV9m56ntsJW9jfkkP7w0MscW6McHKv3hfXHjW6wM0RL5PZ9vTW6Vtj0083pht_V7pMHc1FzZh7W1BbC9t2pH6-FN80B74lWRR4JW56bDDF1CyY_QW6PMj3Q4NdnylN66WT42NMMF0W90KcRB4tmFc1W4kNG6x2F3J7TW5N6Fqh6cxT3LW8vCZTH2jP9fwN3jcMxLLsnXyW1JJxsr6GbvDnW5N3Kjr6Dwl3qW5HmwPg55tY_pW2Y1-wS8rtwCpW7ysLJ-4-Qd5v3mC_1)
---
Dear Friend, Political correctness has become wokeness and the two have become way too influential in America. Nowhere is this more evident than at U Penn where a biological male swimmer, now known as Lia Thomas, has been competing against female swimmers. Competing isn’t really the right word ... given the fundamental and biological differences between males and females, commonsense (a seemingly lost form of thought) would tell us that there is no fair competition between males and females at the collegiate level. This woke gone rogue mentality has serious implications.
1. Biological males are in female locker rooms ... this is insane and unsafe. I’d like you to imagine what would have happened if a male were parading around in a female locker room when you were in college .... NOT THIS!
2. It’s not fair ... the NCAA is allowing this to happen. Allowing biological males to steal female records and scholarships.

Due to my over-decade-long work on behalf of women’s safety and fairness in sport, I was recently published by Fox News on the topic. clean_body: How a U Penn swimmer has shown what happens when “woke” starts making policy decisions. | | Dear Friend, Political correctness has become wokeness and the two have become way too influential in America. Nowhere is this more evident than at U Penn where a biological male swimmer, now known as Lia Thomas, has been competing against female swimmers. Competing isn’t really the right word ... given the fundamental and biological differences between males and females, commonsense (a seemingly lost form of thought) would tell us that there is no fair competition between males and females at the collegiate level. This woke gone rogue mentality has serious implications. 1. Biological males are in female locker rooms ... this is insane and unsafe. I’d like you to imagine what would have happened if a male were parading around in a female locker room when you were in college .... NOT THIS! 2. name: Nan Whaley
subject: My message for Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We need to overhaul our government and build a better Ohio – one that works to support you, not against you.

Team,
I came to Ohio because it was the land of opportunity and I’ve stayed ever since. But I’ve watched 30 years of corrupt Republican politicians take away our opportunities by putting their own interests first.
I’m running for governor because I want to bring opportunities back to Ohio. I want your pay to go up, your bills to go down, and your government to work for you, regardless of what you look like or where you live.
**[Will you help us reach our mid-month goals with a donation of $5? Ohio deserves better and I’m fighting to make it possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42817404/334451193/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220310_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTRhYjM2NS05ZWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NTyK01ci93Bx2pxXGBAWxFHKEVpYKFrBqtlLe-xJCQ=)**
In my time as mayor of Dayton, I watched our city come together to rebuild our communities. We fought back against the opioid epidemic, expanded education for children, and welcomed new people and businesses to our city.
I’ve seen firsthand how strong Ohioans can be, but I also know that it’s not fair that you’ve had to fight so hard. We need to overhaul our government and build a better Ohio – one that works to support you, not against you.
**[I believe in a stronger Ohio, and I want you to help me build it. Contribute $5 to help us reach our mid-month goals now and shake up the status quo.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42817405/334451194/1605388601?refcode=nw_em_220310_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTRhYjM2NS05ZWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_NTyK01ci93Bx2pxXGBAWxFHKEVpYKFrBqtlLe-xJCQ=)**
Onward,
Nan

| | Friend, This week the fight to protect the freedom to vote in Georgia is kicking into high gear with the sudden introduction of a new omnibus anti-voting bill (HB 1464). We know why this is happening: In 2020, voters turned out in record numbers to make their voices heard. So in response, Republicans in the House Special Committee on Election Integrity JUST PASSED an extreme bill that will devastate election administration across the state and undermine our democracy. This bill is moving fast, and could go up for a floor vote as early as TOMORROW. This new bill was sprung on committee members with barely any notice, and introduced less than one year after Georgia Republicans passed SB 202—one of the worst anti-voter bills in modern American history. [**Please step up the fight with us and donate TODAY.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42819019/334451623/402066511?refcode=310emailsend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYyNzQ2NC05ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCryXf5yEvJCJE5qUdTbdbJTb9rjZKfBAquQaA84KuY=) This bill is an aggressive attempt to push anti-voter tactics during a crucial election year, and is a clear attempt to intimidate voters and election workers. The legislation also:
* Bans providing food and water donations to counties for voters in long lines
* Strips crucial funding to hamstring already cash-strapped, overworked elections offices
* Makes election administration harder while making it easier to sabotage election officials
* Limits basic, requisite requirements for voting machines in polling places, and
* Could lead to intimidation of voters, counties, and election workers who would be forced to comply or litigate

Even after Brian Kemp and his GOP allies promised not to push any new elections bills this year, Georgia Republicans are now trying to force through a substitute bill that they sprung on legislators mere hours before its first hearing. This shows just how underhanded and dishonest the Republican-controlled state legislature is willing to be in order to suppress the right to vote—at any expense. [_**We need to send Brian Kemp a message: Georgia voters will not be silenced. Anti-voter attempts to meddle in elections must stop. Join us and make a donation immediately to help us fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42819020/334451624/837091609?refcode=310emailsend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYyNzQ2NC05ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCryXf5yEvJCJE5qUdTbdbJTb9rjZKfBAquQaA84KuY=) Help us fight back against this dangerous legislation and the flurry of harmful bills—more than 22 this year alone—that the Georgia legislature is aggressively trying to push through. [_**Georgians deserve better. But we can’t do this work alone. Please donate today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42819021/334451625/837091609?refcode=310emailsend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYyNzQ2NC05ZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCryXf5yEvJCJE5qUdTbdbJTb9rjZKfBAquQaA84KuY=) Yours in the Fight – Team Fair Fight Action |

Jennifer Wexton has spent decades working to fight for communities in Northern Virginia. Now as a Congresswoman, she’s been a powerful voice for bipartisan legislation that addresses the real issues Virginia and the nation are facing. She’s worked to pass legislation that combats the opioid crisis, supports our veterans, and helped Americans make ends meet during the COVID-19 crisis. Now, we need her leadership more than ever. This election will determine how we come back from the pandemic, support our workers, and help families succeed. In the Senate, Sen. Warner has been fighting to pass legislation that expands access to affordable education, lowers health care costs, and creates good-paying jobs across the Commonwealth. But to get this agenda through, Mark needs allies in the House that have the same set of priorities. That’s why every election this November matters. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: NO END IN SIGHT to Biden Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is a national security and humanitarian disaster.
| | | Peter,

Illegal immigration into our country has soared to record highs over the last year, and Joe Biden is taking the American people for fools.

Last week, during his State of the Union address, he pledged to “fix” this mess.

This was an EMPTY PROMISE and nothing more.

**Joe Biden caused this crisis when he threw open the border, and he’s done NOTHING to reverse course on his disastrous executive orders to end President Trump’s “Remain in Mexico” policy, halt deportations, and stop construction of the border wall.**

He’s created a national security and humanitarian disaster with no end in sight!

The chaos at our southern border is inexcusable. We need to ENFORCE our nation’s immigration laws, period.

[**Help elect a new Republican majority in the Senate. Step up to make a secure donation.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cab3c1bac0e23430/e5932e188301ab9cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)

Together, I know we can get the job done this November, hold Joe Biden accountable, and restore the Trump agenda to secure our borders.

\- Coach

**Tim Ryan 37%**

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: I want to be fully transparent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
I wanted to pull back the curtain and show you EXACTLY what is going on behind the scenes. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4mxJxPBNbyT8kL6eLudQCc8gx-C09FAV7i9tcXVtAPQjRezHFSyJuk_anwqwGVUD42iBPEJe6rPSrAQsyUKj-bORXnYzD3OmmsagN8jaSfV_PZMg35PMw4rFiw9u6ioAw8VTz7Mpv6em4sWSEAiAA5Wo4Ah_jCucsxk7OUhWgoLPRAlDyVdLM9fEk66cyburv7dIDvqojoc8c6FImTkREY9j25sT-h2tUzGn6kuWY4fNw/3k8/w-HwCMixSSyoD0YYiCRAog/h0/3DUHpFBwNt7KOw9rYk29de3ppla9zTtXnEQB3GB3g1o) Peter, Jessica Cisneros here.

I want to pull back the curtain and show you EXACTLY what is going on behind the scenes.

After we announced that we were advancing to the runoff against Henry Cuellar, our fundraising SKYROCKETED. I am so grateful for every single donation – because it means we still have the people-power to win this election.

But I want to be fully transparent — our fundraising numbers have plummeted since that initial surge. Hello,
Donald Trump calls Vladimir Putin a “genius.” – “So smart.”
After Russia attacked our elections in 2016, Trump stood next to Putin and told the world that he believed Putin over the American intelligence community.
When Congress approved military aid for Ukraine to fight back against Russia, Donald Trump told President Zelensky in a now-infamous phone call that he just needed “a favor” first.
And what did senior Republicans like Mitch McConnell and my opponent Chuck Grassley do or say in response? _Nothing._
**Now, suddenly, with Putin sending tanks, warplanes, and cruise missiles capable of leveling entire apartment buildings into Ukraine... Chuck Grassley wants to act tough on Russia._I’m sorry, but where were you before?_**
As a three-star admiral with over 36 years of service in the U.S. Navy, I’d be the most senior military person ever-elected to Congress. Meanwhile, my opponent Chuck Grassley is still supporting a twice-impeached president who probably can’t even find Ukraine on a map.
If I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority. And the polls show we can win. Grassley’s approval ratings here in Iowa are now lower than they’ve EVER been.
But Trump has already come to campaign for Grassley in Iowa, and McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to try to stop me. **We need to raise $250,000 before our mid-month deadline if we have a chance of fighting back, and right now, we’re still dangerously short.**
**I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue in ‘22.**
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42822952/334457050/-42398318?refcode=em20220310mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzgyNmI1Zi1hNGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q6OojhcpsL8dGCxfA8NKd-Ah-fOCOJyVPZ2B6R5ZFKk=)

name: Kristin Cooper
subject: We must do better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We need to do everything we possibly can to protect our planet for future generations. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794314/334370388/823540626?refcode=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0YWU3Mi03YWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cG8HHxY6sj8EMYNwH8kpoEXe_43o2G5-Lnz_Ns4bVc=&emci=4c11d7d5-409e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, Late last month, the United Nations released an alarming report on the state of our climate, and I have a few thoughts to share. I hope you’ll take a minute to read to the end, but if you’re short on time, **[I need to ask you to give whatever you can to support Roy’s work combating climate change here in North Carolina. It’s a cause close to both our hearts and a priority of his administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794316/334370390/435245919?refcode=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0YWU3Mi03YWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cG8HHxY6sj8EMYNwH8kpoEXe_43o2G5-Lnz_Ns4bVc=)** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794317/334370391/435245919?refcode=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0YWU3Mi03YWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cG8HHxY6sj8EMYNwH8kpoEXe_43o2G5-Lnz_Ns4bVc=)
---
Peter, if we continue down the path we’re on, we will leave our children a planet that is simply unlivable.
From floods to fires, droughts to hurricanes, extreme weather events are set to get even more extreme. They’ll cause famines and displacement. Air pollution will lead to heart and lung problems exacerbated by warmer weather.
This future is bleak, **and it’s one I refuse to leave to our three daughters or _any_ of North Carolina’s children.**
Every leader of this country — especially every parent — should be speaking with one voice on the matter of climate change: We need to protect our planet for future generations. This is a truly existential threat.
Our governments must act. The time to reverse or end climate change entirely has come and gone, but there _is_ still hope that we can make a difference and prevent the worst outcomes.
The U.N. report tells us that creating a liveable, sustainable world requires both adapting to the consequences of climate change and bringing down carbon emissions NOW.
While I’m proud that Roy strenuously advocates for clean energy and putting resources toward mitigating the harm climate change will cause, I know that we will _always_ need to do more. **It’s work that won’t be easy, and it’ll take all of us joining together in a commitment for change.**
**[So if you’re able, please donate now to help Roy continue fighting for North Carolina’s future.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794318/334370392/435245919?refcode=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0YWU3Mi03YWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cG8HHxY6sj8EMYNwH8kpoEXe_43o2G5-Lnz_Ns4bVc=)**
[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794319/334370394/435245919?refcode=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.2f74ae72-7aa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjc0YWU3Mi03YWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cG8HHxY6sj8EMYNwH8kpoEXe_43o2G5-Lnz_Ns4bVc=)
---
Thanks for all you continue to do,
Kristin Cooper
First Lady of North Carolina

If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Peter, for generations, New York’s elected officials ignored the needs of the voiceless and vulnerable. Corrupt politicians catered to the whims of the powerful and wealthy – even when it harmed New York’s own.

Attorney General Letitia James has spent the last four years undoing this toxic system. She has always put the needs of New Yorkers first, even if it meant standing tall against the most powerful forces in the country.

Since making history and becoming the first Black woman ever to be elected to a statewide office in New York, Attorney General Letitia James has:
* Sued Big Pharma for its astronomical increase in prescription drug prices.
* Taken the fight to those who are fueling the gun violence epidemic and blocking commonsense gun control.
* Fiercely defended the right to vote and the right to safe reproductive health care for all.
* Filed lawsuits against the private investors who are exacerbating the housing crisis, **_and more!_**

We think Letitia has done a fantastic job as New York’s attorney general, but those who have not been able to buy or intimidate her are eager to watch her fail. That’s why, with Attorney General James up for re-election in November, we need to know if she has your support.

We set a goal to hear from at least 5,000 top supporters before midnight tonight, but we’re still [**192 responses short**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42794717/334372301/1318698403?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk375-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU1ODcyMy03YmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcEbbmdqRGQ21kX_E-x2NRMIRpAFC4lu1Jx3Dqcjsec=&emci=f928cd36-669f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3ae58723-7ba0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504). clean_body: Time for American energy independence Fellow American, Governor Larry Hogan and 24 other Republican governors are unified as they call on Joe Biden's administration to invest in America's energy independence because our reliance on foreign oil is weakening our country and empowering Vladimir Putin. These governors sent a letter asking Biden to reverse his energy policies and boost energy production here in our country. An America United understands the financial burdens these policies are having on millions of Americans. It's time to stop relying on dangerous countries like Russia, Iran, & Venezuela for our energy. It's just plain common sense. Thank you, Team An America United Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. |

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Conservative high school student fights back!
body:
It takes courage for a conservative high school student to stand up for her beliefs, but that’s exactly what Lyons Township Hi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd4ojsri4de1logsq8qh44tab65n9n82ng93cm0o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrb9chhm9qb2t9gs5ij0tb761rrccb46pp7ct75egpjeo336kqb1c5imsqe1ojgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj35cljcjjrep3661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm9pj4s3gmcoh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zds06nmfts0ln1884i3n3rr78qi8879uq4ds4t2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) Fellow American, **It takes courage for a conservative high school student to stand up for her beliefs, but**[**that’s exactly what Lyons Township High School senior Leslie M. did when the radical left came after her for trying to start a Turning Point USA chapter at her school****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhrh6nkqm8adj2u4ra7teb4641ou7jb695m1uk6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) Leslie didn’t back down. She mustered the courage to take on bullying students AND her left-wing school board when launching her Turning Point USA chapter. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zof3g8dk1kkgnhkvq8l0e89rbb3c5c8fdm0anm2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) I’m so proud of Leslie for standing up for our conservative principles, and I’m fighting to ensure that more students like Leslie have the resources and reinforcements to fight back against the all-out assault on our America and conservatism by the radical Left. [**Please stand with Leslie and Turning Point USA by making your immediate and generous tax-deductible contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 to Turning Point USA right now.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4p3r3n86kcg6pcbpl93hp7poaek8jdsgb1q8il8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) Leslie’s story is all too common on high school and college campuses across the country. Organized pressure campaigns from leftist students and teachers, anonymous online harassment and bullying, and biased administrators make it incredibly hard for young conservatives to stand up for conservative principles on campus. **But Turning Point USA is making a difference. With a presence at more than 3,000 high school and college campuses nationwide,**[**we’re equipping the next generation of conservatives with the tools, resources, and courage to fight back against the radical Left****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhi1rd1r8cgkma4nprcajdhpsqtp4j6uk7srp638_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) [**Stand With Leslie**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfl9qi430v69opck5f0lhjs0n48c2ro5avffjbpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) The video above is the culmination of 8 months of harassment Leslie and her fellow conservatives endured as they tried to start this Turning Point USA chapter. As Leslie explains in her speech before her local school board, her team attempted to start this TPUSA chapter in January of last year and were immediately met with resistance from students and community members. **In addition to organizing a petition drive that drew hundreds of signatures, leftist opponents sent heinous messages to Leslie and her conservative friends.**[**The same liberals who preach tolerance and acceptance ridiculed and bullied Leslie and the other members of her TPUSA chapter****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5lvkpk5l4414ejsi9nnc22c4cmpaj4ag2sb0kc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) After months of delay, administrators denied Leslie’s petition to recognize the TPUSA club, citing several ridiculous reasons and even lying to Leslie and TPUSA students. Administrators unfairly applied arbitrary rules and restrictions to deter Leslie and her fellow conservatives from chartering their club. The Left uses every trick in the book to target, harass, and discourage conservative students from organizing Turning Point USA chapters on their high school and college campuses. They’re _terrified_ students will hear viewpoints that challenge the dominant left-wing narrative on campus. Turning Point USA’s mission is to educate students about the importance of individual liberty, fiscal responsibility, free markets, and limited government... [**... and our mission is more important than ever, which is why I’m counting on you to invest in thousands of conservative leaders like Leslie by making your tax-deductible contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right away**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq7m0gluksbdnm7nf96qcpb6i2jtlf80i6hnl00o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs)[**.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk4df35jcjjb6tbesb821jv1j3qoa7n3ilh32528_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) TPUSA leaders don’t surrender to the radical Left. Instead, like Leslie, they stand up and fight back. Help us ensure they have the resources to win the ideological battle on campus. Keep up the Fight, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. Leslie M. is just one of thousands of young conservatives who have been threatened, harassed, and bullied by leftist students, teachers, and administrators on high school and college campuses all over the country. [**Turning Point USA equips students like Leslie with the tools and courage they need to fight back—and WIN****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zukdrb4ekl60p5g7rb91m3k1ikbt6esjv0tg66to_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) [**Watch the video of Leslie’s speech to her school board, then stand with her and TPUSA by investing $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 in our efforts today**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zol784sl6784ngprem45grvo7b42kf2f9051m9i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs)**[.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5bd6vtkqol7it1mku2917u0ncr6gtdmblnu6n88_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) **100% of your contribution is tax-deductible. Thank you. [**Stand With Leslie**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrd8mb9v555iacidmbah5clirqnn6se1vji6ilfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjj69o71cph2bs) 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/222ba0b1-de9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/7ac08227-a7a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWMwODIyNy1hN2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ES7O5ujgz1jByvwccLVwrizJjjmhbwuyNJBYXGxYWU=&id=109963173 .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-March2022-FR-march?refcode=E14282-20220301-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-15-Email-March2022-FR-march?refcode=E14282-20220301-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]
Team,

On February 25, 2022, President Joe Biden nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to become the 116th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court.

Judge Brown Jackson is a former public defender, and if confirmed, will be the first public defende r and the first Black woman to serve on the Court. And thanks to her incredible record of service, Judge Brown Jackson has been confirmed by the Senate on a bipartisan basis three times previously.

Join us as we congratulate Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson on her history-making nomination by signing our Team Swalwell card! >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/seQs3UK470ikLxaq9XrdUw2]

SIGN THE CARD [https://secure.ngpvan.com/seQs3UK470ikLxaq9XrdUw2]

Since the creation of the Supreme Court in 1789, America has had 115 justices, and 108 have been white men. Having a diverse Supreme Court is crucial for promoting a justice system that is fair, especially as it rules on topics ranging from abortion to affirmative action.

The nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is an historic moment for our country. In delivering on his campaign promise to appoint a Black woman to the Supreme Court, President Biden has taken steps to disrupt our history of overwhelmingly white and male courts. Now, the Supreme Court is closer than ever before to actually reflecting America.

In 2016, Justice Sotomayor perfectly stated why the Supreme Court will benefit from more diversity, saying, "A different perspective can permit you to more fully understand the arguments that are before you and help you articulate your position in a way that everyone will understand."

We believe Judge Brown Jackson is just the person to bring this perspective to the job. If you agree, join us in congratulating Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson and celebrating this historic nomination! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/seQs3UK470ikLxaq9XrdUw2]

SIGN THE CARD [https://secure.ngpvan.com/seQs3UK470ikLxaq9XrdUw2]

— Team Swalwell

name: Laurel Imer
subject: Waking up to the failed democrat promises…
body:
Conservative Colorado is gaining momentum!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yJb5qwg-cQM6ACd_In6QMYfnIWF6r7V8rLrQUyvwpH3BdxHog-TMuqQv2_KSFd1ZumznHWzom8DOVTG00WmpZBxnMknvDCSbU0uoEMUChTr_bD9B-q-OlkjvXZqIKUYJw1bDnb7Rn_8AVCn1rAorJEiR5PDGhCiiBEM8iJqBKhfGylY8BD1YEv4peA4AtO6oHt12Dqy1fXQ=&c=xVX_WEDlaVyy2vaQcLGLGXrR7QcFTZIrZsPcw4KzOTzSJ1Hqb1QYgQ==&ch=L-W3PZx-OMEFXR3Sw7T-LAJWrsVsVJmgIlLv01dji2LPtqEVhs8dQw==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
Our state continues to be attacked by radical Democrats both at home and in Washington, D.C.
Putting Americans and Colorado first means standing up for your rights: your right to bear arms, your right to energy independence, and your right to lower taxes. And mask mandates? This isn't 2020.
Isn't it interesting that unconstitutional mandates are ending just as midterm campaign season switches into high gear?
Sadly, Biden will not stop expanding government programs until we're completely suffocated. We're fed up!
America First policies will bring our country back to where she belongs. Under President Trump, we enjoyed the most economic growth in our nation's history, and I will help in directing our country back to that trajectory!
[I will stand in the gap and limit the government's reach into your life. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yJb5qwg-cQM6ACd_In6QMYfnIWF6r7V8rLrQUyvwpH3BdxHog-TMuqQv2_KSFd1ZumznHWzom8DOVTG00WmpZBxnMknvDCSbU0uoEMUChTr_bD9B-q-OlkjvXZqIKUYJw1bDnb7Rn_8AVCn1rAorJEiR5PDGhCiiBEM8iJqBKhfGylY8BD1YEv4peA4AtO6oHt12Dqy1fXQ=&c=xVX_WEDlaVyy2vaQcLGLGXrR7QcFTZIrZsPcw4KzOTzSJ1Hqb1QYgQ==&ch=L-W3PZx-OMEFXR3Sw7T-LAJWrsVsVJmgIlLv01dji2LPtqEVhs8dQw==)
More Americans everyday are waking up to the fact that the promises of government come at the cost of personal liberty, compromised values, and increased taxation. When people are left well enough alone, they discover the virtue of exercising God-given rights and liberties in pursuit of the American Dream. Attaining success in life will never be easy, but an easy life is rarely worth living!
As your next Congresswoman, I will reaffirm the platform I embraced during the campaign to achieve the promises I made to Coloradans. Triumphing in Colorado's 7th Congressional District won't be easy, but going after easy victories has no appeal to me. Join me in chasing the pursuit of a sweet Conservative victory for our state and country by supporting me with a donation in any amount today.
---

clean_body: Conservative Colorado is gaining momentum! | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Our state continues to be attacked by radical Democrats both at home and in Washington, D.C. Putting Americans and Colorado first means standing up for your rights: your right to bear arms, your right to energy independence, and your right to lower taxes. And mask mandates? This isn't 2020. Isn't it interesting that unconstitutional mandates are ending just as midterm campaign season switches into high gear? Sadly, Biden will not stop expanding government programs until we're completely suffocated. We're fed up! America First policies will bring our country back to where she belongs. Under President Trump, we enjoyed the most economic growth in our nation's history, and I will help in directing our country back to that trajectory! == More Americans everyday are waking up to the fact that the promises of government come at the cost of personal liberty, compromised values, and increased taxation. When people are left well enough alone, they discover the virtue of exercising God-given rights and liberties in pursuit of the American Dream. Attaining success in life will never be easy, but an easy life is rarely worth living! As your next Congresswoman, I will reaffirm the platform I embraced during the campaign to achieve the promises I made to Coloradans. Triumphing in Colorado's 7th Congressional District won't be easy, but going after easy victories has no appeal to me. Join me in chasing the pursuit of a sweet Conservative victory for our state and country by supporting me with a donation in any amount today. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Yours Truly, | == Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

name: Breaking News
subject: Trump's UNHINGED attack on the Jan. 6 committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need to hear from you before midnight:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-)
_As Trump's attacks on the January 6th committee become even more unhinged,**we need to hear from you:**_

**Do you approve of the January 6th investigation?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-)
---

As the January 6th committee inches closer and closer to Donald Trump, his attacks on the probe are becoming even more unhinged.

He just called the bipartisan investigators _"a committee of... thugs"_ and accused them of _"evil"_ for demanding the TRUTH about his scheme to overturn the 2020 election -- **but we CANNOT be deterred.**

With Trump undermining this investigation every chance he gets, we need to PROVE that the American public wants him held accountable. **We've launched an urgent Live Poll to hear from top Democrats -- but we still have no idea where you stand!**

**Please respond by midnight**
**Do you approve of the January 6th investigation?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-)
---

Thanks,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

[Photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/1270?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-) by Gage Skidmore. [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220310-BreakingNews-CPACJan6-Pros-sl1&akid=3293%2E9716520%2E_9epT-).

Chairman Steve Stepanek

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6738%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=PW14%2fAYKU%2bj5Y0e%2fjMrFyg&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69375%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DWCG9bPzmgFBKcE%2fcpTkCg&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69376%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qSG9nwBBRcoVwYW7pgrv%2fg&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69377%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CLJ02Cj7L%2fNobBp9qkq3tg&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6738%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=PW14%2fAYKU%2bj5Y0e%2fjMrFyg&sysid=1)

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Upcoming signing events, follow us on social media, and events where you can meet Ally!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---

name: Aramis Ayala
subject: It’s Aramis. Can you help get the word out re: my AG launch video?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala Democrat for Attorney General
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Peter,
I’m so excited to announce that I’m running for Attorney General. After watching the rights of women and LGBTQ+ families being stripped this past week, I knew I needed to be here in Florida, on the frontlines to fight back.
Our current AG is all in for the powerful instead of fighting for us. I’m running to make sure the people of Florida have someone who will put everything on the line to protect their rights while making bold advancements for justice reform and public safety.
This fight is bigger than Florida. We’ve seen time and again that when bills are introduced here to attack civil rights and vulnerable communities, those assaults are replicated in other states. Within hours of the “Don’t Say Gay” bill passing in the Florida Senate, Idaho announced a bill banning transgender reassignment surgery. We cannot allow Florida to be used as a policy incubator for spreading hate and suppression.
As Attorney General, I can stand strong against such unconstitutional attacks on our rights and our shared humanity. My record is proof: I won’t back down and I’ll always fight for Florida.
Just as importantly, I’ll keep us moving forward. Floridians agree on so much more than “they” want us to believe. The fact is, most of us just want to feel safe. That’s why I’ll continue the work for bold, progressive justice and public safety reforms. We won’t settle for the version of justice that fixates on punishment and destroys people while doing nothing to improve the safety of our daily lives. I’ll continue to uproot the injustice and inequality embedded in outdated systems. And I’ll keep implementing the kinds of innovative justice reforms that reduce violence, increase transparency, and pave the road to healing and equality.
Your support is essential if we’re to get this vital work done for Florida, and I’ll be frank- with what’s happened in the latest legislative session, the need to launch strongly is urgent. Could you help us get the word out today?
Our campaign launch video just went live this morning, and we need to get as many eyes on it as possible. Will you share, retweet, like and comment?
Twitter: Please like and retweet! https://tinyurl.com/2p8tp87k [https://tinyurl.com/2p8tp87k]
Suggested tweet: We don’t have to settle for hate or injustice. We can keep Florida moving forward by electing Aramis Ayala for Attorney General! #Aramis4AG
Facebook. Please share!: https://tinyurl.com/bdemftbr [https://tinyurl.com/bdemftbr]
Instagram: https://tinyurl.com/5b5jwvhf [https://tinyurl.com/5b5jwvhf]
Suggested post: We need more than promises to protect vulnerable Floridians and keep everyone safe. We need someone who’s already proven she can fight hard and get the job done. That’s Aramis Ayala! Let’s keep Florida moving forward!
Suggested post: Let’s choose courage over fear. Let’s choose justice over hate. LET’S ELECT ARAMIS AYALA FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL for the leadership Florida deserves. We can keep Florida moving forward!
Suggested post: I believe in change, reconciliation, learning and growing. I believe we can rebuild what was broken and come together for justice. Let’s elect a true change maker and lawyer for the people. Aramis Ayala is going to keep Florida moving forward!
Thank you!
Keep Moving Forward,
Aramis

Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. As Florida’s first Black State Attorney, she has devoted more than two decades to public service and building safer, healthier communities. Aramis’s unflinching commitment to justice earned national headlines when she went head-to-head against former governor Rick Scott to oppose the death penalty. She has successfully established innovative pre-trial diversion programs, published a historic Brady list of questionable police, advanced public transparency, and accountability of law enforcement, halted pre-trial deportations, and expanded support for survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. An educator, cancer survivor, and mother of two, Aramis is running for Attorney General of Florida to deliver a bold, forward-focused vision that restores public trust and guarantees an equitable future for all of us.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, I’m so excited to announce that I’m running for Attorney General. After watching the rights of women and LGBTQ+ families being stripped this past week, I knew I needed to be here in Florida, on the frontlines to fight back. Our current AG is all in for the powerful instead of fighting for us. I’m running to make sure the people of Florida have someone who will put everything on the line to protect their rights while making bold advancements for justice reform and public safety. This fight is bigger than Florida. We’ve seen time and again that when bills are introduced here to attack civil rights and vulnerable communities, those assaults are replicated in other states. Within hours of the “Don’t Say Gay” bill passing in the Florida Senate, Idaho announced a bill banning transgender reassignment surgery. We cannot allow Florida to be used as a policy incubator for spreading hate and suppression. As Attorney General, I can stand strong against such unconstitutional attacks on our rights and our shared humanity. My record is proof: I won’t back down and I’ll always fight for Florida. Just as importantly, I’ll keep us moving forward. Floridians agree on so much more than “they” want us to believe. The fact is, most of us just want to feel safe. That’s why I’ll continue the work for bold, progressive justice and public safety reforms. We won’t settle for the version of justice that fixates on punishment and destroys people while doing nothing to improve the safety of our daily lives. I’ll continue to uproot the injustice and inequality embedded in outdated systems. And I’ll keep implementing the kinds of innovative justice reforms that reduce violence, increase transparency, and pave the road to healing and equality. Your support is essential if we’re to get this vital work done for Florida, and I’ll be frank- with what’s happened in the latest legislative session, the need to launch strongly is urgent. Could you help us get the word out today? Our campaign launch video just went live this morning, and we need to get as many eyes on it as possible. Will you share, retweet, like and comment? We need someone who’s already proven she can fight hard and get the job done. That’s Aramis Ayala! Let’s keep Florida moving forward! Suggested post: Let’s choose courage over fear. Let’s choose justice over hate. LET’S ELECT ARAMIS AYALA FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL for the leadership Florida deserves. We can keep Florida moving forward! name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I cannot do it alone
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are at a critical inflection point in the fight to make our communities safer from this violence.
#

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to support my fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
In my recovery, and in this work, I cannot do it alone.
Everything I’ve accomplished is because someone, or many people have helped. I think that’s true when all of us look at some of the most challenging and important work and times in their lives.
We are at a critical inflection point in the fight to make our communities safer from this violence.
For at least 2 more years, we have a president who will sign gun violence prevention legislation into law. But we need leaders in Congress who will get him those bills.
I will do everything in my power to support gun safety candidates this year. But again, I cannot do it alone. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords today? Help us elect a Congress that will get gun violence prevention legislation to the president’s desk.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220310-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1668_3935704_rBY1Nn&akid=1668%2E3935704%2ErBY1Nn)
