name: Charlie Kirk
subject: This high school student stood up for our principles
body:
It takes courage for a conservative high school student to stand up for her beliefs, but that’s exactly what Lyons Township Hi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qv9olv9n32pe0j3624aeh9ft0mokt98udiv0f8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ujgr0p9mmur39d5kcjj68pdhclqj6sb5e6r6ctb7cspbcptnmkr3dd3lccqm2c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2qr9pti69j3ao5jcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cdie2oj1c9j649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2il4bba28o9ugmoom0svvl010dtqk2d6jlfv9jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) Fellow American, **It takes courage for a conservative high school student to stand up for her beliefs, but**[**that’s exactly what Lyons Township High School senior Leslie M. did when the radical left came after her for trying to start a Turning Point USA chapter at her school****.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb5mp1f9ln0ftg81nuq9b0hc0kk7dos26vt4mfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) Leslie didn’t back down. She mustered the courage to take on bullying students AND her left-wing school board when launching her Turning Point USA chapter. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zipsbr5qauf1c9p9qhqdq8qvfbafanvv70hd3tg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) I’m so proud of Leslie for standing up for our conservative principles, and I’m fighting to ensure that more students like Leslie have the resources and reinforcements to fight back against the all-out assault on our America and conservatism by the radical Left. [**Please stand with Leslie and Turning Point USA by making your immediate and generous tax-deductible contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 to Turning Point USA right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ic1sfkb7sjmua4o2b8fdb7anrhk7eu6ot17a4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) Leslie’s story is all too common on high school and college campuses across the country. Organized pressure campaigns from leftist students and teachers, anonymous online harassment and bullying, and biased administrators make it incredibly hard for young conservatives to stand up for conservative principles on campus. **But Turning Point USA is making a difference. With a presence at more than 3,000 high school and college campuses nationwide,**[**we’re equipping the next generation of conservatives with the tools, resources, and courage to fight back against the radical Left****.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z64rdk1pv85blpncmj8cnf5d195vb0ca26vsptd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) [**Stand With Leslie**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo368ie034j1brqo4pi27a5libq0v856ccs6nui0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) The video above is the culmination of 8 months of harassment Leslie and her fellow conservatives endured as they tried to start this Turning Point USA chapter. As Leslie explains in her speech before her local school board, her team attempted to start this TPUSA chapter in January of last year and were immediately met with resistance from students and community members. **In addition to organizing a petition drive that drew hundreds of signatures, leftist opponents sent heinous messages to Leslie and her conservative friends.**[**The same liberals who preach tolerance and acceptance ridiculed and bullied Leslie and the other members of her TPUSA chapter****.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkefu25o6hg93ggre85f7m1ong5erk23t4siimk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) After months of delay, administrators denied Leslie’s petition to recognize the TPUSA club, citing several ridiculous reasons and even lying to Leslie and TPUSA students. Administrators unfairly applied arbitrary rules and restrictions to deter Leslie and her fellow conservatives from chartering their club. The Left uses every trick in the book to target, harass, and discourage conservative students from organizing Turning Point USA chapters on their high school and college campuses. They’re _terrified_ students will hear viewpoints that challenge the dominant left-wing narrative on campus. Turning Point USA’s mission is to educate students about the importance of individual liberty, fiscal responsibility, free markets, and limited government... [**... and our mission is more important than ever, which is why I’m counting on you to invest in thousands of conservative leaders like Leslie by making your tax-deductible contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 right away**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2elpg6vefbakljllvo6o6rou8l67idel3jln5v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs)[**.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3nfodculd6q6bl3o37qt4erbmfj090ru6uq2vco_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) TPUSA leaders don’t surrender to the radical Left. Instead, like Leslie, they stand up and fight back. Help us ensure they have the resources to win the ideological battle on campus. Keep up the Fight, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. Leslie M. is just one of thousands of young conservatives who have been threatened, harassed, and bullied by leftist students, teachers, and administrators on high school and college campuses all over the country. [**Turning Point USA equips students like Leslie with the tools and courage they need to fight back—and WIN****.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zji4mbio9fr1g24ebsiqcdi6cfqaj354vflplafg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) [**Watch the video of Leslie’s speech to her school board, then stand with her and TPUSA by investing $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 in our efforts today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvhmgghcbcbkqgdsmefpg17830on42hna5ecv6i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs)**[.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztdv7c7ef8mmmhn9tru38vj8kuo8kgnvb6upe7tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) **100% of your contribution is tax-deductible. Thank you. [**Stand With Leslie**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbv59qolhagguee4is6dm983ffn73c82obbmboho_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgm4ob2cph2bs) 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: | | | | \- - - - | Peter, It’s now or never! The Cheney Romney Fundraiser is approaching, and we need to show our strength, now! On March 15, the day after the fundraiser, Cheney, Romney, and their allies at CNN and the New York Times will swoon over the fundraising prowess of Liz Cheney among the coastal elite!!! It is fortunate that she has such wealthy friends across the country from Wyoming, because we don’t support her here. We only need 145 more donations to stay on track! When you make a donation today you will join the ranks of President Trump, Rand Paul, Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik and thousands of other true Patriots in supporting Harriet Hageman for Wyoming's lone congressional seat. The fate of a Republican Majority rests in your hands. Do you want 2022 to be led by Democrats and the weak Establishment or by REAL CONSERVATIVE REPUBLICANS? Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Students at risk — petition to reform schools
body:
School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organizati
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z24nima6dpaj3v0jfc45atubt7iodirlph60r5dg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9p5gm8qr1djks8r3ec9h69p7cptielj64orke1q65c72mup73dhncar76oljm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6ccln6mr30slhcoor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm6p71cpj68pb24no)
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdav16tv5u8en5cvvmug1eot5btek34atqqiphog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zol5nijdbtic2p7m5sqisapao9mbavi68lbjsm38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) Fellow American, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I’m proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) — our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards’ decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by the end of this month. Will you help me protect students from left-wing indoctrination — and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents — with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9vof58j5lskaqdv6i023ljqkcj05e9f63c8tj48_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg44tb19l0826b04gv9g42ugdhh0cb798u0mfvs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state — likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students — and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgq0ef9fcrvctdo46d5mcups73eusdcpvoj58i58_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl4ljlalr9pjijddipvc8hd3vbkovmsraq33jeg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones — online, on campus, and over the airwaves — to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z61qobq5ufhogpc1dfdc3p4k4j7hovvcktm9c9i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgd35i8h1kqpeqis8o0719o77r7i7codggeirjso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh2bs) The time to fight back is right **NOW** — before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6urbtu8n0hli1atjvk2p67rpujtdm5sc19on65g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmcpj4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: House GOP Alert
subject: Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, Joe Biden has announced a ban on Russian oil and gas in response to Putin's war on Ukraine.

_**Now, instead of turning to American energy to fill the gap, Biden wants to buy oil from Iran, Venezuela, or Saudi Arabia. **_

Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT! Now, Biden has launched an all-out war on American energy and American jobs.

On Day One of his Administration, Joe Biden **GUTTED** American energy independence by shutting down American energy production. Then he worsened our dependence on oil from hostile countries by **CANCELING** the Keystone XL Pipeline.
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796460:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
To make things worse, Biden greenlit Russian pipelines, allowing foreign energy to thrive while Americans faced higher prices at the pump.

**Joe Biden would rather buy oil and gas from foreign countries who hate us than create American jobs and restore our energy independence --_let that sink in._ **

Americans are sick and tired of Biden putting America LAST. Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline and restore American energy independence.

Biden won't listen unless the American people raise their voices and speak out against his war on American energy. Tell Joe Biden: _**[BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796460:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE
PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!")**_
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796460:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
We have a clear choice: 1) We can either let Joe Biden continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil, or 2) We can send a clear message to Joe Biden: _**[Bring back the Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796460:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "Bring back the
Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.")**_

Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment.

-House Republicans
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796460:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796461:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796461:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "Can we count on
you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59796461:6DD-8RENG:m:1:3299561967:30800864B5E6759ECDB4A6A653560D16:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=2DRuth=20Green?=
subject: Educational choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN
body:
Should parents be in charge of their kids’ education? Let me know what you think. Read more >> | | | | [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=c5aba36d9d&e=683c601116)
---
| | | Peter,

Remember when the National School Boards Association called parents showing up to school board meetings “extremist hate organizations,” and accused them of “domestic terrorism and hate crimes”?

Or when then Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe said, “I don’t think parents should be telling schools what they should teach”?

The radical left has been trying to diminish parents’ rights in the classroom for decades, but it has never been so obvious as it has been in the past year.

I believe every child deserves a quality education, and that parents have the right to determine what form of education is best for their children. I fully support school choice for all kids — not just the privileged or just the children of wealthy elites who send their kids to private school while telling lower and middle income Americans they have to allow their children to be trapped in failing schools.

**Do you agree that we need to give all parents choice in their child’s education? Please take my very brief survey to let me know what you think about school choice.**
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=cac39f8a18&e=683c601116 "TAKE THE SURVEY >>")
---
| [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=6c947b714c&e=683c601116)
---
| I want to hear from you and find out where you stand on school choice. I believe that parents know what is best for their kids, whether it’s public education, secular or religious private schools, or home schooling.

If you support school choice and want to elect a battle-proven leader to fight for educational choice, [**_please make a contribution to my campaign today_**](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=9eb02c8b3d&e=683c601116).

Thanks for your input and help,
Jennifer-Ruth Green

clean_body: Should parents be in charge of their kids’ education? Let me know what you think. Read more >> | | | | | | | Peter, Remember when the National School Boards Association called parents showing up to school board meetings “extremist hate organizations,” and accused them of “domestic terrorism and hate crimes”? Or when then Virginia Governor Terry McAuliffe said, “I don’t think parents should be telling schools what they should teach”? The radical left has been trying to diminish parents’ rights in the classroom for decades, but it has never been so obvious as it has been in the past year. I believe every child deserves a quality education, and that parents have the right to determine what form of education is best for their children. I fully support school choice for all kids — not just the privileged or just the children of wealthy elites who send their kids to private school while telling lower and middle income Americans they have to allow their children to be trapped in failing schools. Do you agree that we need to give all parents choice in their child’s education? Please take my very brief survey to let me know what you think about school choice. | "TAKE THE SURVEY >>" | | I want to hear from you and find out where you stand on school choice. I believe that parents know what is best for their kids, whether it’s public education, secular or religious private schools, or home schooling. If you support school choice and want to elect a battle-proven leader to fight for educational choice, . Thanks for your input and help, Jennifer-Ruth Green | | PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN id:2022-03-07-21:06:16:469t | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green, All rights reserved. subject: The GOP revealed its plan for the 2022 elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
It's not looking good, Peter.

| |
---
Hey Peter – In case you didn't watch, Gov. Kim Reynolds of Iowa delivered the Republican response to President Biden's State of the Union last week. And it was just as right-wing and partisan as you can imagine. President Biden used his State of the Union address to offer a slate of bipartisan policy ideas to solve issues like the opioid crisis, the mental health epidemic, and supporting veterans under his "Unity Agenda." But Gov. Reynolds and the Republicans used their air time to rip into President Biden's agenda instead of offering any solutions themselves. They are the ones standing in the way of progress like build a stronger economy and investing in our future, blocking important legislation like the child tax credit and climate action. **And in typical Republican fashion, she spoke without regard for the facts** – claiming that Americans are "tired of the theater" that Democrats supposedly push, even though Republicans have held up progress on critical issues while staying loyal to Trump's political theater for years. With Republicans gearing up for the 2022 midterm elections and trying to take over Congress, **Gov. Reynolds showed us what they're planning to run on. Discrimination. Political games. Disinformation. Hypocrisy.** We need to show Americans, especially rural Americans like those in Gov. Reynolds' home state of Iowa, that there is an alternative to voting Republican – and that Democratic policies work for rural communities. **[Will you chip in $5 or more to fight against Gov. body:
We hope you can make it tonight at 6:30pm EST!
#

Hello Somebody!
Thank you for your continued support on this campaign. With less than 8 weeks left until Election Day, **we need all hands on deck** to win this race and get Senator Turner’s voice in Congress. How we are going to win is by talking to every voter in the district which will require a massive grassroots movement.
Can you join us TONIGHT, Thursday March 10, 2022, from 6:30pm EST/3:30pm PST on Zoom for a virtual barnstorm to learn about our strategy to win and how you can get involved?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: Help me qualify for the televised debate!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2a6d2997171d/were-off-and-running-6764038?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
## **$5 helps me qualify for the televised debate!**

For the past several months, the Oregon Republican Party (ORP) has been in the process of "partnering" with Oregon media to host at least two televised statewide gubernatorial debates. At first, the threshold to qualify was $100,000 raised. I did that. Then the threshold shifted to 1,000 donations and $100,000. I also did that. That threshold then became very nebulous. Donors who made monthly donations, or made more than one donation along the way, may be removed from that 1,000 count. In-kind donors, who donated valuable goods or services rather than direct cash to the campaign, may be removed. I truly don't know yet. If that's the case, most candidates will fail to qualify for the debates - including me! As you've probably heard, there were some major changes within ORP this week. While the remaining ORP team works to quickly jump in and solidify what that media threshold really is for qualifying, I have to assume I'm just a few dozen donors short of qualifying, so that I have time to finishing qualifying even under the strictest circumstances. This televised opportunity is too important to risk.

_We need new donors!_ If you have donated before, _please ask a friend or family member - ask your spouse - to donate in their name._ There is no minimum or maximum. Out-of-state donations are fine. Just a $5 donation would do it.

**_Thank you!_
Kerry**

clean_body: | | | | | | | $5 helps me qualify for the televised debate! For the past several months, the Oregon Republican Party (ORP) has been in the process of "partnering" with Oregon media to host at least two televised statewide gubernatorial debates. At first, the threshold to qualify was $100,000 raised. I did that. Then the threshold shifted to 1,000 donations and $100,000. I also did that. That threshold then became very nebulous. Donors who made monthly donations, or made more than one donation along the way, may be removed from that 1,000 count. In-kind donors, who donated valuable goods or services rather than direct cash to the campaign, may be removed. I truly don't know yet. If that's the case, most candidates will fail to qualify for the debates - including me! As you've probably heard, there were some major changes within ORP this week. While the remaining ORP team works to quickly jump in and solidify what that media threshold really is for qualifying, I have to assume I'm just a few dozen donors short of qualifying, so that I have time to finishing qualifying even under the strictest circumstances. This televised opportunity is too important to risk. We need new donors! If you have donated before, please ask a friend or family member - ask your spouse - to donate in their name. There is no minimum or maximum. Out-of-state donations are fine. Just a $5 donation would do it. Thank you! Kerry | | "DONATE TODAY!" | Your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more will help me achieve critical goals like attending events in all 36 Oregon counties and buying TV advertising! And yes, each new donation helps me qualify for the televised forum. LEARN MORE AT | | WE STILL HAVE TWO FUNDRAISERS GOING! Buy your tickets online here for the beef raffle of Jake the Crazy Steer or the fundraiser event, An Evening with Kelli Ward: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Kerry McQuisten for Oregon, All rights reserved.

name: Ann Roe
subject: The women who inspire me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804445/334414399/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=&emci=95b261f5-f29f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b67efe51-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)

Hi friend,

This women's history month, I would like to raise up some powerful women in our State government today. These are the women who inspired me to run, and having the chance to work alongside them would be an _absolute privilege_. I hope to honor each of them when I'm in Congress.

**[Before I talk about these inspirational womens' work, I'm going to ask: Can you chip in $5 to help me get to Washington to keep up their fights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804453/334414403/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804458/334414414/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804460/334414416/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)
---
**Jill Underly, Superintendent of Public Instruction of Wisconsin**
Dr. Jill Underly is a life-long public school advocate, administrator, and teacher who is committed to ensuring that every child, every day, has the opportunity for a first-class public education in the State of Wisconsin. Her leadership and advocacy are making schools and the education system better for all children in Wisconsin.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804463/334414419/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)
---
**Jill Karofsky, Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice**
Justice Jill Karofsky was sworn into the Wisconsin Supreme Court in 2020, and her commitment to upholding the law and justice in our state is truly inspiring. Since her appointment, she has been a fierce and tireless protector of the rights of the citizens of the state of Wisconsin and of the rule of law. Her leadership is just what we need, as Justice Karofsky is ushering a new vision of what law and justice could be in our state.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804466/334414422/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)
---
**Greta Neubauer, Wisconsin State Assemblymember**
Greta has been a dedicated advocate for progressive causes for more than a decade. Some of her accolades include leading a statewide push to **increase access to affordable healthcare, supporting progress to reduce racial disparities in our health system, and fighting to increase education funding and bills that would create more jobs for Wisconsin's families.** She is a leading voice in our state and an advocate for policies and legislation that will move Wisconsin forward.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804469/334414425/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)
---
**Tammy Baldwin, U.S. Senator**
Senator Tammy Baldwin has dedicated her life's work to public service because she has a deep commitment to making a difference in the lives of Wisconsin’s working families. In the proud tradition of Wisconsin's state motto, _Forward_ , she believes that we must always work together to help provide fairness, equality, and economic opportunity for all.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804471/334414429/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)
---
**Gwen Moore, U.S. Representative**
Representative Moore is a trailblazer for the State of Wisconsin. In 2005, she became the **first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives.** Congresswoman Moore led the fight against racial profiling, domestic abuse, and voting rights violations. A tireless advocate for the working families of Wisconsin, the work she's done has particularly impacted low-income communities. Wisconsin is a better place because of her!

**These women are putting in the work for all of us here in Wisconsin, and I cannot wait to work alongside them as we all take steps toward a better future for the next generation of female leaders.**

**[Support our movement by donating $5 or whatever you can to my campaign today so that I can continue to push Wisconsin, and America, forward>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42804473/334414431/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220310_influentialwomen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjdlZmU1MS04OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sYxcoMIXqkJK2ADj2RksNWPdPJoUaMW-36qOsjNPVe0=)**

Thank you,

– Ann Roe

clean_body: | Hi friend, This women's history month, I would like to raise up some powerful women in our State government today. These are the women who inspired me to run, and having the chance to work alongside them would be an absolute privilege. I hope to honor each of them when I'm in Congress. = = | | = Jill Underly, Superintendent of Public Instruction of Wisconsin Dr. Jill Underly is a life-long public school advocate, administrator, and teacher who is committed to ensuring that every child, every day, has the opportunity for a first-class public education in the State of Wisconsin. Her leadership and advocacy are making schools and the education system better for all children in Wisconsin. | = Jill Karofsky, Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice Justice Jill Karofsky was sworn into the Wisconsin Supreme Court in 2020, and her commitment to upholding the law and justice in our state is truly inspiring. Since her appointment, she has been a fierce and tireless protector of the rights of the citizens of the state of Wisconsin and of the rule of law. Her leadership is just what we need, as Justice Karofsky is ushering a new vision of what law and justice could be in our state. | = Greta Neubauer, Wisconsin State Assemblymember Greta has been a dedicated advocate for progressive causes for more than a decade. Some of her accolades include leading a statewide push to increase access to affordable healthcare, supporting progress to reduce racial disparities in our health system, and fighting to increase education funding and bills that would create more jobs for Wisconsin's families. She is a leading voice in our state and an advocate for policies and legislation that will move Wisconsin forward. | = Tammy Baldwin, U.S. Senator Senator Tammy Baldwin has dedicated her life's work to public service because she has a deep commitment to making a difference in the lives of Wisconsin’s working families. In the proud tradition of Wisconsin's state motto, Forward , she believes that we must always work together to help provide fairness, equality, and economic opportunity for all. | = Gwen Moore, U.S. Representative Representative Moore is a trailblazer for the State of Wisconsin. In 2005, she became the first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives. Congresswoman Moore led the fight against racial profiling, domestic abuse, and voting rights violations. A tireless advocate for the working families of Wisconsin, the work she's done has particularly impacted low-income communities. Wisconsin is a better place because of her! These women are putting in the work for all of us here in Wisconsin, and I cannot wait to work alongside them as we all take steps toward a better future for the next generation of female leaders. = Thank you, – Ann Roe = = *

name: Nelson HQ
subject: This oil pipeline is an environmental disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friend, the Line 5 oil pipeline is an environmental disaster for Wisconsin and Tom is standing up to stop it.

No family should have to worry about ruining their lungs because of harmful gasses being pumped into their neighborhood, and no one should have to stress about having clean water to drink. Not in America.

**That’s why Tom Nelson is urging the Biden administration to stop Line 5.** Right now, he’s the _only_ Senate candidate calling for action, which is why he needs your help to amplify this important issue.

[**Join Tom in calling for an end to Line 5 alongside investing in green energy by signing on today→**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828068/334476014/-1105761478?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_220309_1_2&refcode2=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBkODE0YS1iM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ABUcgemQw-WGm528kxnxZDcyIZ1gz1exWG7_sX_9xNc=&emci=330d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15112925)
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828069/334476015/-1105761478?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_220309_1_2&refcode2=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBkODE0YS1iM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ABUcgemQw-WGm528kxnxZDcyIZ1gz1exWG7_sX_9xNc=&emci=330d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15112925)
---

Big Oil obviously wants to keep Line 5 intact no matter how much of a danger it is to Wisconsin. This is why we need public servants like Tom in office who aren’t afraid to stand up to these deep-pocketed corporations. But it’s also why they are invested in stopping him from winning. They don’t want a Senator who will stand up to their corruption.

Instead of relying on fossil fuels – which are undoubtedly soiling our land and hurting our communities – **we need to invest in protecting our water, lowering our energy costs, protecting our environment, and creating green energy infrastructure for the future.**

[**If you agree, sign on today to take a stand against the Line 5 oil pipeline→**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828070/334476016/-1105761478?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_220309_1_2&refcode2=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBkODE0YS1iM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ABUcgemQw-WGm528kxnxZDcyIZ1gz1exWG7_sX_9xNc=&emci=330d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=340d814a-b3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15112925)

Thank you!

Team Nelson

**_Keep scrolling to read Tom’s full op-ed published in the Superior Telegram:_**

President Biden’s trip to Superior this week after the State of the Union had much to like.
He promoted the bipartisan infrastructure package, which will deliver urgent help for Wisconsin, including the direly-needed rehabilitation of the Blatnik Bridge and new protections for our precious Great Lakes.

The trip would have been even better, however, had the president announced that he was removing the presidential permit for Enbridge's controversial Line 5, which threatens the air and water quality of our beloved Northwoods.

Now is the time, with opposition to Line 5 peaking and catastrophic climate change upon us.

Leaders like Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, the heads of all 12 federally recognized tribes in Michigan and the Bad River Band of Lake Superior have urged Biden to stop this ecological disaster, along with so many of the concerned citizens of the Northwoods.

On Feb. 2, I was proud to be among the many ordinary citizens and the only Senate candidate who testified at the Wisconsin DNR hearing on Line 5. It lasted until 2 a.m., and the opposition was overwhelming, with good reason.

Line 5 is an aging relic that threatens our environment, undermines the next generation of Wisconsin jobs, places an undue burden of risk on Wisconsin localities and violates the heritage and sovereignty of Wisconsin’s First Peoples.

Meanwhile, throughout the long debate about Line 5, the Canadian corporation that profits from this aging relic has presented Wisconsin with a set of totally false choices — either Wisconsin jobs or the environment. Either this antiquated heirloom or higher energy costs.

But we know better in Wisconsin than they do in a Canadian board room: Opposition to Line 5 is vital because we support Wisconsin jobs and lower energy costs, not to mention our Tribes’ sovereignty and our effort to break our shared dependence on fossil fuels.

The environmental threat posed by Line 5 is obvious and there is a reason Canada wants it to run it in our backyard instead of theirs, violating Tribal treaties along the way. It’s a rotten artery of fossil fuels that has spilled more than 26,000 barrels through 29 separate incidents over its 64-year lifetime.

The line crosses our Bad River and other watersheds that flow into Lake Superior, one of the greatest reserves of freshwater in the world. And these spills are occurring in remote areas of Tribal, state, county and private lands with little capacity and few resources to respond to the dangers posed by the spills.

But it’s not just the threat of spills that makes Line 5 unacceptable for Wisconsin. It’s unacceptable because it represents a continued and dangerous reliance on the very fossil fuels that are funding the Russian takeover of Ukraine and causing the ongoing and ever-escalating climate crisis.

We need to break this cycle of dependence and we can do this while creating good jobs right here in Wisconsin with a Blue-Green New Deal that can unite labor unions and environmental concerns.

For example, right now, as we speak, innovators in the Wisconsin paper industry are creating alternatives to petro-chemicals. Lignin is a next generation plant-based biofuel already being researched by scientists in Wisconsin. This means that Line 5 is bringing to market a commodity that will directly compete with Wisconsin goods and jobs.

And when it comes to replacing outdated energy infrastructure, there have been great advances in thermal pump technology that can be powered by geothermal, solar, wind and other renewable energy.

Instead of Line 5, let’s honor our treaties with our Tribes.

Instead of Line 5, let’s protect our water.

Instead of Line 5, let’s invest in a Blue-Green New Deal that builds sustainable infrastructure, lowers our energy costs, protects our environment and grows good-paying union jobs.

We need public servants who are not afraid to stand up to deep-pocketed corporations. I’m always humbled to know this seat was held by Gaylord Nelson and proud to not only share a last name, but also his commitment to championing an environmental vision that does right by our beloved lakes, rivers and wetlands.

I am hopeful President Biden shares our values and vision as well and will commit to stopping Line 5.

— Tom Nelson
|

And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: Freedom First Project
subject: "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn't recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you've ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-rjLhosIRpeXh54g)
---
| | That's because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we're releasing our newest free online course, **"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,"** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course-it's truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College's mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can't make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [ _**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" at this secure page »**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online LearningHillsdale College
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDY5LTIxNjc0YWNmZmViNjRkNjI5ZWI1NmYwNDA1NzNkYjkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/t44n_g9gNjp6E79ygSib5A) to unsubscribe.

clean_body: | | | | Wyoming Strong. America Strong | Peter, The clock is ticking! We are 5 days away from the Cheney - Romney fundraiser being held in an exclusive area of Northern Virginia. We sat down with Harriet and set a goal of $72,300 to show our strength. But we noticed that you still haven’t stepped up and made a contribution. So we decided to do something we have never done before... RIGHT NOW, all contributions will have TRIPLE the IMPACT! Note: We can only hold the Triple-Impact till Midnight Tonight. Don’t let Cheney - Romney win, let’s show them America and Wyoming support Harriet Hageman! Thank you, Hageman Finance Team | | | |

body:
Lower costs, more jobs, and better science are things we should all be able to get behind.
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828595/334478381/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220309competes_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q4NGU0MS1iNWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQfoKazY2EYBmJiwkTLb2sqT3kYlT4PO125yZHXkvik=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828596/334478382/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220309competes_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q4NGU0MS1iNWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQfoKazY2EYBmJiwkTLb2sqT3kYlT4PO125yZHXkvik=) LBR voted last month to pass a critical bill out of the House that will lower the costs that families face and lead to even further job growth: the America COMPETES Act.

President Biden spoke at length about this legislation during his State of the Union address – it's a key part of the agenda we must pass to build a better America.

**[Now it's time for the Senate to act. Will you sign on to urge the Senate to quickly take up the America COMPETES Act and pass it into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828597/334478383/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220309competes_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q4NGU0MS1iNWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQfoKazY2EYBmJiwkTLb2sqT3kYlT4PO125yZHXkvik=)** | | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828598/334478384/1009979870?refcode=em_pet_220309competes_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Q4NGU0MS1iNWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQfoKazY2EYBmJiwkTLb2sqT3kYlT4PO125yZHXkvik=)**
---
The America COMPETES Act does several key things:
* It enhances our country's ability to manufacture more at home by investing in critically-needed semiconductors
* It will strengthen our supply chain and help Americans better afford the goods they buy
* By growing our manufacturing capacity, it will create more good-paying union jobs
* It adds important funding to our STEM workforce programs – so America can continue to lead the way in innovation

Lower costs, more jobs, and better sciences are things we should all be able to get behind. So let's make sure the Senate hears our voice and passes this bill as soon as possible!

– Team LBR
** **
**Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. | | | Friend, It wasn’t long ago that I announced my intentions of standing up for New Hampshire and bringing our values to the U.S. Senate. But the progressive Left has ALREADY started to attack me... **_...they’re trying to go after me for my Pro-Life record and my opposition to their late-term abortion agenda._**

---
---
| |
---
| | [Don’t Let the Abortion Activists Stall Our Campaign! Chip In](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU1MDAmZD1xOW4ydzZy.ZYaydp80Lc9kZ1f5-FIBMRhbrZ1FrmfGLemWl_1-Cg0)
---
---
| | | __If Maggie Hassan’s allies think they can silence me by trying to turn my support for the unborn into some kind of hit-piece, they can think again. I will not apologize for standing up for the values of Granite Staters instead of the extreme, liberal, late-term abortion agenda of Washington Democrats like Maggie Hassan. **Because that’s what it means to stand up for the 603 -****_[and with your support](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU1MTUmZD13OGYzbjlj.zdHqwkppLScNhLTnD02x1rxTGczUTtVc5ZfSfyKAlY4)_****, we’re going to bring that leadership directly to our nation’s capital... no matter what attacks Hassan and her allies use to try to stop our momentum!****[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU1MzMmZD1wMnA0YzFy.lEkdZCkoGODFWJd6SdSKkegK4jbxZfaif_myrSuAPBA)**

---
---
| |
---
| | [Keep Up the Support!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU1NjAmZD1qNWg3dzNu.a9P1l32qORnZEFBHgwZTj5ObWOex1aF3CQruuqaxigI)
---
---
| |
---
| Here are my direct words that they tried to use as some kind of smear:__

---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU1NzImZD1wMnAzZjZj.92vAaaMsyUFTTrXG2pKNCnCJHQd02Yl3kpyQeZ_qh2E)
---
| |
---
| The liberal group that snuck into my campaign event and recorded me thinks this is some big win for them... _That’s a sign of how desperate they really are!_ Hassan and her allies think recording me voicing my support for a New Hampshire Pro-Life victory 50 years in the making is going to be their ticket to continue pushing their D.C. priorities. **_[Will you help me prove them wrong and fend off this “attack” so we can continue standing up for the 603? →](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU2MDImZD15NGo2cDhi.5uZfvtAm3nhe6Hpk6j3xOZFNs5CzgeiW_QLRSudKMzI)_**

---
---
| |

| Thank you for the support, _Chuck Morse_
PS - I knew these attacks would come once I decided to challenge Hassan and her powerful allies... _but I didn’t think they’d come so early_. Since we’re already becoming a target, _[are you able to pitch in even just $10 to help our campaign push back?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAyOTkxMzQ4MTg5ODk0ODMzJmM9dThvNyZlPTAmYj05NDAxMjU2OTImZD1uN2QybzFi.WcZqLNHDzk_89BKNCaoE6QDHnwluSyIrzr7EV8maOqw)_

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: "This seat is in jeopardy”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
My former opponent thinks that because he represented the 4th district of Oregon for 36 years, he can hand pick his replacement. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=64b58a65981b42b3984aaf3203af939b&_e=PF6r8VEoRlTye0nqkJkRK1fSGozmFU65hRHuwrIq4bwSO7CXCFW8Z8PMG1P67IN-eputKwUJCgq31TdxIy6uLdamGP92_6TGkbtPHi7L9lEEqJNGKK-Bvu5ZBjWmSKkCdlsqRLzGInKnghOCJ7U7ie-wNysTyc0DQ7Ow_Kr2cvH8Kj0X2aqjmYSmBpSVC24T7zZLtZttMsLhHMiWQHzcIF0CcawZAFQQrOH3NYr3yHswPFJnJPiDbx0wGU1zZg4Zfu1iGeArzZvDc8WY06zBXiJ2qrQE4ZKz8IaaPbcdseTNaifUbWDEmYbdNVcC0g8irHidVpCS9puTBNVdCI75Ihz7GBrBzfXkTXcHfucdmBfGaN9o2PAQMk3bctAWQdhp7Prl-8CRR-BxdLo0DWFXYJGNyJ9awU-U8K04z76zMz9tRaW9eIyFkJJraO8L-4y0)
---

Peter,

In a recent email missive endorsing the Democrat he hopes to succeed him in Congress, my former opponent Peter DeFazio described me as a “**hand-selected Trump** ” candidate running with “**all kinds of help from all kinds of Super PACs and conservative mega-donors**.”

On both counts, **Peter DeFazio is lying**. He’s trying to gin up support for my would-be Democrat opponent, Val Hoyle, by hounding his email list and scaring his donors into supporting Val’s campaign.

1. No one picked me to run on Oregon's 4th District

2. I'm not receiving the support of any Super PACs or megadonors. In reality, 98% of the support my campaign receives is from **small-dollar donors** like you reading emails like this.

What DeFazio DOES get right is that “ _**this seat is in jeopardy**_.”

That’s right - this seat is in Jeopardy of flipping red, but we need your help to make Peter’s warning come true in real life.

He’s trying to gin up support for my would-be Democrat opponent, Val Hoyle, by hounding his email list and scaring his donors into supporting Val’s campaign. 1. clean_body: I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? | Peter, I’ll get straight to the point. I am emailing you today because I am endorsing Herschel Walker for the United States Senate. He’ll be a fantastic senator, and I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to watch why I am endorsing Herschel. While serving as the Secretary of State and Director of the CIA in the Trump Administration, I saw how important it is for our nation to have strong leaders in Washington who love America and will fight for our citizens. Herschel Walker is the leader for the job. Herschel has lived the American Dream, and he will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. Herschel has my full support, and I will do everything I can to help him win Georgia and put our nation back on the right track. Herschel’s opponent, Raphael Warnock, is wrong for Georgia. Unfortunately, Democrat megadonors know how vulnerable he is, so they’ve rushed to provide him more money than any Senate candidate in the country. Even though Senator Warnock is flooding Georgia with millions of dollars in ads, the race is in a statistical tie. Peter, taking back the Senate and stopping President Biden's reckless agenda depends on us sending a conservative fighter to the Senate. Herschel Walker will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I'm proud to endorse him because he will always champion American values. Thanks, Mike Pompeo | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| | I am proud to announce my first organized labor endorsement of the 2022 campaign. The Pacific Northwest Ironworkers and Ironworkers Local 86 have joined our team. Here is what they had to say: _"We are confident that you hold the values of working class people in high regard_." **[I am running for re-election so I can continue to fight for working-class people here in Northwest Washington. Contribute $3 now to join my fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42828968/334480294/1596212816?refcode=2022-03-10-ironworkers&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b375fb6f-b7a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzc1ZmI2Zi1iN2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yfptXJy5ktH4DpmIGMoYBaGLgO_hPkW6WwqbMTlUMWE=)** Working class Americans were most prosperous when workers were represented by strong unions. But decades of union busting have left workers without political _or_ economic power. That is why I voted for the Protecting the Right to Organize Act (PRO Act), and why I support unionization efforts for workers in all sectors of the economy. I also support raising the minimum wage so folks do not have to work two or three jobs just to take care of their families. I am committed to making it easier for workers to get access to skills training so they can reach their full earning potential. My dad was a union power line worker. Mom managed the books while raising eight kids. I learned early in life the value of a dollar and the importance of hard work. Those values influence every decision I make in Congress. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Mark Holland for Senate

| We are circling back — did you see Mark’s previous email?

[Mark is running for Senate because we need leadership that is in touch with what it means to live, work, and raise a family here in Kansas. We need a leader who understands the challenges of working in Kansas. Can you contribute to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42806852/334427103/-1247282542?amount=25&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220310_1_2&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2E5MjA5NS04ZWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yZa1pJBn2iPAWBY5IxM0wURwDBkJF-GYPozgYlsXm5I=)

Check out his previous email:

_**–Begin forwarded message–**_

Over the last few weeks, I’ve been on the road talking to voters across Kansas. It’s the best part of campaigning, hearing directly from the people who I want to represent in the US Senate and learning what they are looking for in their leaders.

I hear a lot of the same refrains about why we need new leadership in Washington, and it’s exciting because it’s exactly why I’m running.

[Kansas needs leadership that is in touch with the day-to-day challenges. I come from a long line of Kansans, and I love this state and all that comes with it. My father is a pastor who taught me the value of working for all people, and my mother is a teacher who taught me the value of public education and using our gifts to improve the community.

[I believe it's important for leaders to have first-hand knowledge of the struggles of day-to-day life. That’s why I'm running for Senate – to bring compassionate and accountable leadership to Washington. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Students at risk — petition to reform schools
body:
School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organizati
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmglqrhf9sou9sdeaktid1t8j71i7cbs7v1f0n50_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5jeuq62sr3m3hmbcrhcoqj1d3i6cp3apjjcjjr8cj0moqn1ddicorj8dbicdrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphimsqradtnc9j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ucailceufke15q5kao8poqprlg2hs1kntlqoeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9rc69k3cdhjjtukb88uopmm90mf0suk58vgnl78_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) Fellow American, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I’m proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) — our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards’ decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by the end of this month. Will you help me protect students from left-wing indoctrination — and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents — with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5343iu16s7qkq800m0p5irig44ajk6ed54gs7eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zumh49rsbdjri5hu0tb5q38qq8f64muslklrm0vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state — likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students — and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z55oa51di9cgkhgm6dsv93t1h70u2oerg7ve031g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zutq02938943082an3jij23qjddm89j2er15akdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones — online, on campus, and over the airwaves — to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7pfda1n373bal3ip06hjfgdih3bdavv1jl5hgb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3hhk6rphvro86g8ce2hqvf4qgecqnr1nj88dj00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjgmeo72chh2bs) The time to fight back is right **NOW** — before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

---

---
ESCANABA, Mich. — On Wednesday morning, Dr. Bob Lorinser [published a statement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42808291/334433789/90584199?fbclid=IwAR0OEgL63iBHWspkTg9u8YA2D-tOwuMV2hvMuxUE286SEV4n8h_H5uD8iRc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjZTRhMy05M2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlyaDtbaaVdNbZf663B_xeHdj2ljTp_GEVuWA2jbKf4=&emci=78b44544-8fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5d8ce4a3-93a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) promoting bipartisan solutions to rising gas prices. He condemned the political blame game and implored his opponent to work with his colleagues and the President on realistic energy solutions to help ease the burden on the American people from recent increases in gasoline prices from Putin’s invasion of Ukraine. Dr. Bob’s opponent then took to social media in an attempt to blast the administration and advocate for a brash “drill, baby, drill” domestic energy policy. But, unfortunately, the Congressman’s solutions were fallacy latent, backed by alternative facts, and met with [sharp criticism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42808292/334433790/1631474664?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjZTRhMy05M2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlyaDtbaaVdNbZf663B_xeHdj2ljTp_GEVuWA2jbKf4=&emci=78b44544-8fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5d8ce4a3-93a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427). **SUGGESTIONS ON ENERGY**
---
| |
---
Remove ‘bureaucratic obstacles’ to constructing new, modern energy infrastructure.
---
---
Our Congressman's no-vote on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan was Michigan's main obstacle to modernizing energy infrastructure. He had the opportunity to advance modern construction, including renewables, and my opponent opposed it. 'Bureaucratic obstacles,' Bergman's obstruction. Tomāto, Tomäto.
---
|
---
| |
---
Increase energy resource production on federal lands.
---
---
Not applicable. There are currently 9,000 federal drilling permits approved. Oil companies are sitting on them. The United States has been a net annual petroleum exporter since 2020. We produce more than what we consume.

---
|
---
| |
---
Construct new oil and gas infrastructure, approve applications, and approve the Keystone XL Pipeline.
---
---
Not applicable. There are currently 9,000 federal drilling permits approved. Oil companies are sitting on them. The United States has been a net annual petroleum exporter since 2020. We produce more than what we consume.

---
|
---
| |
---
Ensure continued operation of oil pipelines, including Line 5.
---
---
Advocating for a deteriorating 70-year-old pipeline under the Straits of Mackinac that takes fuel from Canada to Canada is not a serious solution for lowering U.S. gas prices. Period.

---
|
---
| |
---
Pause all new discretionary regulatory activity that negatively impacts the energy sector until the Ukraine crisis is over, and global markets stabilize.
---
---
All? Without any details, this is unacceptable. All new discretionary regulatory activities do not necessarily equate to lower prices and could threaten our advancements addressing climate change and environmental protection.

---
|
---
| |
---
End climate activism by federal agencies and order financial regulators to keep to their statutory mission.
---
---
I'll use my opponent's words. "The cure cannot be more harmful than the problem." We can address climate change and environmental issues at the same time. All three issues need meaningful solutions and urgent attention.

---
|
---
If my opponent were serious about alleviating the strain on his constituents’ pocketbooks, he should be considering more moderate and more effective solutions based on ‘real facts’ and not just big oil.
* Temporarily eliminating gas taxes could save around $.25 - $.90 per gallon.
* Opening up more reserves could increase supply.
* Temporarily waiving summer gas blends could save up to $.15 per gallon.
* Revisiting the ethanol mandate that increased gas prices for negligible environmental benefits could save at the pump.
* Preventing price gouging protects consumers and builds trust between suppliers.
* Transforming the economy to electric energy will keep us focused on mitigating climate change and reducing dependence on foreign oil.

These are not Democratic solutions or Republican solutions. They’re common-sense solutions. It's time my opponent drop the platform of oil tycoons and their political beneficiaries and start concentrating on the needs of rural Michigan. My focus as a Congressman would be to stand first with the citizens I serve.
---

I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. Generally, contributions are non-refundable. Should you choose to contribute, you will receive an e-mail confirmation of your contribution. C. Information You Choose to Provide to Us. We collect any information you provide to us on or through the services or in any other way. For example, we collect any information you provide when you update your user account and profile ("User Account"); participate in contests, surveys, and other promotions; and sign up to receive newsletters and other communications. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at [google.com/privacy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42808295/334433794/-1896877334?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDhjZTRhMy05M2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlyaDtbaaVdNbZf663B_xeHdj2ljTp_GEVuWA2jbKf4=&emci=78b44544-8fa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5d8ce4a3-93a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427). D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at . D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. We may collect any information you submit, post, or provide in such activities and reserve the right to store any information about the people you contact via the Services. PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

| Peter, Backyard by backyard, ad by ad, and event after event, I have laid out my progressive vision to make Maryland state government a transformative force for good. And with every county we visit and every Marylander I have the privilege to speak with, it’s clear that voters share my vision for a more equitable future and believe in our movement to create real, positive change. **I am ready to lead our state toward a more just future and flip Maryland BLUE this November, but I need YOUR help to do it, Peter.** _**[Will you chip in $5 or more so we can keep our campaign momentum going and continue to spread our message across the state? My team and I have set a 24-hour goal to raise $20,000, and we can’t hit it without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42830099/334486207/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220310-b3_fr_md-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220310-b3_fr_md-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220310&&&&utm_content=b3_fr_md&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&refcode2=d6465981-bda0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ2NTk4MS1iZGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGDb5WIJbd6OO9_bbIoot3w8PdVCXeGfWXBKqq4nPpA=)**_ **If you agree with me that we need to: ** ✔️ Tackle the climate crisis head-on

clean_body: I am ready to flip Maryland BLUE, but I need your help to do it. | = | Peter, Backyard by backyard, ad by ad, and event after event, I have laid out my progressive vision to make Maryland state government a transformative force for good. And with every county we visit and every Marylander I have the privilege to speak with, it’s clear that voters share my vision for a more equitable future and believe in our movement to create real, positive change. I am ready to lead our state toward a more just future and flip Maryland BLUE this November, but I need YOUR help to do it, Peter. = If you agree with me that we need to: ✔️ Tackle the climate crisis head-on ✔️ Ensure strong public schools in every community and raise teacher pay ✔️ Improve women’s economic equity and close the wage gap ✔️ Reform our criminal justice system = We need to make sure every voter learns about my story and my progressive values — but that won’t happen if we don’t have the resources. = | | = Thank you, John * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our .
