subject: Haven't raised a single dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Peter, let me explain why I need your support
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809055/334436518/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhMzI0Yi05NGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-dxaNwOTg0IKI8hoqMcWfwege-7mmhfRLtWADPHNTk=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $5, Peter – but first, please let me explain why I need your support:
I have been in a total fundraising blackout since a special legislative session that started in December. As a result, we're more than two months into my reelection year, and I haven't been able to raise a _single dollar yet_ , Peter.
I just started fundraising again yesterday, and it's going to take a huge push to put me back on track. That's why I set an emergency goal to inspire 10,000 supporters – including you – to become Election Year Members before the end of this week:
**[Will you please rush $5 to become an Election Year Member before Sunday at midnight? I can't keep New Mexico blue without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809056/334436519/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhMzI0Yi05NGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-dxaNwOTg0IKI8hoqMcWfwege-7mmhfRLtWADPHNTk=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809057/334436520/-341899999?refcode=jtk1170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhMzI0Yi05NGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-dxaNwOTg0IKI8hoqMcWfwege-7mmhfRLtWADPHNTk=)
Grassroots supporters are the cornerstone of this campaign. Because of your support, I have been able to enact bold, progressive policies like legalizing cannabis, acting on climate change, and providing free higher education.
We've accomplished so much, but all of our progress could be undone in an instant if the GOP flips our state red. There's no doubt that if more Republicans gain power here, they will try to restrict voting rights and personal freedoms, just like the GOP did in Texas.
**I'm fighting as hard as I can to defend our state from the GOP, but I'm behind on my goals right now because of the fundraising blackout. I can't keep New Mexico blue alone, so I need 10,000 people to become Election Year Members before the end of this week:**
**[I need your help to defend New Mexico from the GOP: Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now to become an Election Year Member?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809058/334436521/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhMzI0Yi05NGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-dxaNwOTg0IKI8hoqMcWfwege-7mmhfRLtWADPHNTk=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809059/334436522/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1170-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhMzI0Yi05NGEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-dxaNwOTg0IKI8hoqMcWfwege-7mmhfRLtWADPHNTk=)

If we continue to work together, I know there is a brighter future ahead of us. Thank you so much for your support.

clean_body: Peter, let me explain why I need your support | | | = I'm about to ask you for $5, Peter – but first, please let me explain why I need your support: I have been in a total fundraising blackout since a special legislative session that started in December. As a result, we're more than two months into my reelection year, and I haven't been able to raise a single dollar yet , Peter. I just started fundraising again yesterday, and it's going to take a huge push to put me back on track. That's why I set an emergency goal to inspire 10,000 supporters – including you – to become Election Year Members before the end of this week: = = Grassroots supporters are the cornerstone of this campaign. Because of your support, I have been able to enact bold, progressive policies like legalizing cannabis, acting on climate change, and providing free higher education. We've accomplished so much, but all of our progress could be undone in an instant if the GOP flips our state red. There's no doubt that if more Republicans gain power here, they will try to restrict voting rights and personal freedoms, just like the GOP did in Texas. I'm fighting as hard as I can to defend our state from the GOP, but I'm behind on my goals right now because of the fundraising blackout. I can't keep New Mexico blue alone, so I need 10,000 people to become Election Year Members before the end of this week: = | | = If we continue to work together, I know there is a brighter future ahead of us. Thank you so much for your support. name: Jake Evans
subject: Endorsed By Hannity!
body:
Conservative stalwart and radio legend Sean Hannity honored my campaign with his...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
I have great news.
Conservative stalwart and radio legend, Sean Hannity honored my campaign with his full endorsement LIVE on the radio this week.
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f_tTXZ3bx16t5cE3Yp6Oqqs1RU0RdWt8yh2B02n32LbIKBRCdTGi_ZhNyxZbTtvkk4wXuRYsK0GEDQi3SDwLlBJSuEhSjblTPwAkdoyWjHu0s0Jc88tQlThV6tPeN4npKEYoYJdq6gwztw623_FAL0N__yGpSnqROy7OvBOIQZ_t54rFsGyK8DFOgWqi2uS_&c=VguvwXghbaLet9s7Ysrd6TOd31RkQglS4jPWBjmjokoFnY1e2yL2Lw==&ch=MuMaxjeMJu3oI-rjh9qeyut_3ElsJKNSIvtv6YQnltEu4rgWX3FzAw==)
---
Sean Hannity has been one of the leading conservative voices in our country and an incredible supporter of President Trump's America First Movement from day one, it's an honor to have his support.
You can listen to Hannity's endorsement on our [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f_tTXZ3bx16t5cE3Yp6Oqqs1RU0RdWt8yh2B02n32LbIKBRCdTGi_Up8MwndqG-KkmEzCktLDSUQfBH-ARgIXAOAyejn0KZKy8D0cDc3RSofWtWZvRv1Hv9mb5csuHco3v0qO75C8FTNj7BKh_OB0iwst3yMZ5DEC3iO4Ce6lxphwD7TS1I95xgZDz4fhpCVlLwvy8olXXY=&c=VguvwXghbaLet9s7Ysrd6TOd31RkQglS4jPWBjmjokoFnY1e2yL2Lw==&ch=MuMaxjeMJu3oI-rjh9qeyut_3ElsJKNSIvtv6YQnltEu4rgWX3FzAw==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f_tTXZ3bx16t5cE3Yp6Oqqs1RU0RdWt8yh2B02n32LbIKBRCdTGi_Up8MwndqG-KcK8gBFKz8ngjC7BbB92Umg1EsOOYT3iBUYK12E5Ehv949Bc5fyck00gzAkxjxXAyaQy1YKmGDz-idmcV8wGhZGpxtfdL4N9ORfFmBEY0ou6X779OaFXVlyR56csLHFzO&c=VguvwXghbaLet9s7Ysrd6TOd31RkQglS4jPWBjmjokoFnY1e2yL2Lw==&ch=MuMaxjeMJu3oI-rjh9qeyut_3ElsJKNSIvtv6YQnltEu4rgWX3FzAw==), or campaign [website.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f_tTXZ3bx16t5cE3Yp6Oqqs1RU0RdWt8yh2B02n32LbIKBRCdTGi_ZhNyxZbTtvkk4wXuRYsK0GEDQi3SDwLlBJSuEhSjblTPwAkdoyWjHu0s0Jc88tQlThV6tPeN4npKEYoYJdq6gwztw623_FAL0N__yGpSnqROy7OvBOIQZ_t54rFsGyK8DFOgWqi2uS_&c=VguvwXghbaLet9s7Ysrd6TOd31RkQglS4jPWBjmjokoFnY1e2yL2Lw==&ch=MuMaxjeMJu3oI-rjh9qeyut_3ElsJKNSIvtv6YQnltEu4rgWX3FzAw==)
"Wanted to remind people the 6th Congressional District in Georgia, that's Newt Gingrich's old district, and Jake Evans is running for that 6th District. Jake grew up with the benefit of working with Speaker Gingrich, with an equivocal appreciation for President Trump and America first and make America Great Again. Anyway, we need young people, like from Jake's Generation, the next generation to take over. And I'm endorsing him as the next congressman for the 6th District of Georgia, which, by the way, happens to be a district near and dear to my heart because I was there with Newt Gingrich the night he became Speaker. And he'll make a great Congressman. If you live in the 6th District in Georgia." -Sean Hannity
I don't take the endorsements of great leaders like former Speaker Newt Gingrich and Sean Hannity lightly, and with your support, I intend to carry the torch of freedom representing Georgia's 6th District in Congress.
[Donate $25 or more to help me WIN in 2022 and put the people FIRST!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f_tTXZ3bx16t5cE3Yp6Oqqs1RU0RdWt8yh2B02n32LbIKBRCdTGi_bZ9JeM9X3OfveUeqhDayxM5GCfMAyGIuJvhW8Hy1eYA7hvmmp2sHpxN4Q_e5EhSfeMXDADbORN3HIvlGleKRQKOJyFYMYqQ-9zHYUUocr7kAbyelTZODilWi5N9Zzck2MzjYbZljLAW&c=VguvwXghbaLet9s7Ysrd6TOd31RkQglS4jPWBjmjokoFnY1e2yL2Lw==&ch=MuMaxjeMJu3oI-rjh9qeyut_3ElsJKNSIvtv6YQnltEu4rgWX3FzAw==)

name: Senate Control Alert
subject: as of 4 p.m. ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio and national Republicans are attacking Val Demings
| | |
---
Things aren't looking good, friend: Marco Rubio and national Republicans are attacking Val Demings, and **she's falling incredibly short of her midnight goal.**
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42830560/334488259/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2540-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDA1N2UzMy1iZWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvB9pVa8L3hTh1JnGnZKE7In5HnoNL3umuXV-UNcAaU=)
The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) raised $11.7 MILLION in just one month – and our team found out that they are about to use their massive war chest to launch deceitful attacks against Val Demings. Val Demings and Marco Rubio are neck and neck in this close race – and the GOP is panicking. The NRSC is trying to spread lies about her because they know that if she wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep Senate control.
The last Senate race in Florida was decided by just 10,033 votes and these ads reach so many people that **just ONE attack could determine whether we win or lose Florida – and the Senate.**
**Val Demings just set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 before midnight tonight to defend herself from the GOP – but if she misses this goal, she's afraid she could fall behind in the polls. This is a make-or-break moment, and she's falling short, so she's counting on your support now: **

Val Demings and Marco Rubio are neck and neck in this close race – and the GOP is panicking. The NRSC is trying to spread lies about her because they know that if she wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep Senate control. The last Senate race in Florida was decided by just 10,033 votes and these ads reach so many people that just ONE attack could determine whether we win or lose Florida – and the Senate. Val Demings just set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 before midnight tonight to defend herself from the GOP – but if she misses this goal, she's afraid she could fall behind in the polls. We have some exciting news, Peter Willis:
Today, we’re rolling out a core piece of Melanie’s platform: **Universal Childcare**.
It’s popular, it’s economically smart, and most importantly **it’s what working families need and deserve.[Chip in today to help us send Melanie to Congress to fight on behalf of families everywhere.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpARLg06H3qHj7t1f1kLhyJoa4x8R9cfZJ_AlxJruLBpNgOj4uKccqJRT7d6kUw8_X976Ij2HadOpZUKyBws1aq24gAtDpACykgqPADwIR49fjMQ695Gr4qe2mYmvYtU_DcuNeI3mR0QjUZdT-MgbSumvZeGQwJij1wTz8mJuL_Le7mbpQFwMVnAFp9JQChHvPI2wanvVEovAGNjgVM-b0lc8-zmqPrbr4zV0_HG99QVFn0Ebcoc2R4Fb5bW_dtYj7ERs48leNUXf7p2Fw102IWzu/3k8/h1m3e7dCRF2bDPJxLskocA/h1/xzIhpV6MtPEereZfXGaSY_TEjJ7D-PCbKry9excyIDk)**

In New York, a year of childcare for one infant costs, at minimum, $15,394. That means a minimum wage worker would need to work full time for 33 weeks just to afford childcare for one infant — more than half a year’s pay!
And that’s only with one infant to care for. Childcare for two children — an infant and a 4 year old — costs even more, at $27,752. Low- and moderate-income families simply cannot afford these costs on top of healthcare, rent, and putting food on the table.
**Access to low-cost, high-quality childcare and early education should be a right, not a privilege reserved for those who can afford it.**
More than just the right thing to do for parents, meaningful childcare reform also addresses the opportunity gap and boosts local economies. Access to quality early education has been shown to boost high school graduation rates and employment incomes. Families would save tens of thousands of dollars every year on childcare costs, freeing up their income to spend on other needs and putting their paychecks right back into the local economy.
[Check out our full policy agenda here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQhrcx_KrpE52P5iAgBBhT5t2N2TMjpzw3Wfk4Wbcyvpo5uqkvXmdKl70V5YxIVYQJwtqT9xpqZy0yBQp8-eR-ZG3gc_1ocpSFGQ4x-0jMHSflC8teOnzurR8p_QSKueeKiSbAL_tVIkuAY_5DsdIos0FSmxGAAQV3BRef_HiR9Zh900XdIRLWhhTh-nHCZVLH2NADTDyj7tbN3XHT_OUCkAQwrsAbAu24X3UZb6PP2VCb0VV_U6Z59b7s4E8192DBaII85O7-2ToeurFRAcdLWI78Iq6pC6Fvb4nqvcT0x4--nXFHXoh9Fxrtfp0isG8cWj-1_OkUF6aLY3h3vf71yA/3k8/h1m3e7dCRF2bDPJxLskocA/h3/Ge6XVpoJtpOkP867aNTrx9GhlrLE7ud-zkTHpPC1uLs), where Melanie lays out a solution-based approach and the innumerable, life-changing benefits making childcare available to ALL, regardless of income, employment, citizenship, or disability status, would bring.
And one last thing: universal childcare is _incredibly_ popular. **84% of Democrats, 61% of Independents, and 60% of Republican voters nationwide support reforming our childcare and early education systems to be more affordable and accessible.**
With this much support, from the grassroots to the top of our government, universal childcare is no longer just a pipe dream — and with Melanie in Congress, we’d have a champion willing to do whatever it takes to make it reality. **[Chip in today to show your support and send a fighter for working families to Washington!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNuq8x1EXmyBYC5yCKBHGpARLg06H3qHj7t1f1kLhyJoaWkYljnkG2ZDAeThsPqFIDXbzZr64HHGRtxC5jScTCbG0yaDBtrwvdvBYfvyOvLbL22qVKGhu2FrgZhZsBGsGeWaokoYMJGh5O7yTqvMnq7yleOya_KbLQc2GZ8UCfTQuIyrM44fSzCHRNQ_sh_iTXVu6MWFQPMBCTC1LAlbWI8gpxlBqFMshkf4MzfjQeVhVg-jWbsQ7GoW7Ps0yqluxfPx76k_4Xaq1sumnwoD90iEpZei-ON5jK5FlCxCkV5gJ/3k8/h1m3e7dCRF2bDPJxLskocA/h4/ieeMZuDAHjN5WKPj6FNwvOgrTfqYlU42ihChOPkmQZ4)**

clean_body: | | | | We have some exciting news, Peter Willis: Today, we’re rolling out a core piece of Melanie’s platform: Universal Childcare. It’s popular, it’s economically smart, and most importantly it’s what working families need and deserve. In New York, a year of childcare for one infant costs, at minimum, $15,394. That means a minimum wage worker would need to work full time for 33 weeks just to afford childcare for one infant — more than half a year’s pay! And that’s only with one infant to care for. Childcare for two children — an infant and a 4 year old — costs even more, at $27,752. Low- and moderate-income families simply cannot afford these costs on top of healthcare, rent, and putting food on the table. Access to low-cost, high-quality childcare and early education should be a right, not a privilege reserved for those who can afford it. More than just the right thing to do for parents, meaningful childcare reform also addresses the opportunity gap and boosts local economies. Access to quality early education has been shown to boost high school graduation rates and employment incomes. Families would save tens of thousands of dollars every year on childcare costs, freeing up their income to spend on other needs and putting their paychecks right back into the local economy. , where Melanie lays out a solution-based approach and the innumerable, life-changing benefits making childcare available to ALL, regardless of income, employment, citizenship, or disability status, would bring. And one last thing: universal childcare is incredibly popular. 84% of Democrats, 61% of Independents, and 60% of Republican voters nationwide support reforming our childcare and early education systems to be more affordable and accessible. With this much support, from the grassroots to the top of our government, universal childcare is no longer just a pipe dream — and with Melanie in Congress, we’d have a champion willing to do whatever it takes to make it reality. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for your support! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo for NY-03, please .

name: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer
subject: Democracy Summer 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Our campaign is proud to participate in the 2022 National Democracy Summer! Developed by Maryland Congressman Jamie Raskin, this program is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of Democratic political leaders and organizers.

We're looking for high school and college students interested in participating as **[Team Kilmer Fellows](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fz0Tqs7GhKj0C0gTpNzYbRnTKgT3pXTWwJXDm89EYfA=/58t3AThHQ92Im9eLAxxLUxAdSgclS4oar4TFgU8bmzg=)**. This year's theme is "Political Democracy and its Enemies." Students will learn tactics in voter registration and political organizing with the opportunity to hear from activists, political leaders, and community organizers from around the country.

Training the next generation of Democratic leaders is crucial to building a democracy that works for the people. **[The deadline to apply to be a Democracy Summer Fellow is coming up soon on Tuesday, March 15th, so don't wait. If you are interested in learning more or applying, check out the application today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fz0Tqs7GhKj0C0gTpNzYbRnTKgT3pXTWwJXDm89EYfA=/58t3AThHQ92Im9eLAxxLUxAdSgclS4oar4TFgU8bmzg=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fz0Tqs7GhKj0C0gTpNzYbRnTKgT3pXTWwJXDm89EYfA=/58t3AThHQ92Im9eLAxxLUxAdSgclS4oar4TFgU8bmzg=)
[APPLY TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fz0Tqs7GhKj0C0gTpNzYbRnTKgT3pXTWwJXDm89EYfA=/58t3AThHQ92Im9eLAxxLUxAdSgclS4oar4TFgU8bmzg=)
If you know a student who you think would be interested in this opportunity, please forward this message along.

Thank you,

Kevin Schilling
Political Director

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fz0Tqs7GhKj0C0gTpNzYbRnTKgT3pXTWwJXDm89EYfA=/8LJ8VV2ZqA-4dvWtnFkDM8TSg2HVZHWMPsAvg1uyqgk=?refcode=em22_220310_dem_engg_gq_act_smr_ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220310_dem_engg_gq_act_smr_ks_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Blue Illinois 2022
subject: Let’s elect the first Latina Secretary of State in Illinois history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Anna Valencia is running to be the first Latina and first woman Secretary of State in Illinois history. And this is a race Democrats must win.
The Secretary of State plays a major role in protecting voting rights, promoting government transparency, and providing essential government services. We cannot let the Republicans control this important office.
**[Chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can to support Anna Valencia’s campaign for Secretary of State in Illinois.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809780/334439547/1199917254?refcode=dd_em_220310_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGJkMzRiNC05NWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P1N2gPvl1bUaKtziBNUAvGFoK5n-9vRsLYN7S0CSdtk=)**
Anna grew up in Granite City, Illinois. She’s a proud University of Illinois alum, and the first person in her family to graduate college.
She’s dedicated her professional life to having a positive impact on the world around her. As City Clerk of Chicago, she has helped improve access to city benefits, enact historic fines and fees reforms that helped pull Chicagoans out of debt, and make city services more accessible across Chicago.
Improving the lives of families is Anna’s passion — and it’s what she wants to do as Illinois Secretary of State. Senator Dick Durbin and Senator Tammy Duckworth believe in her. Governor JB Prtizker believes in her. Outgoing Secretary of State Jesse White believes in her.
**[All she needs to make her campaign successful is people like you keeping it going. The Secretary of State plays a major role in protecting voting rights, promoting government transparency, and providing essential government services. We cannot let the Republicans control this important office. = Anna grew up in Granite City, Illinois. She’s a proud University of Illinois alum, and the first person in her family to graduate college. She’s dedicated her professional life to having a positive impact on the world around her. As City Clerk of Chicago, she has helped improve access to city benefits, enact historic fines and fees reforms that helped pull Chicagoans out of debt, and make city services more accessible across Chicago. name: Holly McCormack
subject: The healthcare we deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42830828/334489228/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzEwZmE2MS1iZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u01TCSD9USW5t_khZYacQS7WdOC4s7qw4OFzp-OX680=&emci=08b65f04-b6a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bc10fa61-bfa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene pretends to care about the issues we face but she continually ignores the women calling on her to help us get the healthcare we deserve. Marge has avoided all calls to action because she doesn't understand the issues we face as a rural community – because she doesn’t live here. For Team Holly, it doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in protecting the lives of women in our District. As a mother, I know that parenting a child takes a village and it’s made harder when representatives like Marjorie Taylor Greene don't fight for the services you deserve. Our communities struggle with affordable childcare, quality education, and accessible women's health services. Here in Northwest Georgia, we have 9 hospitals in the district and **only 4 of them have labor and delivery services**. Pregnant women who have to travel more than 40 miles to give birth are at a higher risk of complications. Women in rural communities deserve to have access to proper gynecological and labor delivery services. Rural and underserved communities like ours are in desperate need of a representative who understands their struggles and will fight for the resources they need. Living in a rural community should not be a barrier to getting the healthcare you and your family deserve. When I go to Congress I wont waste my time on political stunts, instead I will work to support rural and underfunded hospitals to ensure better access to women's healthcare, specifically labor and delivery services. I’m running not only to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, not only to uplift the women of Northwest Georgia, but because I want to show mothers and families everywhere that we deserve resources and respect from our representatives. **[Donate $15 today, if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42830829/334489229/-804235033?refcode=em0310&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzEwZmE2MS1iZmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u01TCSD9USW5t_khZYacQS7WdOC4s7qw4OFzp-OX680=)** Let's keep fighting for our rural communities,Holly McCormack.
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene pretends to care about the issues we face but she continually ignores the women calling on her to help us get the healthcare we deserve. Marge has avoided all calls to action because she doesn't understand the issues we face as a rural community – because she doesn’t live here. For Team Holly, it doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in protecting the lives of women in our District. As a mother, I know that parenting a child takes a village and it’s made harder when representatives like Marjorie Taylor Greene don't fight for the services you deserve. Our communities struggle with affordable childcare, quality education, and accessible women's health services. Here in Northwest Georgia, we have 9 hospitals in the district and only 4 of them have labor and delivery services. Pregnant women who have to travel more than 40 miles to give birth are at a higher risk of complications. Women in rural communities deserve to have access to proper gynecological and labor delivery services. Rural and underserved communities like ours are in desperate need of a representative who understands their struggles and will fight for the resources they need. Living in a rural community should not be a barrier to getting the healthcare you and your family deserve. When I go to Congress I wont waste my time on political stunts, instead I will work to support rural and underfunded hospitals to ensure better access to women's healthcare, specifically labor and delivery services. I’m running not only to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, not only to uplift the women of Northwest Georgia, but because I want to show mothers and families everywhere that we deserve resources and respect from our representatives. = Let's keep fighting for our rural communities,Holly McCormack. | | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Adopt a Philadelphia voter to help Malcolm win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
When each of these voters goes to the poll and looks at their ballot, they'll see Malcolm's name in BIG letters
#

Friend —
There are 798,365 registered Democrats in Philadelphia County, Pennsylvania's largest county.
If Malcolm is going to win this primary in two months and go on to secure our Democratic majority in November, we need to get as many of these voters to the polls as possible.
Why? Because when each of these voters goes to the poll and looks at their ballot, they'll see Malcolm's name in BIG letters right next to the name of their own county.
Even if they've never heard of Malcolm, they're more likely to pick their hometown's candidate over anyone else. So we need to make sure we get as many Philadelphia voters to the poll as possible on Election Day.
So today, we want to ask you to adopt ONE voter in Philadelphia County. Just one, and we'll turn them out to vote thanks to the donation you make today.
Because when everyone chips in, it all adds up. That’s how we turn out more votes for Malcolm, and that's how we win!
[Can you please contribute $10 — or whatever you can afford — and we’ll put it to work turning out voters in Philadelphia County? It all adds up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42809928/334440171/-358086307?refcode2=9be3b465-96a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220310-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmUzYjQ2NS05NmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKHoccddv--jmzxLA-xfVBPpFJzszoncIxqnBU_-kio=)

name: Sean Naron
subject: Nice to meet you, team!
body:
I'm Sean Naron, Tom's communications director, and I couldn't be more excited to join Team Tom.
#

Hi team,

Nice to meet you! I'm Sean Naron, Tom's communications director, and I couldn't be more excited to join Team Tom.

It's my job to help share Tom's vision for the future of Maryland and make sure voters know what's at stake in this next election. I hate to say it, but we're _running short on time_ to make a difference before the primary.

Candidates on both sides of the aisle are already trying to sway Maryland voters, **and we can't afford to wait for our turn.**

**_[That's why we're setting a $12,500 mid-month goal to make sure we have the resources necessary to implement our comms strategy and get Tom in front of voters ahead of the primary. name: Primary Sinema
subject: Arizonans vs. Sinema on drug pricing reform

Peter, Lowering the cost of prescriptions is so popular that many politicians run on promises to fix it. One such politician? Kyrsten Sinema, who made drug prices the centerpiece of her last election campaign. But if you know Sinema, well.... You know she hasn't governed how she campaigned. She's done everything in her power to BLOCK efforts to lower drug prices. In fact, she's been deep in Big Pharma's pockets. How deep? Well, Center Forward — a dark money group funded by the powerful drug lobby Pharmaceutical Research and Manufacturers of America (PhRMA) — spent $1.2 million since September 2021 to build up support for Senator Sinema. It's no coincidence that at the same time Big Pharma has been spending money on Sinema's behalf, she was blocking President Biden's signature legislation that would lower drug prices. If we want to give Congress a fighting chance at passing drug pricing reforms before the midterms, we need to put the pressure on Sinema _now_. **[Chip in $5 today and help us send a clear message to her: If you don't listen to your constituents and vote for drug pricing reform, we'll make sure you lose your job.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSdn-h9x1VxFA3pQIZ_mJ8sNRAcBNPbboiQ3IasYkIDU6qleTTk7zPE0UVzHojLWxEVEUzruN86lI2glbuVCEqPIbBQNYA0RvYVExbfb6-omJaF5kFC-w3TLZP512x9MEvFEmu_gTdX-I1XA-2GkfbwFMhF7USiPxJk9HqdBHyFhqd8xD4EXZWzj4MvEjWxevVNCbvlt2hqw2_9uwTg0cNCMaV51rwFZGDg_nhzZTzzjwnmGSAsWQGmRwila_aCTfmAt3WZ16imPTHXS_vUb7f-BMu_YHNtdjoEfoO0mXb49WhO1gLvd4TC3iuEY2XueJILZxJB5opog13HMelvneV-mXAzHc7xDKlLAbYjYsvUgU/3k8/7rvI_F4vRw2HByVssBNroA/h1/c0DJN7e-yEF-KviiACdKSqV9mkB2-2M7AZJmOspfq7w)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSdn-h9x1VxFA3pQIZ_mJ8sNRAcBNPbboiQ3IasYkIDU4r5ZRhbGZZLxCdBPjVNF3w_4zeHt0A6uDthCf1SnWJdDqUFj21SLJ7TxCChY-MkRcEz4Y1_EbJ21f21s1VVwayni10xRbE85WpNQeiEYsXWAYTGLsghRHE2MhUtFJAfA0Q6BMxmD_Msz_r777_Sl-b66vGOoM-XjxTPRbIyk6t5TQAsTc2LkNA9GHnhYZ7BdXSWDzCdtskwQ2tVyoJG6EmEQzya3DcMJ5xHsKcuYMQCCmL9MpnpqI2H9qI4x4tP7BFZD5znzR9t5BpoR-gtha0rUh0s3K6HhZGhJdsUfwYNoISCvmn30IPIO_iaGD8Ui4/3k8/7rvI_F4vRw2HByVssBNroA/h2/xnH1L0IzZIYbAmi_XHn-rFdTm9EA-HyXvQwyD2O5-1I)** President Biden called out drug pricing reform as a priority in his State of the Union address last week. With drug pricing reform legislation making its way front and center, we expect that Sinema will continue obstructing her Democratic colleagues’ agenda on Big Pharma's behalf. We can't stand on the sidelines to wait to find out. This is a chance to enact key policies like steep taxes on companies that gouge drug prices, and caps on out-of-pocket drug costs and insulin co-pays for Medicare beneficiaries. **We need to make sure Kyrsten Sinema doesn't betray us again to protect Big Pharma's bottom line.** That's why we need to put pressure on her today, and disallow her from obstructing this again. **[Please chip in $5 to the Primary Sinema Project right now and tell Kyrsten Sinema: Listen to us, not special interests. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: New Free Online Course: "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb6hi4ddqrtnlbrv9mb31ot2kjt6r75qi1k6qdvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjim8ob0cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tjjctgr1d31cco66orhedim3c9jc9r38plie6pb3d336hjmadtlcli32tdmc9oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphimiqr1pti61j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjq0lj2ohj53902a95p3bq157cfeogleo9584dho_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjim8ob0cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9je6nj8h8kq1c2q4cr12hm8fuc4pb2nf4d2mo08_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjim8ob0cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrspds5kf3fnjaud09rv1bcr80c89b04etar89q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cjim8ob0cdh2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: minimum wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Re: the ridiculousness that is having a $7.25 minimum wage in the year 2022.
#
Derek,
Earlier this week, our team shared some 🔥 tweets from John about the minimum wage (and his former mullet).
But the point of that email wasn’t about tweets or hair — _it was about the urgent need to raise the minimum wage._
In the year 2022, there is no reason that a single mother working 40 hours a week should live with their child in poverty. It’s past time to raise the minimum wage, Derek.
**[Can you add your name to our petition demanding that Congress raise the minimum wage up from $7.25/hr right now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220310-4919&t=1&akid=4919%2E434096%2EX6lHLM)**
**[Sign Now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220310-4919&t=2&akid=4919%2E434096%2EX6lHLM)**
Thanks for sharing your voice on this important issue, Derek.
—Team Fetterman
P.S. In case you missed the mullet pic, here it is again. 😂
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/living-wage-email/?source=em20220310-4919&t=3&akid=4919%2E434096%2EX6lHLM)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220310-4919-footer&t=4&refcode2=4919_434096_X6lHLM&akid=4919%2E434096%2EX6lHLM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Maggie Hassan HQ
subject: This will only take a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831513/334491910/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CofvocVLNeUOg1vv3N9qyVWj7OE0KSGj9q7LopqTKZM=)
Team — We know that this isn't the first time you're hearing from us, so we want to take a moment to explain why this race here in the Granite State is so important. You see, Senator Hassan doesn't like to send emails asking for money. Her focus is — and always has been — fighting on behalf of families like yours.

Senator Hassan is working across the aisle to expand economic opportunity, support small businesses, and keep America safe, secure, and free.

**But she can only continue making progress if we do everything we can to defend this seat in November. We know that Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country, and the GOP will stop at nothing to buy this seat, and with it, the Senate majority.**
**[_So, we're asking you, team. [**This is a huge moment for her campaign, Peter. With stakes this high, we can’t afford to take anything for granted. We need grassroots supporters like you to step up and chip in, Peter. [**So, I’m asking: Can I count on you to chip in $5 right away to help Liz Mathis win their race and protect our Democratic House majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810504/334442809/-1969271810?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.10_b1_spm_all-nd&refcode2=db493632-99a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ5MzYzMi05OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WObMbHRZUv3aAAznoTBwdNKDcHG5Ke-XG0TyDIbwQU=)

One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairman of the DCCC is getting to know the incredible candidates from around the country.

Peter, Liz Mathis is running a people-powered campaign in IA-02, so she is relying on grassroots supporters like you to chip in what you can. [**Will you rush a donation of $5 right away to help her flip this seat from red to blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810505/334442810/-1969271810?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.10_b1_spm_all-nd&refcode2=db493632-99a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ5MzYzMi05OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WObMbHRZUv3aAAznoTBwdNKDcHG5Ke-XG0TyDIbwQU=) Thank you for everything you do,

Sean Patrick Maloney [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42810506/334442811/-1969271810?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.10_b1_spm_all-nd&refcode2=db493632-99a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjQ5MzYzMi05OWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WObMbHRZUv3aAAznoTBwdNKDcHG5Ke-XG0TyDIbwQU=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Assembly Republican Leader James Gallagher Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
| | |
---
| | | “The very policies Rob Bonta championed in the legislature have led to the terrible crime wave we are now experiencing. It’s simple: when there is no accountability for crime, the criminals run rampant. It’s time for a new leader to bring stability to California’s top law enforcement position, and Nathan Hochman is the right man for the job. During the course of his incredible legal career, Nathan has made a reputation for standing up for victims’ rights, vociferously backing strong law and order policies, and punishing violent offenders to the fullest extent of the law. Nathan has the qualifications and capabilities to faithfully carry out the responsibilities of the Attorney General for all Californians.” **-Assembly Republican Leader James Gallagher**
---
| Welcome to the team, Assembly Republican Leader Gallagher!

Leader Gallagher has been a fierce and effective legislator in Sacramento. His efforts to hold Gavin Newsom and other Sacramento Democrats accountable have been critical to restoring balance and ensuring the rule of law.
---
|
---
| As your next Attorney General, I will likewise bring balance to Sacramento and restore the Department of Justice's focus on public safety and security.

Unlike the current Attorney General, I will not govern with politics as the priority. I will always do what is needed to protect our communities, neighborhoods, families, and businesses.

I am thankful to have Assembly Republican Leader Gallagher by my side in this fight. He joins Assemblymembers Waldron, Voepel, Choi, Nguyen, Chen, Lackey, Smith, and Flora on our march to victory on election night.

Onward!

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |
---

subject: really exciting update from Iowa!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Moments ago, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate!
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter – I'm emailing to share an exciting update with you about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley: **moments ago, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate! **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831711/334492744/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk753-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQ5ZWJjZC1jM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vh5rbFXPkLSGLeCqS1Io_AAYgGi5Di3L_vuUfkMiCPc=)
**[**During this critical moment, we've set a 24-hour goal to raise $10,000. If you're with me to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority, please rush $5 right now to help us flip this seat blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831712/334492745/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk753-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQ5ZWJjZC1jM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vh5rbFXPkLSGLeCqS1Io_AAYgGi5Di3L_vuUfkMiCPc=)**
Now that we've officially made it onto the ballot – all thanks to grassroots supporters like you – I wanted to take a quick step back to talk about what's at stake here in Iowa and what's ahead for our campaign.
You see, Sen. Grassley has spent the last 47 years in Washington pushing his extremist agenda and failing families back here in Iowa. He's voted against affordable health care, against protections for unions, against our right to choose and against working-class families like mine. **We must defeat him to give Iowa the leader it deserves and expand our Senate majority so that we can truly deliver for American families.**
Thankfully, this year, we have an incredible opportunity to do just that. Iowans are fed up with Sen. Grassley's failed leadership and his far-right agenda. Voters here are turning against him like never before: **h****e's facing record-low approval ratings, and experts at The Hill are calling this a "tough race" for him**.

As I’ve traveled across the state, I’ve seen how vulnerable he is firsthand. The momentum is building, and we have a real chance at retiring Chuck Grassley this November.
Peter, we are building a movement, and I know that we can flip this seat blue and finally show Sen. Grassley the door with you on our team. But we have to keep the grassroots pressure up – **Republicans have $41.6 MILLION in the bank to take back the Senate and defeat challengers like me.** We've got to be ready to counter GOP spending and far-right attacks.
Now that we're officially on the ballot, we've entered a critical stage of this campaign. The work we do in the months ahead will determine who wins and who loses on Election Day.** I just checked the numbers for our 24-hour goal, and we're still short of where we need to be!! [I know you care about what this campaign is doing for Iowa, so please, before our 11:59 p.m. deadline, can you rush $5 to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and elect real leadership for Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831713/334492746/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk753-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQ5ZWJjZC1jM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vh5rbFXPkLSGLeCqS1Io_AAYgGi5Di3L_vuUfkMiCPc=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831714/334492747/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk753-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQ5ZWJjZC1jM2EwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vh5rbFXPkLSGLeCqS1Io_AAYgGi5Di3L_vuUfkMiCPc=)

clean_body: Moments ago, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate! | | | Hi there, Peter – I'm emailing to share an exciting update with you about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley: moments ago, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate! = = Now that we've officially made it onto the ballot – all thanks to grassroots supporters like you – I wanted to take a quick step back to talk about what's at stake here in Iowa and what's ahead for our campaign. You see, Sen. Grassley has spent the last 47 years in Washington pushing his extremist agenda and failing families back here in Iowa. He's voted against affordable health care, against protections for unions, against our right to choose and against working-class families like mine. We must defeat him to give Iowa the leader it deserves and expand our Senate majority so that we can truly deliver for American families. Thankfully, this year, we have an incredible opportunity to do just that. Iowans are fed up with Sen. Grassley's failed leadership and his far-right agenda. Voters here are turning against him like never before: he's facing record-low approval ratings, and experts at The Hill are calling this a "tough race" for him. As I’ve traveled across the state, I’ve seen how vulnerable he is firsthand. The momentum is building, and we have a real chance at retiring Chuck Grassley this November. Peter, we are building a movement, and I know that we can flip this seat blue and finally show Sen. Grassley the door with you on our team. But we have to keep the grassroots pressure up – Republicans have $41.6 MILLION in the bank to take back the Senate and defeat challengers like me. We've got to be ready to counter GOP spending and far-right attacks. Now that we're officially on the ballot, we've entered a critical stage of this campaign. The work we do in the months ahead will determine who wins and who loses on Election Day. I just checked the numbers for our 24-hour goal, and we're still short of where we need to be!! = | | = Thank you for everything that you've done to support our campaign. I'm so, so grateful to have you on my team. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Matt offers real solutions, whether it's to rising prices, or rising crime, to get Ohio and America back on the right track. Matt has spent his career as a public servant, first as a prosecutor and now as a state legislator, providing law enforcement with the funding and resources they need to put drug dealers and human traffickers behind bars. Throughout my time as Attorney General of Ohio, and as a county prosecutor, I saw firsthand the difference between elected officials who understand what it takes to fix a problem, and those who pander with platitudes. Matt is a tireless fighter for the rule of law and those who work every day to uphold it and keep Ohioans safe. **[Matt Dolan will make an excellent United States Senator for the great state of Ohio, and it is my honor and privilege to endorse him.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=204f1d054cce4aa28e069d2493ba4a93&_e=KJPB9yUncUg8nXm2ACwWdTNeFZFzzE79ZIs26k1thF0_DXbeOa1JWJMiV9ME_Axulixug5TGm5TuLl_Qe5o5gFfMJ8jeie2ZCusj0rOHoMKpsrGRqTRIVwVc2PnNm-PcOksoT_-tlW1uM2zrZF-FanNzl_qZFWSpS5R8cQd8GWDL2qwBDWAFZ1mn4OnFgn-Z5p7JhwnwzMDw3J07WIUIX2zD0WDB4ZqELAQM6-mzvtzHXSMKbhKNozEmeLPQMyj2F4lwKLSMzAMN5w9Xicg1j-hZuvqQheLWWaTJEzppu3eEuOuMlPzNzY3cl_ibRJYH) ** Betty Montgomery _45th Ohio Attorney General, 30th Ohio State Auditor, former State Senator, former Wood County Prosecutor_ [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=204f1d054cce4aa28e069d2493ba4a93&_e=KJPB9yUncUg8nXm2ACwWdTNeFZFzzE79ZIs26k1thF0_DXbeOa1JWJMiV9ME_Axulixug5TGm5TuLl_Qe5o5gFfMJ8jeie2ZCusj0rOHoMIn9r7NxtEyLLbiD131f45jtbgjzhpC8hmI7rk0PPZz3BzQgN_n4r-CpMJUx7ne_1RwdqItPe-SIZKwz5-4Ii2zZJ-Vf_hKxKZddrZmyK3ZZqXjsTyCkUgmpix6qLWQreeU7c92y_W75S76LsoI2VXejEYLSMOpZky3DL1NKsmtR2YU010OBnqtFu9VArQGaHVV2QVcXsyqKfVKybCa8WbH) [**Join Me In Supporting Matt >> Make A Donation NOW**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_m=204f1d054cce4aa28e069d2493ba4a93&_e=KJPB9yUncUg8nXm2ACwWdTNeFZFzzE79ZIs26k1thF0_DXbeOa1JWJMiV9ME_Axulixug5TGm5TuLl_Qe5o5gFfMJ8jeie2ZCusj0rOHoMLCr1NaaRMe-O1dx58aZaspLxgpJjik-px0amoP4rc8SVQvkmIaZ9Y68PvN1VhNFqhPHpNST-8W1KbLfVrOviAyJ-hUAr2cqSh9B3bgw2mqosDo6UWBq0qYyWgUsBM882sQ-2ymKcYvz-5k75SptynnG39fskFC_FQ3klqxKGYYMNnSwp5CoXIjtoBPLLydIt5jHoJvmTqSxMN0oka96yqt) P.S. clean_body: My friend, Ohio’s U.S. Senate Race has the potential to impact the direction of our nation. That’s why so many members of Ohio’s law enforcement community are stepping up to back Matt Dolan Simply put, our country is failing far too many Americans right now, and the stakes could not be higher. Desperate times call for serious solutions, and we need real leaders to meet the challenges of this moment. I am proud to endorse Matt Dolan as Ohio’s next U.S. Senator because I know he has what it takes to get results for our state and win in November. Matt offers real solutions, whether it's to rising prices, or rising crime, to get Ohio and America back on the right track. Matt has spent his career as a public servant, first as a prosecutor and now as a state legislator, providing law enforcement with the funding and resources they need to put drug dealers and human traffickers behind bars. Throughout my time as Attorney General of Ohio, and as a county prosecutor, I saw firsthand the difference between elected officials who understand what it takes to fix a problem, and those who pander with platitudes. Matt is a tireless fighter for the rule of law and those who work every day to uphold it and keep Ohioans safe. Betty Montgomery 45th Ohio Attorney General, 30th Ohio State Auditor, former State Senator, former Wood County Prosecutor P.S. We need leaders with honor, experience and integrity. We need Matt Dolan in the U.S. Senate fighting for all Ohioans.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Rana Abdelhamid
body:
The difference between Rana and her opponent could not be more clear.
#
Peter,
Almost one year has passed since Rana Abdelhamid launched her campaign for Congress, and Justice Democrats have been behind her since day 1.
The daughter of working-class Egyptian immigrants, Rana knows the pain caused by rising rents, gentrification, and a system that benefits landlords and developers over working-class people. Rana is running a community-centered campaign. That is why she has the support of local organizers, community leaders, the Working Families Party, and Justice Democrats.
The difference between Rana and her opponent could not be more clear. Carolyn Maloney is backed by real estate developers, Wall Street CEOs, and has represented New York in Congress for as long as Rana’s been alive.
New Yorkers are hungry for change, Peter, but in order for Rana to defeat the status quo in June, she needs your help to power her campaign during these critical months. **[Split a contribution between Rana’s campaign and Justice Democrats to help us defeat the establishment in NY-12.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97541?refcode=em20220310-22337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm)**
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97541?refcode=em20220310-22337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm)
Justice Democrats identified NY-12 as a key district to turn solidly progressive in 2022. Like many incumbents, Maloney’s positions in Congress don’t reflect the working-class people that she represents.
That is why JD helped elect New York Congresspeople Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Jamaal Bowman, and why with your help we will send Rana Abdelhamid to join them. [Make a contribution to power Rana’s campaign through the primary. In order to win, we need to out-organize, out-canvass, and out-phonebank our opponents. ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97541?refcode=em20220310-22337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97541?refcode=em20220310-22337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=22337%2E1203867%2EPEcLNm) and your state public health department.
---

name: Brandon Mosely
subject: I am suspending my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P
body:
All I can say is “thank you.”

|
---
**Public School Teacher & Pastor Brandon Mosely Suspends Campaign in the 41st Congressional District Race** Menifee, CA – Today, public school teacher, pastor, and non-profit director, Brandon Mosely, announced that he was suspending his campaign for the 41st Congressional District against incumbent Congressman Ken Calvert.

Mosely released the following statement:

"I stepped up to run for Congress to be a voice for everyday people in the Inland Empire who are struggling to access good-paying jobs, quality health care, affordable childcare and housing, and higher education opportunities that won’t leave them with mountains of debt. I ran for people like my mother, who worked day in and day out as a public school bus driver with the hope of her son having more opportunities than she did.

“Over the past year, I have had the honor to speak with thousands of residents across the Inland Empire: single working moms who can't afford childcare, school teachers trying to navigate remote learning, nurses on the frontlines of the pandemic caring for patients, union workers looking for steady work, and many more."

Mosely continued:

“For the past 30 years in Congress, the voters in this region have had an absence in representation from Ken Calvert. Instead of helping families get ahead, his only focus has been serving the interests of his corporate campaign contributors. The people of Riverside County deserve so much more, which is why after thoughtful consideration, I have decided to withdraw my candidacy from the 41st Congressional District race. The recent entry of right-wing Republican State Senator Melissa Melendez into the race has resulted in the real possibility of two Republicans advancing to the general election in November. The stakes are too high for our region— and our democracy— to let that happen.

“I’m humbled by the outpouring of support that our campaign for real working-class representation received. To the thousands of contributors who chipped in a few dollars at a time and to the over 25 local elected officials, organizations and community leaders in Riverside County that endorsed our campaign, all I can say is “thank you.” Please know that the work we started has only just begun. As a public school teacher and pastor in the Inland Empire, I'll continue to fight every day to give working people in our communities the opportunities and fair shot they deserve.”

Sincerely,
Brandon Mosely

clean_body: All I can say is “thank you.” | Public School Teacher & Pastor Brandon Mosely Suspends Campaign in the 41st Congressional District Race Menifee, CA – Today, public school teacher, pastor, and non-profit director, Brandon Mosely, announced that he was suspending his campaign for the 41st Congressional District against incumbent Congressman Ken Calvert. Mosely released the following statement: "I stepped up to run for Congress to be a voice for everyday people in the Inland Empire who are struggling to access good-paying jobs, quality health care, affordable childcare and housing, and higher education opportunities that won’t leave them with mountains of debt. I ran for people like my mother, who worked day in and day out as a public school bus driver with the hope of her son having more opportunities than she did. “Over the past year, I have had the honor to speak with thousands of residents across the Inland Empire: single working moms who can't afford childcare, school teachers trying to navigate remote learning, nurses on the frontlines of the pandemic caring for patients, union workers looking for steady work, and many more." Mosely continued: “For the past 30 years in Congress, the voters in this region have had an absence in representation from Ken Calvert. Instead of helping families get ahead, his only focus has been serving the interests of his corporate campaign contributors. The people of Riverside County deserve so much more, which is why after thoughtful consideration, I have decided to withdraw my candidacy from the 41st Congressional District race. The recent entry of right-wing Republican State Senator Melissa Melendez into the race has resulted in the real possibility of two Republicans advancing to the general election in November. The stakes are too high for our region— and our democracy— to let that happen. “I’m humbled by the outpouring of support that our campaign for real working-class representation received. To the thousands of contributors who chipped in a few dollars at a time and to the over 25 local elected officials, organizations and community leaders in Riverside County that endorsed our campaign, all I can say is “thank you.” Please know that the work we started has only just begun. As a public school teacher and pastor in the Inland Empire, I'll continue to fight every day to give working people in our communities the opportunities and fair shot they deserve.” Sincerely, Brandon Mosely | | Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P.O. Box 1495, Romoland, CA 92585 www.brandonmosely.com Brandon Mosely is a husband, a father, an educator, a pastor, and a community leader. I can't fund my own campaign like Dr. Oz, who's poured millions of his fortune into plastering his ads on TVs across Pennsylvania. I rely on donors like you, and I don't take a single dollar for granted. Thank you for helping us get our first ad on the air, and thank you for believing in this campaign.

As you know, I've won tough races before. I've gone up against tens of millions in Republican attack ads. During each of my races, Trump came to my district to campaign for my opponent. But I'm still here. That's because I know what it takes to win in Pennsylvania.

All that said, winning takes more than hard work and hustle. When you're going up against a hedge fund manager or a reality TV star, **you need money to get ads on the air, and keep them on air.**

With your help, we've gotten our first ad up, but now we have to plan ahead and figure out if we can afford to stay on TV long enough to connect with voters and win this election.

name: Christy Smith
subject: More moms, less millionaires in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42833380/334499800/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjEyOTQxNi1jYWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5172BJuyCuW9qBx5Y7v51Fok-WlBLa1xqnYXIeR9u6Q=&emci=378570d9-c3a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3b129416-caa0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

I want to talk about an issue that's personal to me and so many people I talk with on a daily basis.

I had my first daughter while working in DC at the Department of Education during the Clinton Administration. Faced with complications during pregnancy, and a lack of affordable childcare options, I made the decision to be a stay-at-home mom for several years before going back into the workforce.

While I loved being a stay-at-home mom and wouldn't trade it for the world, **deciding between creating a loving home for my children, and pursuing financial stability and a career of my dreams is a choice I shouldn't have been forced to make.**

Lack of affordable childcare puts so many women and caregivers in an impossible situation, scrambling to cover the sky-high costs of childcare and the basics like rent, food, and health care. It's one of the biggest barriers for women achieving their personal, political, and financial dreams. And it should be one of our top political priorities.

**[As your next representative, I vow to make affordable childcare a top priority. clean_body: | Peter, I want to talk about an issue that's personal to me and so many people I talk with on a daily basis. I had my first daughter while working in DC at the Department of Education during the Clinton Administration. Faced with complications during pregnancy, and a lack of affordable childcare options, I made the decision to be a stay-at-home mom for several years before going back into the workforce. While I loved being a stay-at-home mom and wouldn't trade it for the world, deciding between creating a loving home for my children, and pursuing financial stability and a career of my dreams is a choice I shouldn't have been forced to make. Lack of affordable childcare puts so many women and caregivers in an impossible situation, scrambling to cover the sky-high costs of childcare and the basics like rent, food, and health care. It's one of the biggest barriers for women achieving their personal, political, and financial dreams. And it should be one of our top political priorities. = = It doesn't have to be this way. We know that quality, early-childhood education sets kids up for success -- and saves taxpayers money in the long run. We know that accessible childcare levels the playing field for working moms and is good for the economy. And we know the reason why Congress hasn't tackled this issue: We send too many millionaires and too few working parents to Washington. That needs to change. We need more women in Congress who understand the real struggles of juggling parenting, work, paying bills, and putting food on the table. = = = Together, we will level the playing field for women and working families across the country. – Christy *

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Beto wants to give you a call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Chip in any amount and you might just get a call from Beto himself.
#
We are blown away by the overwhelming support that we’ve seen since Beto officially launched his campaign on November 15th. The momentum has really been increasing, and it’s all thanks to our supporters.
Beto is so grateful to everyone on this team, including you. **So for the next few weeks, he’s making it a goal to call grassroots donors whenever we have a moment on the road.**
[Chip in what you can and add your name to the list of grassroots donors that Beto will be calling supporters from. (If you see a number you don’t recognize pop up, it might be him!)](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53889?refcode=ema20220310-179807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53889?refcode=ema20220310-179807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)**
Let me tell you why grassroots donations are so meaningful to our work.
Greg Abbott has corporate CEOs writing him one million-dollar checks. Not Beto. We don’t take cash from corporate PACs, and the vast majority of contributions that power our campaign are less than $200. This is truly powered by people.
Thanks to our amazing supporters, Beto has already been able to travel to every part of Texas, and our team has hit historic milestones like contacting more than 4 million Texas voters in just 28 days. We’re truly building the biggest and best organizing program this state has ever seen.**
**
**Beto wants to personally thank his grassroots donors for making it all possible.** That’s why he’ll be calling as many as he can in the weeks ahead.
[ Chip in any amount now to add your name to our list of supporters, and you might just get a phone call from Beto. He’d love to talk to you. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53889?refcode=ema20220310-179807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)
Anything you can pitch in today brings us one step closer to defeating Abbott and delivering for the people of Texas.
Thank you,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220310-179807-footer&t=22&refcode2=179807_444211_c2lQFn&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=179807%2E444211%2Ec2lQFn)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Can you feel how worried they are getting?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The media is scared. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cb3abf0d2c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | _“And because it’s so horrific, it’s tempting to simply assume that in practice, there’s no way that someone as extreme as Finchem could win statewide office. But Arizona, a purple state whose GOP often swings far to the right, continues to throw political curveballs, and it is naïve to assume he simply has no chance.”_
Dear ,
The more the media hates me, the more you know they are scared. They want to paint me as a “radical,” a “far-right nutjob,” and a “conspiracy theorist.” One thing they didn’t count on is that I have the evidence that the election was stolen.

**They want to paint me as fringe, a lie-spewing Trump acolyte, an agent of manipulation, a curse upon our Democracy.**

Can you feel it?

Can you feel how worried they are getting? It is not the motivation of the Left to give platform to those who are ACTUALLY fringe, to those who are on the extreme right, to those who do actually believe in conspiracy theories.

**It is their motivation to slander, assault, and demean everyone who runs counter to their narrative as radical liars. This is a smear campaign at its worst.**

My name is Mark Finchem and I am the candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona leading the vanguard in the fight for Election Integrity. Both in the state and nationwide, [I am pushing for currency-grade watermarked ballots, election audits, and accountability for those who allowed and enabled election fraud in the first place!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=004e0faf80&e=44b8c466b0)

**And I have been put on blast weekly by the lying main-stream media for my attempts to set the record straight on 2020 and to make sure that Arizona becomes the gold standard of Election Integrity in 2022.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=715abcb240&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Truthout_ “reports” in its attack against me:

_Trump’s hope, it seems, is to do an end-run in 2024 around the various institutional protections that foiled his coup efforts in 2020._

_What’s happening in Arizona is a case study in the Trumpite effort to subvert the democratic system. Arizona is one of the five key swing states that went to Joe Biden last time around, and Trump hasn’t forgiven Republican state officials for not intervening on his behalf to somehow erase the Democratic margins there. Now, he’s trying to secure the election, this coming November, of Mark Finchem as secretary of state._

_Finchem, a state legislator from the Tucson suburbs, is a far right conspiracist who completely buys into Trump’s lies about a stolen election. He is on record as saying that tens of thousands of undocumented immigrants voted in Arizona, despite no evidence surfacing to back up these claims. And, notwithstanding the implosion of the so-called “audit” of Maricopa County’s election results last year, as recently as last month, Finchem was telling anyone who would listen that he had evidence that would lead to the decertification of the results from three Arizona counties. He also introduced a resolution into the legislature — shot down as “un-American” by the Republican speaker — to try to decertify the results of those counties._

I can’t even begin to highlight all that is wrong with this. The point is that you can tell the desperation to mark me as “crazy” or a member of the “radical right.”

**When did it become crazy or radical to want free and fair elections?

The very fact that the media is attacking me like this is proof that our plan is working.**

[**_But we desperately need to push forward to secure our elections – and we don’t have much time. It all comes down to this year._**

**_Can you help with a generous donation today to protect our elections and make America free again?_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f9a246e4d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [_Here is the thing- right now I have what may be the most important deadline of the campaign._

_We need to raise $65,000 before March 31 so I can show the media that their attacks on me don't work. Will you help me?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=563d160d7a&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4b7e499a3b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=96d0a7489e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d6dffa8e2b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d6dffa8e2b).
---

Friend,

clean_body: We have to make sure every voter sees this. | Peter, This is our campaign’s most successful ad: We’ve seen an overwhelmingly positive response since we launched it, and it’s proving to be extremely effective at winning over undecided voters. That’s why we want to make sure every swing voter in our district sees it. My team estimates that it costs, on average, $4.23 to get this ad before each of the 70,000 key voters they’ve identified. That means we need to raise $296,100 for our Ad Fund before Election Day, and to stay on track, we need to raise $50,000 of that total this quarter. I know this plan may seem ambitious, Peter. But I’m confident that we have the grassroots support to pull it off – and I’m absolutely certain the investment will be worth it on Election Day. We have a winning message, and the Democrats’ only path to victory is to spend big to distort our record and mislead the American people. If we can cut through their lies and propaganda to get our message directly to voters, they won’t stand a chance in November.We’ll win in a landslide. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

subject: When will Congress stand up for YOU?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
America is their lowest priority. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066217?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=292df0c306&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Our country is falling apart at the seams.

_At least 64% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck._

Gas prices are continuing to climb.

Groceries cost more than ever.

Crime is out of control. Our cities are no longer safe, even in broad daylight.

Millions of strangers are pouring across our border, and they’re bringing drugs and crime.

Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death for Americans aged 18-45. More than homicide, suicide, even car accidents.

Tens of thousands of Americans are suffering from adverse reactions to their mandated COVID injections.

_And now, our “leaders” are actively trying to involve our nation in another potentially devastating European war—one that may well turn into World War 3._

Instead of standing up for American citizens, our politicians are standing with foreign countries where we have no interests.

Just this week, Congress gave Ukraine $14 BILLION.

**This is the same Congress—Republican and Democrat—that refused to give a single penny to build a Border Wall.**

The same Congress that took **months** to decide on a measly $1,400 stimulus check for the people whose livelihoods the COVID mandates destroyed.

_The same Congress which pours our wealth down the drain every single day for every single special interest and foreign country on earth,**_EXCEPT_** the one interest they were elected to protect: You. Me. The American people._

It’s time to say goodbye to the rat’s nest of traitors that is the D.C. Swamp.

**It’s time to put America First.**

**America Always.**

**America ONLY.**

**[_Send a FIGHTER like me to D.C._

_Punish the Democrats' RINO Lackeys by throwing them out on their rear ends so we can finally take our nation back._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0c7053efe6&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=18e5ef6940&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=384d320076&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5e0b795b1f&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
