name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: It's official. We're on the ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Will Lisa Scheller ever have a debate? | | | |
---
| | |
# **Thank you volunteers!**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Last Tuesday, our campaign filed 118 pages of petitions with more than 1,600 signatures to get on the primary ballot. We were the first Republican House campaign to file in Pennsylvania, and our team of volunteers is still collecting signatures. Next week, we will deliver another batch of petitions to top off our total and complete the nomination process.

This amazing effort is a testament to the great work and incredible dedication of our volunteers. Thank you to everyone who signed and circulated petitions. It is an honor to serve with all of you.

On another matter, I am disappointed to report that Lisa Scheller is once again dragging her feet on debates. Last week, after being prodded by local voters, Lisa agreed to participate in a debate hosted by the Northampton County Republican Committee. However, Lisa rejected all four of the dates proposed by the Committee and instead submitted a list of demands that included the terms of the debate and the subjects that could be discussed. She did not want questions about pro-life issues or Afghanistan. The Committee rejected Lisa's demands and is still negotiating with her campaign.

To be honest, I'm tired of talking about this. I can't believe we are eleven weeks away from the primary election and just a few weeks away from the start of mail-in voting and my primary opponent is still ducking and dodging debates. We should be talking about the issues and how we are going to defeat Susan Wild. Instead, Lisa is avoiding public scrutiny and acting like she's entitled.

[Dodge, duck, dip, dive and dodge](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=5f98f8dcee&e=1090c5c412) is a funny line from a silly movie. It's not a serious strategy for an authentic candidate.

You the voters have let me know that you are fed up with this kind of political gamesmanship. And, I'm not going to let Lisa Scheller buy a seat in Congress.

KEEP AMERICA FREE!

Sincerely,

---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=09ffd81993&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| [Donate to Kevin's Campaign](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9b9bb858b3&e=1090c5c412 "Donate to Kevin's Campaign")
---
|

| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f9a4d89a33&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
| | **WE ARE STILL COLLECTING SIGNATURES!**

Even though the Kevin Dellicker for Congress campaign already filed petitions, we intend to submit more signatures before next week's deadline. Here's where I'll be through Saturday. If you would like to inquire about other signing opportunities, please email: [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com). Thank you!

Thursday, 03/10: Petition Signing @ Siamsa Irish Pub
636 Main Street, Stroudsburg, PA 18360 | 7 PM

Friday, 03/11: Petition Signing and Meet & Greet @ RNC Community Center
1113 Union Boulevard, Allentown, PA 18109 | 6 PM - 8 PM

Sat., 03/12: Cornhole Tourney- Anthracite/Lansford Little League & Legion Post 123
26 East Patterson Street, Lansford, PA 18232 |

For updates, please visit our official campaign Facebook page:
[Kevin Dellicker for Congress | Facebook](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f7a8827f50&e=1090c5c412)
---
| [Volunteer](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ae020cd83e&e=1090c5c412 "Volunteer")
---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| When I appeared on WFMZ's [Business Matters](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=63893b8fb2&e=1090c5c412) earlier this year, a prominent local Democrat said that if Roe v. Wade is overturned, Democrats will turn out in droves to fight for abortions. I countered that pro-life Republicans would turn out too, meeting and exceeding any pro-abortion boost. I want to thank all the amazing pro-life advocates who are working so hard to defend unborn children. They are changing minds and making a difference. And next year, when we may have a chance to vote on the matter in Congress, they are making sure that the right Republicans will be in Washington to protect innocent lives.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c3283665c8&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| This week, I had the privilege of touring the Joint Apprenticeship and Training Center (JATC) at Local 375 of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers in Allentown. In six state-of-the-art training labs, Union Apprentices learn all the skills they need to become professional electricians. They get paid while they learn, and when they top out as Journeymen, they earn more than $80,000 a year. Did I mention that it’s all debt free? We need more people in the trades. IBEW Local 375 is developing the workforce we need to make great American products and training motivated men and women with skills that last a lifetime. Thank you IBEW Local 375 for doing your part to create good jobs with family-sustaining wages right here in the Lehigh Valley.
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ebeb6f7540&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e3c2a8499e&e=1090c5c412)
---
| On Monday, I issued a [statement](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ecf2245d79&e=1090c5c412) calling for Washington to simultaneously restrict Russian oil exports AND boost American domestic energy production. The Biden Administration did the former without doing the latter. This will add to inflation and increase the price of fuel. We cannot afford $4/gallon gas. Joe Biden and Susan Wild seem to care more about radical environmentalists than Lehigh Valley voters. Give us relief and liberate American energy producers!
---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d6831fa5c5&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---

name: Michele Rayner
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Petition to SAVE abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P
body:
This is disgusting, Peter.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42825091/334461047/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYWE3NS1hNmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDDpIJtxH5sNthvJOGVzNTNs7WY2P7uDX9Nmsx6TeXA=)
---
**_BREAKING NEWS:_** **_Florida’s unconstitutional abortion law heads to DeSantis’s desk_** Peter, I’m horrified.

**Governor Ron DeSantis is moments away from signing one of the most extremist anti-choice laws in our nation, banning abortion at just _15 weeks_ with no exceptions.**

Let me be clear: H.B. 5 is nothing but an outrageous attack on the rights of Floridians. It’s unconstitutional, unjust, and dangerous. Full stop.

In his State of the State address, Governor DeSantis referred to Florida as the “freest state in the country.”

_How can we be free when women across our state, particularly women of color, are forbidden from accessing basic health care?_

As a woman, Floridian, and pro-choice candidate for Congress, I’m appalled — **but I won’t let the GOP gut our reproductive rights without a fight.**

[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in calling on Governor DeSantis to veto this horrific bill and protect bodily autonomy for every Floridian. I've set a goal to collect 7,500 signatures before midnight tonight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42825094/334461048/-416879420?refcode=MRFC_20220310_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYWE3NS1hNmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDDpIJtxH5sNthvJOGVzNTNs7WY2P7uDX9Nmsx6TeXA=&emci=91d03164-83a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=594baa75-a6a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=34271788) | [SIGN YOUR NAME TO PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42825095/334461049/-416879420?refcode=MRFC_20220310_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYWE3NS1hNmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDDpIJtxH5sNthvJOGVzNTNs7WY2P7uDX9Nmsx6TeXA=&emci=91d03164-83a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=594baa75-a6a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=34271788)
---
I’m not giving up until our state is truly free. Peter, will you stand with me to save the constitutional right to choose?

In solidarity,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42825096/334461050/-416879420?refcode=MRFC_20220310_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYWE3NS1hNmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SDDpIJtxH5sNthvJOGVzNTNs7WY2P7uDX9Nmsx6TeXA=&emci=91d03164-83a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=594baa75-a6a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=34271788)
Michele Rayner
Democratic Candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District

clean_body: This is disgusting, Peter. | = BREAKING NEWS: Florida’s unconstitutional abortion law heads to DeSantis’s desk Peter, I’m horrified. Governor Ron DeSantis is moments away from signing one of the most extremist anti-choice laws in our nation, banning abortion at just 15 weeks with no exceptions. Let me be clear: H.B. 5 is nothing but an outrageous attack on the rights of Floridians. It’s unconstitutional, unjust, and dangerous. Full stop. In his State of the State address, Governor DeSantis referred to Florida as the “freest state in the country.” How can we be free when women across our state, particularly women of color, are forbidden from accessing basic health care? As a woman, Floridian, and pro-choice candidate for Congress, I’m appalled — but I won’t let the GOP gut our reproductive rights without a fight. | I’m not giving up until our state is truly free. Peter, will you stand with me to save the constitutional right to choose? In solidarity, Michele Rayner Democratic Candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District | | Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P.O. Box 35218, St. Petersburg, Fl 33705 www.micheleforflorida.com/ Please, consider making a =. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: My call to stop private insurance profiteering from Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week, I led a letter with Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren calling on the Health and Human Services Secretary to correct Medicare overpayments to private insurers.
#
Peter,
Last week, I led a letter with Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren calling on the Health and Human Services Secretary to correct Medicare Advantage overpayments to private insurers. It’s simple, private insurance companies should not be profiteering off of our Medicare system. And we can do something about it.
Right now, billions of Medicare dollars are going into the pockets of private insurance companies, taking away taxpayer dollars that should be applied for urgently needed medical care for our seniors and people with disabilities. This is a complete diversion from the purpose and spirit of the Medicare program.
The government can and must correct these overpayments and redistribute the funds to Medicare recipients.
[**Peter, if you’re with me in this fight to stop health care profiteering, please chip in $3 to my campaign today. We know the corporations benefiting from Medicare overpayments will try to keep the status quo we’re fighting against.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10905?refcode=em20220310-1093&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10905?refcode=em20220310-1093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)**
We must do everything we can to stop private insurance companies from taking advantage of administrative loopholes, especially when it comes to protecting and preserving Medicare funds.
Our public health coverage programs are some of our most vital public benefits programs in America — alongside benefits like Social Security. It’s critical that we ensure we’re not wasting Medicare resources with giveaways to private insurance companies. And it’s critical we use our public resources to help Medicare recipients get the care they need.
[**Will you stand with me to help stop Medicare overpayments? Chip in $3 to my campaign today to help me continue my advocacy to ensure private insurance companies aren’t profiteering off of Medicare.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10905?refcode=em20220310-1093&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)
Thanks for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10905?refcode=em20220310-1093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220310-1093-footer&t=23&refcode2=1093_420207_X0vhVT&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1093%2E420207%2EX0vhVT)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Dear Peter,
We are opening our home in support of Dr. Jason Martin’s campaign and we would love for you to attend.
Jason is running to be the next Governor of Tennessee. We are rallying support for his candidacy because our state is in desperate need of new and competent leadership. Jason has the experience, vision and heart we need to move our state forward and it will take all of us to make this happen.
Please join us for hor d'oeuvres, drinks and a conversation about the future of Tennessee and how Dr. Martin plans to lead us there.

Warmly,
Steve Sirls and Allen DeCuyper

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: re: Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Electing Peter could stop Rick Scott and Mitch McConnell from controlling the future of the country.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=128%2E61531%2EDGDKUR)
Hello,
We wanted to give you an update on our race here in Vermont, and why it’s so important we work together to elect Peter Welch to the Senate. Take a look:
**FIRST** , Peter Welch announced his progressive campaign to become Vermont’s next Senator.
**THEN** , a GOP Trump appointee who is backed by national Republicans launched a campaign for this seat.
**NOW** , Rick Scott and his well-funded National Republican Senatorial Committee are targeting Vermont as a “sleeper” state to help the GOP retake the Senate majority.
Senate Republicans want to regain power so they can obstruct our progressive agenda and put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block. Electing Peter could very well stop folks like Rick Scott and Mitch McConnell from controlling the Senate.
Look, we need a leader who knows how to get things done representing Vermont. That’s Peter, that’s how he’s served Vermonters throughout his years in public service. But in a state that just reelected a Republican governor by 41 points, we can’t take anything for granted.
That’s why we’re building a grassroots team powered by folks like you. We’re not taking any contributions from corporate PACs, so in order to fight back against Rick Scott, Mitch McConnell, and the tens of millions of dollars they have in the bank, we need this team to come together to get it done.
[**Chip in $15—or anything you can—right away to help elect Peter and keep the Senate blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1490?t=3&akid=128%2E61531%2EDGDKUR)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Jaworski?=
subject: No one — absolutely no one — is above the law
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
This is what my grandfather, Watergate special prosecutor Leon Jaworski instilled in me and I have carried it throughout my legal career. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13605294?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d5d39dc257&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , "From Watergate we learned what generations before us have known —**** our Constitution works. And during Watergate years it was interpreted again so as to reaffirm that no one — absolutely no one — is above the law." My grandfather, **Watergate special prosecutor Leon Jaworski** , spoke these words when he had the guts to take on Nixon.

**He instilled this value in me and I have carried it throughout my legal career and as Mayor of Galveston.**

We are moving on to the Democratic Primary Runoff Election and May 24th will be here before we know it. Let's make sure we do everything we can to win so that we can defeat Ken Paxton in the General Election.

It's time to send Paxton the same message my grandfather sent to Nixon:

**No one — absolutely no one — is above the law.**

[**Please donate $10 or whatever you can today to help us finish what we started 20 months ago: to restore integrity to the Office of Texas Attorney General.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=aba3d83a1f&e=5d8d80652b)

— Joe

It’s clear as day: Michael is the only candidate in the race for Colorado’s U.S. Senate seat that is truly on the side of working and middle-class families in our state. From cosponsoring a bill to cap the out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35 a month, to protecting Coloradans from surprise medical bills, and marshaling a historic investment to repair Colorado’s roads and bridges that will create jobs, Michael is fighting to make real improvements in the lives of families. Meanwhile, Michael is up against a slate of wealthy opponents, including two who recently emptied $1 million into their own campaigns instead of generating grassroots support. One has already spent $250,000 to flood Colorado’s airwaves, spending on an ad attacking Michael and his record. We don’t expect him to slow down any time soon. And with the _Cook Political Report_ downgrading Michael’s race closer to a toss-up we need to get out on the offensive on Michael’s record so he can keep fighting for Colorado families in the Senate. **Will ****you pitch in $10 to defend Michael’s seat and keep Colorado blue? name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Erica needs your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

A lot has
happened over the past few weeks, so we wanted to give you an update on
the state of our race.

FIRST: The North Carolina Supreme Court rejected the GOP’s attempt to
racially gerrymander our district and ordered new maps to be drawn.

THEN: The new district lines were finalized. Our new district, NC-01,
includes more Democrats — making our race a must-win to keep control of
the U.S. House.

NOW: With less than 70 days until primary election day, we must ramp up
our campaign to send Erica to Congress.

It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots-funded movement to organize and
mobilize folks across the 19 counties that make up our district. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43831?refcode=em20220310-974&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke ]So
please, will you donate
$5 or anything you can to help us rally supporters, reach
voters, and share Erica’s vision for a North Carolina that works for all
of us.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43831?refcode=em20220310-974&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1042&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke ]Donate $5

The stakes couldn’t be higher. Republicans need to win just five seats
to take back the House majority, so we absolutely must win this open and
competitive seat.

North Carolina’s 1st District is Erica’s home. This is her community. And
as a three-term state senator who represented more than half of this
district, she’s never lost an election here. Erica is our best chance to
defend this seat — but it’s going to take all of us to win.

The resources we raise right now will help us open a campaign office, hire
more campaign staff, dictate the reach of our organizing program, and
ultimately, determine whether we’ll be powerful enough to win the primary
and beat a Republican in the general election.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43831?refcode=em20220310-974&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1043&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke ]We can’t emphasize enough how much it would help us if you chip in
$5 or anything you can. Every dollar goes toward building
the campaign it’ll take to elect Erica Smith to Congress.

A big thank you from all of us,

Erica Smith HQ

Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator,
who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural
Eastern North Carolina.

Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — her home district – in Congress,
where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal
healthcare, voting rights, and more.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43831?refcode=em20220310-974-box&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1044&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke ]Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House
seat and give power back to working people »

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43831?refcode=em20220310-974-box&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1045&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke ]Donate

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220310-974-footer&t=1046&refcode2=974_3698_9O-nke&akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=974%2E3698%2E9O-nke

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US

North Carolina’s 1st District is Erica’s home. This is her community. And as a three-term state senator who represented more than half of this district, she’s never lost an election here. Erica is our best chance to defend this seat — but it’s going to take all of us to win. The resources we raise right now will help us open a campaign office, hire more campaign staff, dictate the reach of our organizing program, and ultimately, determine whether we’ll be powerful enough to win the primary and beat a Republican in the general election. [ ]We can’t emphasize enough how much it would help us if you chip in $5 or anything you can. Every dollar goes toward building the campaign it’ll take to elect Erica Smith to Congress. A big thank you from all of us, Erica Smith HQ Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — her home district – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. [ ]Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people » [ ]Donate Contribute to Erica's campaign:

| | The official deadline to enter the 2022 U.S. Senate race has passed. **And it's official: I am running for re-election to continue representing Oregon in the United States Senate.** There's no doubt about it, these past few years have been difficult for Oregon's families and small businesses. But I am laser-focused on our shared values: reducing health care and housing costs, addressing the mental health crisis, securing a clean energy future, ensuring that billionaires pay their fair share in taxes, and so much more. **But we know that the Republican establishment is already pouring money into our state and running right-wing, extremist candidates against myself and other Democrats. Any one of those Republican candidates would most certainly be happy to stall progress by blocking critical legislation to improve the lives of millions of Americans and protect our planet.** Oregonians will have a clear choice on the ballot this year — keep moving our democracy forward or take two steps back. **[Keep us moving forward. Join our movement to affirm our state's progressive values and keep Oregon blue. Donate $17 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42826188/334465724/-2044921950?refcode=2022-03-10-running&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f7397dc6-aba0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzM5N2RjNi1hYmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c6ViIcBSF8Uxw20f7-SHuKHJ-HxISOECKIjgTz20GTs=) ** the GOP would love to pick up a Senate seat in Oregon. clean_body: | | | The official deadline to enter the 2022 U.S. Senate race has passed. And it's official: I am running for re-election to continue representing Oregon in the United States Senate. There's no doubt about it, these past few years have been difficult for Oregon's families and small businesses. But I am laser-focused on our shared values: reducing health care and housing costs, addressing the mental health crisis, securing a clean energy future, ensuring that billionaires pay their fair share in taxes, and so much more. But we know that the Republican establishment is already pouring money into our state and running right-wing, extremist candidates against myself and other Democrats. Any one of those Republican candidates would most certainly be happy to stall progress by blocking critical legislation to improve the lives of millions of Americans and protect our planet. Oregonians will have a clear choice on the ballot this year — keep moving our democracy forward or take two steps back. = the GOP would love to pick up a Senate seat in Oregon. As you know, our Democratic majority hangs by a thread with a 50-50 split in the Senate. Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the majority. We won't let them take Oregon. = Ron Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. | Peter
Have you seen this?
Will N.J. allow pump-your-own gas stations? With new bill, the great debate is back! -NJ.com
A group of Bi-partisan lawmakers have brought forth a bill to give gas stations the option to have self-serve pumps at every station.
With New Jersey being the ONLY state not to offer the option to pump your own gas, it makes New Jersey - New Jersey!
While they estimate this would save $0.15 per gallon, do we really trust the Democrats not to add more on our gas tax?
That's why we want your opinion, {First Name}.
Are you FOR or AGAINST self serve gas stations?
---
| [I am FOR it](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruFzo3V6tpZRrFKpjwSKqwRKyE89VN0jWQ0EwXIaR4ZuL0gu_nP9xedSr41rsHh1s_aK4HvWTjbbB1Pie27N8pQQSr_ZnI8R4ugZNKglq2iMWEMt51JocmMB-4KPHodvh6rgmh1jI8bB_cooSiQ4XtgoCqb0XrjL5BHs9x_0S9y78x7glb5V1WrpFdCzHDzJDXLFOAdZKXHu7ueIl7Xp0u_LDT_1yHc5nB171epA_n25_zz8NmU4JOs4ikJ613ST_TmvFCMftpVBLXhsokP5rMQwXtAmepCsCl_sD3WFbEpf6A782sfyaUTOSo5I8ZvO4tyXObnYl_BIOedlZCj2CLHDF1M0rZNCJ6DEbJxAfds=&c=t83hggKBFNlfky-3YinEhVVsBbY4MVctyRpMtZMHariIsNJXJ6HmxA==&ch=Jd3GEBv6j3As0xw_tTAMEOJaKvrQ6BnF2JucMd1wIWaExgRU1zS3tw==)
---
| [I am AGAINST it](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruFzo3V6tpZRrFKpjwSKqwRKyE89VN0jWQ0EwXIaR4ZuL0gu_nP9xedSr41rsHh1s_aK4HvWTjbbB1Pie27N8pQQSr_ZnI8R4ugZNKglq2iMWEMt51JocmMB-4KPHodvh6rgmh1jI8bB_cooSiQ4XtgoCqb0XrjL5BHs9x_0S9y78x7glb5V1WrpFdCzHDzJDXLFOAdZKXHu7ueIl7Xp0u_LDT_1yHc5nB171epA_n25_zz8NmU4JOs4ikJ613ST_TmvFCMftpVBLXhsokP5rMQwXtAmepCsCl_sD3WFbEpf6A782sfyaUTOSo5I8ZvO4tyXObnYl_BIOedlZCj2CLHDF1M0rZNCJ6DEbJxAfds=&c=t83hggKBFNlfky-3YinEhVVsBbY4MVctyRpMtZMHariIsNJXJ6HmxA==&ch=Jd3GEBv6j3As0xw_tTAMEOJaKvrQ6BnF2JucMd1wIWaExgRU1zS3tw==)

Nothing less than control of the Senate and any chance at progress over the next two years of the Biden administration is at stake.

| | Friend, National Republicans just unveiled their preliminary list of targets for the 2022 election and the Minnesota House is one of two goals for flipping control. That puts us right in the middle of the national campaign to seize control -- things are about to start getting intense. You can read more about the Republican announcement [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/-54cJCeKp1PrHiWu0u7qy6e9h2wMnXb7GmUwM9CVY2g=). Protecting our House DFL Majority has just become operation _critical_. We know we are in for a tough election and we need to start preparing today. **Can you pitch in today?** Don't forget that the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program was renewed for 2022. **Minnesotans can make a fully refundable contribution of $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a full refund.** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[**Contribute $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/mVdAwAQJDq4VATR9oP37aPqT60LVQa6w1AJjZMa4D1M=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=031022)_ _[**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/mVdAwAQJDq4VATR9oP37aPqT60LVQa6w1AJjZMa4D1M=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=031022)_ _[**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/mVdAwAQJDq4VATR9oP37aPqT60LVQa6w1AJjZMa4D1M=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=031022)_ _[**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/mVdAwAQJDq4VATR9oP37aPqT60LVQa6w1AJjZMa4D1M=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=031022)_ _[**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YDswEqHPDbY10j8dOUG23OoWHoZxCdeJcWxdNJw98mA=/mVdAwAQJDq4VATR9oP37aPqT60LVQa6w1AJjZMa4D1M=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=031022)_ The race to control the Minnesota House of Representatives is all but certain to attract tons of well-funded special interests looking to overturn the progress we've made over the last three years. name: Kevin Hern for Congress
subject: DEFEND the police
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Kevin Hern is committed to defending our men and women in blue. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/570108a878a0fa93/c4530adc4afe877ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)

Peter, We’ve heard countless leftists in America calling to “Defund the Police” but Kevin Hern has never wavered in his commitment to DEFEND the police. name: Chris Walsh, Biaggi for Congress
subject: A difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friends,
It’s Chris, Alessandra’s campaign manager. I made a very difficult decision yesterday during our team's budget meeting. I approved a $10,000 expenditure where we’d only budgeted $5,000.
The primary for NY-3 is heating up, and it’s become clear that in order to keep organizing across NY-3 — from Westchester to Long Island — we're going to need to scale up our investments in digital organizing and advertising to win.
**The money wasn’t in the Q1 budget, but I gave the green light anyway.**
It was a risk, for sure. But right now, we need to do everything we can to show the people of this district that Alessandra is the best choice for NY-3. It’s a crowded primary, and we need to stand out.
So I made a bet that if I asked, supporters like you would help fill the $5,000 gap. And I’m really hoping you will. For Alessandra, our team, and everyone who agrees that to make progress in Congress, we need to elect better Democrats.
**[Can you make a $5 contribution to Alessandra’s campaign for Congress today? Every donation will help fill the budget gap we created making critical investments in this campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220310-1-30&refcode2=545_59515_8SNdIm&akid=545%2E59515%2E8SNdIm)**
As I mentioned, this was a pretty tough call. But if there’s one thing that makes our campaign different from all the others in this race, it’s the grassroots support of people all across NY-3.
Thanks for chipping in today if you can afford it.
\- Chris
Chris Walsh
Campaign Manager, Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220310-1-30&refcode2=545_59515_8SNdIm&akid=545%2E59515%2E8SNdIm)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=545%2E59515%2E8SNdIm).

name: Stella Parton
subject: Y'all, it's time for a change
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

I’m Stella Parton and I want to welcome you to Tennessee! Rural Social Justice can be overlooked, so I’ve used my music, entrepreneurship and activism to wake up “old moldy politicians.” People don’t often make enough noise about the problems facing Rural Tennesseans. Well, I make enough noise to be heard!

I want to share with you issues that matter to Rural Tennesseans. Our hospitals are closing at an alarming rate, the highest per capita in the country. Our rural broadband is not strong enough for telemedicine or educating our children at home during a pandemic.

We need strong, intelligent Democrats in rural areas who understand and advocate for infrastructure to support our rural communities.

That’s why I’m extending a Tennessee welcome to you and asking for your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We've gotta get these Republican hooligans out of office and replace them with Democrats who will fight for rural Tennesseans — and for all Tennesseans.

So please join me in chipping in $25 to the Tennessee Victory Fund in support of Rural Democrats throughout Tennessee. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

We surely can do better if we do it together.

Yours,

Stella Parton

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Biden let Putin do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Peter, As a U.S. Green Beret, I know a thing or two about taking on our enemies.

The game plan is simple - aid the Ukrainian people and be as hard as possible on Vladmir Putin and his gang of thugs.

_But it doesn’t take a combat veteran or a genius to know that what Joe Biden is doing in Ukraine and Russia is BAD for the world._

[Unless we take back the House with a Republican tough majority,](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2f2bc2b773064c32833c7342a31caa84&_e=VcZqsNp4XTsyc10lpkNB-ZULsRHmRWD7b8cNLWajt5_FJ1mrlbJn7l16pRUo8TnWu_u7CIy7F02JEzroy3IgrZD-j-KRprPlP6iIKdHjeZuBJNyuz212P7fiD2h4uAjSZvGN1EC_P8-m5wCaM_yz8iG9ib7Q8cs5whH62-BXGwAdOt8BmoTTysDSCfVl_yQ1d5AQWXrzKZz8CcZDuzQfH4TJirTlus2K6AOn90KpnvEZzIzyWh7n3UnQqIw6j16Ttvxexh0SX8lJq8w8lW9zDtaaaP6UIULGRjCXvW2XsIgCvmqMnNa3Db007vn11UEwr6CijyD8cmuy2JbOmsIz7lZyhij6up2gj3Pff4zUq1AHwi95oPhNMsRkcelie56b9J4div61y439U7YuQvD58Q%3D%3D) Biden will have NO ONE stopping him from letting Putin walk all over America.

I don’t want to see what Vladmir Putin does with even more money and power, and I know you don’t either.

**YOU have the power to stand up to our enemies and keep America safe, but we don’t have long to act.**

| Woke Disney is now echoing Democrat propaganda and falling for the corporate media's phony hysteria over a Florida bill that sensibly prohibits K-3rd graders from being indoctrinated with transgenderism and R-rated lessons about sexuality. Frankly, Peter, kindergarten classrooms should be a place for kids to be kids, not testing grounds for leftist ideology. But one thing is abundantly clear here: The media, the radical Democrats, and the woke corporate mob haven't even attempted to JUST READ THE BILL. Peter, ignore the media's hysteria and just [read the Parental Rights in Education bill for yourself.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018Eo8QbLANwsD6n9QQWvXEHEjb96O8bBam11OCGNMQW0HK9AC4R6vnpD_xn4dd7GhOPK_0N5xJe_NhBo2mWdw2hVVW27LZGZa5574n6aAt06ZcFF6lMcLLnJkjhXTM8_u7ZtobYXwWLm1B0nazXV41w==&c=oIUlJolblAtaX9OEFVWdJ1IO_7vgsVXLYL880giPJts-YLZbaFeQSw==&ch=_nfOGcqlzaxRqznKuj0AJKUE_h_UKW58ptSKwqxqWvSspPe6BNfeRg==) In yet another attempt to create a smear campaign to bring down Governor DeSantis, and to pressure woke businesses to take a stance against the legislation, the Democrats and their media lackeys are intentionally lying about what the bill is about. Make no mistake about it: this is an intentional and coordinated attack. Rest assured: Governor DeSantis' policies are always going to be in the best interest of Florida citizens, not on the musings of woke corporations. If Disney had bothered to read the bill, they would know that this is pro-parent and pro-child legislation. Governor DeSantis will not be lectured by woke corporations about what is best for families. Disney is in far too deep with the Communist Party of China and has lost any moral authority to tell you what to do. Disney should know a villain when they see one.
Since Disney decided not to read the bill...Governor DeSantis has requested that a member of our staff hand deliver a copy of the seven-page bill to Disney HQ on Monday. clean_body: The Democrat propaganda machine must be stopped | | | | == | Woke Disney is now echoing Democrat propaganda and falling for the corporate media's phony hysteria over a Florida bill that sensibly prohibits K-3rd graders from being indoctrinated with transgenderism and R-rated lessons about sexuality. Frankly, Peter, kindergarten classrooms should be a place for kids to be kids, not testing grounds for leftist ideology. But one thing is abundantly clear here: The media, the radical Democrats, and the woke corporate mob haven't even attempted to JUST READ THE BILL. Peter, ignore the media's hysteria and just == In yet another attempt to create a smear campaign to bring down Governor DeSantis, and to pressure woke businesses to take a stance against the legislation, the Democrats and their media lackeys are intentionally lying about what the bill is about. Make no mistake about it: this is an intentional and coordinated attack. Rest assured: Governor DeSantis' policies are always going to be in the best interest of Florida citizens, not on the musings of woke corporations. If Disney had bothered to read the bill, they would know that this is pro-parent and pro-child legislation. Governor DeSantis will not be lectured by woke corporations about what is best for families. Disney is in far too deep with the Communist Party of China and has lost any moral authority to tell you what to do. Disney should know a villain when they see one. Since Disney decided not to read the bill...Governor DeSantis has requested that a member of our staff hand deliver a copy of the seven-page bill to Disney HQ on Monday. George - who volunteered to drive to Disney HQ in Orlando -- needs your help to overcome Brandon's skyrocketing gas prices. == == Team DeSantis == | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

"As someone who has fought for religious freedom around the world my entire career, I find it appalling to see it limited here at home. With such a rich history of defending religious freedom in Virginia where Thomas Jefferson wrote the historic Virginia Statute of Religious Freedom, which laid the groundwork for much of the First Amendment, it is astounding that Democrats in the Virginia Senate would try to exert such control over the freedom to worship here in the Commonwealth."

"I say often that there is no right more fundamental than the freedom of conscience. When our government is seeking to control whether, how, or when we can worship, it is an egregious infringement and exactly the type of thing I’m running for the Virginia Senate to fight against."

-Tina Ramirez

clean_body: we have come a long way since then... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, we’re approaching the 2nd anniversary of “15 days to flatten the curve,” and we’ve got something to celebrate... American resolve. Finally, we are witnessing a nationwide rebellion against the anti-American mandates supported by congressional Democrats, liberal community leaders, and radical leftist school boards. We are taking back our communities from the radicals and the elites. We are defending freedom against socialist tyranny. For too long liberal elites have abandoned science and supported unconstitutional mandates that have led to immeasurable consequences. On our economy. On our culture. On our entire future. In fact, no one can even say for sure what damage they’ve caused school children with their authoritarian power grab! Our frontline workers who were once praised as national “heroes” for braving the potentially deadly risks associated with COVID were vilified because they dared to question our leaders’ motives and political agendas. Now those same nurses and doctors are called “anti-science” if they dare to make their own healthcare choices. Concerned parents and teachers who took issue with mask mandates were labeled “terrorists” then arrested for speaking out at school board meetings. During worldwide supply chain disruptions, American and Canadian truck drivers have had their livelihoods threatened by overbearing government authorities. Thankfully, the tides are changing because everyday Americans from all political affiliations, social classes, genders, and races are fighting back. I am proud to say that we, the American people, are taking back our country. Those of us who have been labeled “right-wing extremists” and “conspiracy theorists,” are standing up for our freedom and we have momentum on our side. Just look at the Democrats' poll numbers! We must continue to disrupt radical policies and influences. We must stay involved. We must always demand the truth and challenge the status qu o. We are winning. Now we must continue to take back our freedoms and our country – one school board race, one city council seat, a time. We can make a difference together, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Catalina Lauf, and I’m running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative in Illinois’ 11th Congressional district against Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. Foster’s an out-of-touch tax-and-spend politician who is a secure vote for every Biden/Pelosi bill wrecking our economy and our country. We can’t afford to continue on this disastrous path that Biden and Pelosi have put our country on. subject: Americans are suffering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We want to hear your opinion
Peter

Biden announced on Tuesday that we will officially halt any investment into the Russian energy sector. This move comes on the day that gas prices around the country hit a record high.

Does President Biden have a plan for reducing gas prices here in the United States? Nobody seems to have an answer to this but . . .

**Here’s what we do know:**
* Gas Prices in the U.S. are at a record high.
* Last year, Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline which would have helped America become more energy independent with an additional 500-800 barrels of oil per day.
* As of right now, President Biden has no plans of resuming construction on the Keystone Pipeline project.
* This has led to American’s suffering at the pump.

**Here’s what we want to know:**

name: STOP BIG TECH
subject: Are you joining President Trump?
body:
Peter,
President Trump has _officially_ launched his new social network.

It’s time for conservatives to STAND UP against big tech censorship and forge their _own path _to free speech.

Socialist tech wants to silence us because they know they will _never_ win over the American people if we’re free to tell the **truth** about their far-Left agenda.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: these gas prices are CRAZY! Imagine if Gretchen had her way...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
$4.70 per gallon. |
---
| | Peter -

**I'm sure you don't need me tell you, but these gas prices are insane! **

In my neck of the woods, I just paid $4.25 a gallon- and according to Sleepy Joe, [_things are only going to get worse._](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=52ffe28f55&e=fe4b890356)

Gas prices could be higher - **45 cents higher** \- if Gretchen Whitmer had her way. Don't forget that [she spent her entire first year in office](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=968a15b3e3&e=fe4b890356) pushing for a MASSIVE gas tax increase that would force Michiganders to pay the _highest gas tax in the entire nation_.
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=eb6baddff2&e=fe4b890356)
---
| **Michigan simply cannot afford the Biden/Whitmer energy agenda.**

The Hollywood celebrities and liberal elites funding Whitmer's campaign have a message for working class folks struggling to make ends meet - _**suck it up**_.

_They mock us for not having electric cars.

They say these record prices are just a 'small price to pay.'

They squash any attempt to ramp up __**AMERICAN MADE ENERGY**_ _****__that will lower costs and create good jobs._

**Gretchen Whitmer is enlisted in Joe Biden's War on American Energy** \- working overtime to shut down Line 5 and leave our yoopers in the dark. To win the affection of DNC higher-ups and Hollywood stars, _**Whitmer has put left-wing special interests above Michigan families again and again.**_

Meanwhile, the legislature is busy _[passing bills to cut the income tax and suspend the gas tax until prices at the pump are under control.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=68b0ada82e&e=fe4b890356)_

**She won't sign them.** Why? Because she's a power-hungry elitist who believes that OUR MONEY is better spent by HER BUREAUCRACY.

_Folks, I know that these high prices are hitting our paychecks hard. _I know what it's like want. To not know where your next meal is coming from.** _I get it._**

The hypocrisy and self-righteousness from these silver spoon politicians and liberal elites only strengthens my resolve to **WIN THIS RACE** and **DEFEAT GRETCHEN WHITMER!**

Taking back our state is a team effort, Peter. If you can, [**please pitch in just $5 to help grow our grassroots campaign**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2f2b51289a&e=fe4b890356) and bring some COMMON SENSE back to our government.
---
| [Donate $5](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6909e7640c&e=fe4b890356 "Donate $5")
---
| All of us can take action - if you can't pitch in, please consider joining our volunteer army and helping take our movement's message directly to voters in your community.

Sign up to get involved on our website --> [GarrettforMichigan.com/get-involved](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6275d58417&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [Get Involved](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6ac261c7ea&e=fe4b890356 "Get Involved")
---
| Thank you for taking the time to read this Peter. I'll be hosting events next week in Marysville, Lapeer and Lansing - see my full event schedule [here.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5502be3ea6&e=fe4b890356)

God Bless Michigan,
**[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7351a19650&e=fe4b890356)**
**Garrett Soldano**
Republican Candidate for Governor

P.S. - _Never forget Gretchen Whitmer's true agenda! _ 👇🏼👇🏼👇🏼
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d8406d6fc1&e=fe4b890356)
---
| |

---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---
| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=d424e6f8ba) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=d424e6f8ba).

name: Morgan Harper
subject: “Angry Black woman”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220310-773-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe ]Morgan Harper

This is
what we are running against in this race. This is why we need to stand up
to right-wing extremism. Last month, I debated Josh Mandel for the second
time and things got nasty.

During last month’s debate, Josh Mandel:

* Said I’m “dumber than AOC.”
* Called me “angry” multiple times during the debate.
* Characterized Black Lives Matter activists as “thugs.”

I refuse to be characterized as an “angry black woman” for fighting for
what’s right. I’m more motivated than ever to run this race for the
people.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29504?t=1003&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe ]We’re in an uphill battle against extremely racist and sexist rhetoric
from opponents who will do whatever they can to discredit me and our
campaign. We’re less than 55 days away from the primary. Can you help me
fight back by donating $5 or anything you can right now?

Right now, we’re just five days away from our critical mid-month
fundraising deadline. This is so important because this end-of-month is
also our last FEC-deadline before the primary election.

The numbers we produce at the end of March are the last chance we have to
show the strength of our movement before election day and prevent a bigot
like Josh Mandel from winning this seat.

It’s UNACCEPTABLE that in 2022, Black women like me still have to face
these racist and sexist comments when we speak up, but what’s even more
unfortunate is that this isn’t anything unique.

People like Josh Mandel have told Black women what we should do and what
we should say for too long! I’m sick of my fellow Black women and girls
having to endure this narrative and not having the space or opportunity to
fight back.

Josh Mandel’s comments are an example of the insidious racial stereotypes
thrown at Black women every day and I won’t stand for it.

They say we’re too loud, too angry, too much. People like Josh Mandel
don’t want people who look like me to take up space. But I refuse to be
silenced. I’m passionate about creating a better Ohio and a better world —
and I’m not going to slow down now.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29504?t=1004&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe ]Can you help power our campaign today by donating $5
before March 15th? Black women candidates raise on average half of what
white candidates raise, so it’s critical that our grassroots campaign has
a steady stream of donations before the primary election.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29510?refcode=em20220310-773&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe ]Contribute $5

We’ve NEVER elected a Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate. I won’t
stop until we change that. And I refuse to let someone like Josh
Mandel stand in the way.

Thank you for your time and support,

Morgan

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29504?t=1024&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe ][IMG]

Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=773%2E90090%2EqQwQKe

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

body:
but what’s going on hasn’t stopped; it’s just not being covered anymore... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=7be8a4a1accc464cb76038614a89d6d3&_e=w_ZAjWYNxLngkwyTkICWVP9F9NeRZp_dVz1P5WYMS868DfyNZhi8i6e4s85sWqvE5GJ6DJuAKGN4vNBwsBKeNsXuXJHfqI3JGE4ln69E4AdCSy76nJ-pkBfF_EqxOvFpKDhfheLZAs6t075vxU48nV9RyHJwCalFe4JCQriqrnETi-0J6nOa7tapeN_SsimCm8_0MZ5p71rD7RKo8zCYg2jC1XUWg8MVYChJPnQGFXfQtyIq4aUUBix6f4CXDT1v6ShfwEZIgpeqnpuaeVDgpwK78aN-jtkJKSovtbiR9sjT-ZnV9YN8e-Glvle48F4WYz7-YhuOPcyFznSfUwvwCRw1pe-pkFwzOnRm9oMUu43ITq3d6s9jyZN7YDyoEDrCxrRXtiA6xEyJD2-TZjQXv8CRLeQXpTI-PhXFY2ZiWaiEZVjSaUiRi50ELzY1UGBvombESds4y0w2WHHXonR2EMAsD0aNjOaamsxvFCvm9JeO_1kJQPuKa9KgqKB-5FUK) | |

Hi Peter,

Do you remember this video from the beginning of February?

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=7be8a4a1accc464cb76038614a89d6d3&_e=w_ZAjWYNxLngkwyTkICWVP9F9NeRZp_dVz1P5WYMS868DfyNZhi8i6e4s85sWqvE5GJ6DJuAKGN4vNBwsBKeNsXuXJHfqI3JGE4ln69E4AdCSy76nJ-pkBfF_EqxOvFpKDhfheLZAs6t075vxU48nV9RyHJwCalFe4JCQriqrnETi-0J6nOa7tapeN_SsimCm8_0MZ5p71rD7RKo8zCYg2jC1XUWg8MVYChJPnQGFXfQtyIq4aUUBix6f4CXDT1v6ShfwEZIgpeqnpuaeVDgpwK78aN-jtkJKSovtbiR9sjI5dxD-RzklFmPU1_5eUyeMD4mTEcQNWj1C4hRnQ40zBE45qrkXO-j5KCdcYheRdh9gNVjCpJRALJqPomaXHU4kH3_wufit-MiOQiUD8Wm0A14tnwR8kF5zMeGPYwo_xvNg3xtMm63ojZvpTykImDivz27tXRP_kK7oediTB-ZmrvVCGCyssns6JI0VlND69tAr1UTYdKM5njkHNaEd_HZ)

subject: Unleash U.S. Energy Production

body:
Biden banning Russian oil isn’t enough Peter, Biden has banned blood-stained Russian oil – but it’s not enough. America needs to STOP being beholden to terrorist regimes like Venezuela and Iran and open up oil production here in the U.S. If Biden had any interest in putting America and our national security first, he would start with these steps: _\- Immediately reverse his ban on new oil and gas leases and permits_ _\- Restart the Keystone XL pipeline_ _\- End onerous regulations and slash red tape that’s holding the energy sector back_ [**Tell Biden to Unleash U.S. Energy Production**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=16567c821f124260bfb3dd6b989fac27&_e=ujbTdjwzkoV6IpCUDaTVbc1S95-sYm_jWWSjLxetZdUDtLrTKAPSrGc0evqlFFVCmI8w05xHJ7O3STRomie_PZA5WNDiQlCHLfUPefLwLOLWD3ctsClshixxLP14IwR5GsVUT3P7blARo0W1jGDYoMGxRiR6vYNfChjFYFFfK3Xo_X9q4reFcbA4DhHqBkoEkj5CmMdrFMsRUdH1y0lfFQPY_T_CiDit1ww4Pg1XlcqWW8JGYe3AdmMIbRda2c_VnY783B7iKzEdOVYVuxMIn81MqRs0Rc4XAKU-k4ABFeijq9mu3JPuyXcYKbxt_L7TeTZeGjou0SjPtM0vVmq3_NECI8uHUbIfUK74rLXV2JQ7oLWQX0AkR0crstyH6UGeIpHsK550KbZXW5CKbFFMlbVZXorGYXvwB7G2Eh-BxO49BYuZqDtMqCCWEid9IctsX15ci1DepvVDS6AtXmrmECnCbNlHm0id-xdKk_VOCBc%3D) Unleashing domestic energy production would support tens of thousands of good-paying jobs, drive costs down for Alabama families, and strengthen our national security. | Peter,

We need a Congress that will fight to uphold our Democratic ideals, and that means we need to protect our Democratic House Majority.

The good news is that national experts are calling NY-22 the GOP seat most likely to flip from red to blue this fall.

But we can’t take anything for granted. If there’s one thing I’ve learned over the course of my career, it’s that the most important battles are sometimes the toughest ones.

_Peter, let’s not wake up on November 9th wishing we had done more._

[_**I know we can flip this seat blue together. But, it will take hard work from all of us. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=056294b8009f4b20b71bab7286b92221&_e=GPr7zbrB9j1dRrH3QVnCn8EUe77llDDZS3FhwDPQV68jiawjW5MdiQMMGthbYyIubj3elga_SZvAYKjl3s75BYBaybIAt0Xu4JPejN6A8KTlmSr_eYm8uUtJ57g2aBkoLJ5QyYSACuKiOiMbrxzMW43PSgXjRmpM_jIXsgi82f7mGESs82kRAjDgLMlpP4S960TSHSI7rIAE2MAz9PBhJrltBzOKhmsemqV0SwGMM-K-hlWx4L4TJiHfZTPnCvIK9pzlM8puQ2v5rmx1i5hBRWDdfhwpe-LZE_MGmmKiO_9PuYG-3CVLJamEdBz4F9zOl5aoIBu3V1nCSBzWLsJJOvALxYnY97EUZ_f4YTheizm1iQOSYTwSc_1TjHqpqnGv34ru4SUqXW0-TqwLPRurL8kUQNmIo-VuHxiBBCpdTDerLw_CQuJpPiaHmyCAe6Zt4JZcWSMsdmWlSWE9BMFXaQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I’ll get straight to the point.

I am emailing you today because I am endorsing Herschel Walker for the United States Senate. He’ll be a fantastic senator, and I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to watch why I am endorsing Herschel.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=056294b8009f4b20b71bab7286b92221&_e=GPr7zbrB9j1dRrH3QVnCn8EUe77llDDZS3FhwDPQV68jiawjW5MdiQMMGthbYyIubj3elga_SZvAYKjl3s75BYBaybIAt0Xu4JPejN6A8KTlmSr_eYm8uUtJ57g2aBkoLJ5QyYSACuKiOiMbrxzMW43PSgXjRmpM_jIXsgi82f7mGESs82kRAjDgLMlpP4S960TSHSI7rIAE2MAz9PBhJrltBzOKhmsemqV0SwGMM-K-hlWx4L4TJiHfZTPnCvIKSi0MXnHXCwQXt_oHNj8jypZFXg-NM29_1aez65HykYS8xX0Nfs9wCsu3nmoIIddwYt1yd-bS4zatfmIqqFqvJckQQQvNASnTEKGkuKD28nn8POYF391lds7wgXPRakEUbxNOzT01I1Fi_WcF1pqV9aj32VjbJh4sUmuIRuzBLlf7RQUUfX2EK0qPo4KkaWGP8-QMRCZgU-AdJxDuN7d8Pg%3D%3D)
While serving as the Secretary of State and Director of the CIA in the Trump Administration, I saw how important it is for our nation to have strong leaders in Washington who love America and will fight for our citizens.

_**Herschel Walker is the leader for the job.**_

Herschel has lived the American Dream, and he will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. Herschel has my full support, and I will do everything I can to help him win Georgia and put our nation back on the right track.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: One thing you can do to help the people of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I stand with the brave people of Ukraine, and with the Ukrainian community across California.
#

Hi,
Like most people, I’ve been closely following the situation in Ukraine, and I’ve heard from lots of folks wondering what they can do to help.
First, I want to say it plainly: I stand with the brave people of Ukraine, and with the Ukrainian community across California.
As chair of the Senate Subcommittee on Immigration, I’ve called on the Biden administration to protect Ukrainian nationals living in the United States, and now Ukraine has been designated for Temporary Protected Status.
I also support President Biden’s ban on Russian oil, natural gas, and coal imports.
But even as I continue to work with the Biden administration on our response, I’ve heard from plenty of Californians who want to know what _they_ can do right now to help Ukrainian refugees.
So today, I want to ask you to join me in [**making a donation to Chef José Andrés' World Central Kitchen. They’re on the ground now, serving thousands of comforting meals to Ukrainian families fleeing home as well as those who remain in the country, and they could use your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-wck?refcode=em220310-1-60&t=1&refcode2=680_159979_mHynan&akid=680%2E159979%2EmHynan)
**[DONATE TO WCK](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22-wck?refcode=em220310-1-60&t=2&refcode2=680_159979_mHynan&akid=680%2E159979%2EmHynan)**
I know this is a distressing situation, and I understand the impulse to feel overwhelmed by the scale of the crisis. And while it will not end the war, one of the best things you can do right now is chip in a few dollars to help get a warm meal to someone who needs it.
Thank you,
Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=680%2E159979%2EmHynan)

name: Team Booker
subject: One of the guiding principles of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, one of the
guiding principles of our campaign is this:

The people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. That’s why
we are taking our power back, and that’s why Charles is taking to the road
to hear more about where people are coming from.

By letting regular people tell their stories and determine what leadership
looks like — we can answer a lot of questions about where we need to go.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16990?refcode=em20220310-1641&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1641%2E346206%2EMh1P9o ]The work to change our future is already being done in our communities
— but we now just need our leaders to catch up to it. If you’re ready for
that future like we are, will you please chip in $5 to our
campaign?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16990?refcode=em20220310-1641&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1641%2E346206%2EMh1P9o ]Contribute $5

When Charles said we are building a movement from the hood to the holler —
he means it. Because for him, this fight is personal.

Charles grew up in one of the poorest ZIP codes in Kentucky. Both of his
parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of his brothers
and sisters, and his mom often went without eating so he could. Charles
knows what it’s like to be in the unemployment line. To have student
loans. To have your electricity cut out. To live in poverty.

But so many politicians like Rand Paul don’t know what it’s like — and
they ignore the needs of their constituents who do. Instead, they decide
to give tax breaks to their rich donors. All the while, the rest of us pay
for it.

Our elected leaders should be investing in solutions that we know would
lift millions out of poverty: fully funded public schools, affordable
prescription drugs, and a guaranteed universal basic income.

A brighter future where we center working people is possible. We just need
leaders like Charles Booker with the conviction to do it.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16990?refcode=em20220310-1641&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1641%2E346206%2EMh1P9o ]So we have to ask one more time: will you please chip in
$5 or whatever you can to our campaign today?

More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220310-1641-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1641_346206_Mh1P9o&akid=1641%2E346206%2EMh1P9o

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1641%2E346206%2EMh1P9o

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Both of his parents had to drop out of high school to help take care of his brothers and sisters, and his mom often went without eating so he could. Charles knows what it’s like to be in the unemployment line. To have student loans. To have your electricity cut out. To live in poverty. But so many politicians like Rand Paul don’t know what it’s like — and they ignore the needs of their constituents who do. Instead, they decide to give tax breaks to their rich donors. All the while, the rest of us pay for it. Our elected leaders should be investing in solutions that we know would lift millions out of poverty: fully funded public schools, affordable prescription drugs, and a guaranteed universal basic income. A brighter future where we center working people is possible. We just need leaders like Charles Booker with the conviction to do it. [ ]So we have to ask one more time: will you please chip in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign today? More soon, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

subject: No one should be forced to ration their life-saving medication

body:
| We must address unfair price gouging by big pharmaceutical companies. For too long, families and seniors have been forced to pay up to 10 times more for drugs like insulin than patients in other countries. That’s not right. So in Congress, I’m working to lower the costs of prescription drugs.

**I’ve introduced new legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 per month for every American, regardless of their insurer.** I’ve also supported efforts to let Medicare negotiate directly with pharmaceutical companies to lower costs.

name: Yesli Vega
subject: Elections have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
We must elect strong leaders

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=3f67f6f30f3044589636c46132d0d5e9&_e=L0NEdCZ5gdO9UvjNAvJ6Y_7LQOn1bpT7kBsHrchFZKd3Atm08SdYsyGKxxh4phQ0vPPIvtvPMXJKIWimN9TeFIEbgHd5uyhb_Pw_8Df1TkP-LbKNhs_qMHifzf1nB3qVlVlxYPPXOg5_ZBhChZxhe2esVQEIH9np5uldrFaL5r0H1oqUIdAmBdUpvPHcAR5V8k1K8zPaDRgrofWlt6dfSLOzzO_lgO5V9B9gjOvKT553srrS6OtCnP3p7IeNUfMreux40oFng8qHMan3l9VRzz2LUf4JScgVSBvYcqaEkmtCLNyMNbEiOP2_26sHXHBxjOx6pb58CQgvuXEEs8QJgJrb3fM4aFWOGmBjr-A4o56mqI8yrEfjnyU5zL5Gt9LG9rdH0xXV3j4nx9bwil_bktgvY2Lv5HlwlktIkWMzNPn108C2JevcULXBxz0WcrAaPp53YUcWj7hNndVB7Hc6uF0FTtEuE4kEMoMaflb8nxWZZRS9q1ON6o_xVNSy3geZ0Sr2P29zqHv1isLAjmSlehz8MKE-DsE1202w-nY5QPQ%3D)
---
Friend,

These are truly unprecedented times.

I recently appeared on Newsmax to discuss the situation unfolding overseas in Ukraine.

My heart breaks for the Ukrainians who have lost their lives or their loved ones. _So many are in danger, and Biden isn’t doing enough to slow Russia down._

**The long and short of it?** If Joe Biden TRULY wanted to make an impact here, he would stop buying Russian oil today and allow the U.S. to ramp up our oil and gas production. This would lower gas prices here at home and allow us to offer alternative energy options to our friends in Europe.

_We need to completely cut Russia off._

[**Joe, where were these sanctions six months ago, when Putin was telling the world what he was going to do? It’s truly unbelievable that this is the path our leadership is taking.**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=3f67f6f30f3044589636c46132d0d5e9&_e=L0NEdCZ5gdO9UvjNAvJ6Y_7LQOn1bpT7kBsHrchFZKd3Atm08SdYsyGKxxh4phQ0vPPIvtvPMXJKIWimN9TeFIEbgHd5uyhb_Pw_8Df1TkP-LbKNhs_qMHifzf1nB3qVlVlxYPPXOg5_ZBhChZxhe2esVQEIH9np5uldrFaL5r0H1oqUIdAmBdUpvPHcAR5V8k1K8zPaDRgrofWlt6dfSLOzzO_lgO5V9B9gjOvKT553srrS6OtCnP3p7IeNUfMreux40oFng8qHMan3l9VRzz2LUf4JScgVSBvYcqaEkmtCLNyMNbEiOP2_26sHXHBxjOx6pb58CQgvuXEEs8QJgO8DsRA-5OnMcBOUWWrNvcpuWXEoUeyMm6UYpG5_Ok1NPP76nzFcBfOyx5ssLOYBxQSJiTeGWyQ64dmetU7qWlVfeQqksQu5QAbwTGlYtYHPChwpLyVVcIJPkpnTemIykHuil4iFyMcTWKdWsWcN9fDqxyBtMY457XC3ZM9YxaEl_l4Z1lQVPyuo3jxOMFS7hALncsliHVX1c7SaMfAbrj8%3D)

**Elections have consequences.** It’s our duty to elect strong, confident leaders.

Because as the entire world is seeing, they aren’t just leading us at home, but on the world stage - where we can’t afford to be anything other than certain of our actions.

[**Chip in $15 now to support strong Republican leaders this November.**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=3f67f6f30f3044589636c46132d0d5e9&_e=L0NEdCZ5gdO9UvjNAvJ6Y_7LQOn1bpT7kBsHrchFZKd3Atm08SdYsyGKxxh4phQ0vPPIvtvPMXJKIWimN9TeFIEbgHd5uyhb_Pw_8Df1TkP-LbKNhs_qMHifzf1nB3qVlVlxYPPXOg5_ZBhChZxhe2esVQEIH9np5uldrFaL5r0H1oqUIdAmBdUpvPHcAR5V8k1K8zPaDRgrofWlt6dfSLOzzO_lgO5V9B9gjOvKT553srrS6OtCnP3p7IeNUfMreux40oFng8qHMan3l9VRzz2LUf4JScgVSBvYcqaEkmtCLNyMNbEiOP2_26sHXHBx-_3p9vlASuYTZCC2C3pTavBYzHJOFAShXamsJf5XYHGei-bmy5MYSEH9TKD9Fym93qwPN3UqPoO-6_BI0UPFkkHfrZWt5J3NdknOEaGtfhRXODHEO67BwdwB5OU1PXmosFgPZwXieCwP68PCJiWfCD1OSNIW-Cx5Dz3OSpG2gxYqL6tmZlcI-EjobJ1Dy8QEN5F6eY4u0Zrp8U-hxRmyJjMVAnwxUmKnknwlCjLVPCNfuiz341eQ5prkTAwt0lzO)

Remember, it’s OUR duty to elect the right leaders - and engagement doesn’t start on election day, it starts now.

God Bless,

[](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=3f67f6f30f3044589636c46132d0d5e9&_e=L0NEdCZ5gdO9UvjNAvJ6Y_7LQOn1bpT7kBsHrchFZKd3Atm08SdYsyGKxxh4phQ0vPPIvtvPMXJKIWimN9TeFIEbgHd5uyhb_Pw_8Df1TkP-LbKNhs_qMHifzf1nB3qVlVlxYPPXOg5_ZBhChZxhe2esVQEIH9np5uldrFaL5r0H1oqUIdAmBdUpvPHcAR5V8k1K8zPaDRgrofWlt6dfSLOzzO_lgO5V9B9gjOvKT553srrS6OtCnP3p7IeNUfMreux40oFng8qHMan3l9VRzz2LUf4JScgVSBvYcqaEkmtCLNyMNbEiOP2_26sHXHBxjOx6pb58CQgvuXEEs8QJgKtwNK2PqhJz7oKpsomY3t3WKhOdX23CE8OWl8XILN5erIC9xxwOEaAgAyen3gEkPbGA4D26b1wIFC9RO9eH6ItyAxvQIFIaLMDkBEHq88oxxLk3fEkjBCZoYDt-mbNStKpv_FFfSnjceat3JxCv5bccHm97UNPXMXb6Qv1q6nlNGvvtbZf65MfleEDKrExGl_W-16opCNGVtfYCDLak3mo%3D)

Yesli Vega
_Conservative Republican for Congress_
_Virginia's 7th District_

Friends, I have some important news:

**Today, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee added WI-03 to their list of Districts In Play.**

That means that after 25 years, there is a chance Democrats could lose this seat -- and possibly the House Majority.

If we don’t band together right now at this critical moment, we could send a Capitol Insurrectionist to Congress who will join the Marjorie Taylor Greene wing of the Republican Party rather than represent us.

| Team, remember the fake audit the AZ GOP spent all of 2021 talking about?

Well, the price tag has come in, and **you’ll never guess how much money Republicans have spent chasing Trump’s lies.**

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3akl5zbbPaaOxe3lzCb6jeetnrt4gN_n6VbE_kaOP69ADFBrordx_NgQTRvTQQnFCD_MM2ejCX_NfhEjCxmyzL1oMfG9LNV3r3XPH2D6plaYapzkO1mk2V-qmsK2dMtJMs52S7G3TmwRiC87hSR6CnLUoIB5bQDA-U0bibkF0eO8DdGg7Pf591C0PnDDeVxu0ib0Pak0stQtnURvjdJlkHlTt0GJN1QaeIOY0bvXzfWk1tioQM8pQ5--q5P7LaRqInv7G0tZlDvIgQhf4_pZ0UGfC91PDIr-buFyWdhlyToZLkzGVxQNwsffweMhYHGXiX8JVXXPTwsDx2uwYW4CNIA9LC2U9lU0ufNd4dDX17nIv3_Bjs1icCou2Xkjx8lW2tw--YE37KPcLfWkzB4QLGxMQBTGt-ifDZeHUWgumuapHHGkseR6zbL3h4AzgfrFr2z4KbEJmhzkjXfIeuh_jxfA/3k8/a6NrjSZqTMCX4sLUMVYXqw/h1/uwEH8ECw5NCBqBQoB9kG5WBWoURrHHNK4Odb4l6qChU) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-this-could-be-azs-last-true-election&email_referrer=email_1468542___subject_1924241&email_subject=youll-never-guess-how-much-the-gop-is-paying-for-the-fake-az-audit)
That’s right, the AZ GOP has wasted **$4 million dollars** of taxpayers' money on a wild goose chase. _A bogus elections audit that resulted in them finding even**MORE** votes for Joe Biden!_

body:
52% of Democrats would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75gQrlraCQ1Fk3XZNCGJTrV3oVSBKzm1eTkjuPHkCdZ84WMN6RqUaDAg1Roo8TkVL3bFW0Y9_Zejb4JI59JBVlrCYKmItpGE8TP6OVKCZIJVzJYDZALrRDj6qP2wQ1yOcr6a1IYlJUy8vO5Kv8DPUKWYwMDYohyL0OTEMaRI_kuDZOU9xVgYZqN019ZWurAVo7ioCEcVWOWY_w6CrthQCMPJimj-HjEk5kJU2KH6sCQoP9)

_**“I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.”**
- Matthew Hennessey_
Peter,

Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, **you’ll want to continue reading this email.**

The polling firm found that when asked _**“What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?”**_

**Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded?** **_52%_**

Yep - 52% of Democrats - _**including grown men**_ - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much.

**How pathetic.** Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled.

I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; **my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75gQrlraCQ1Fk3XZNCGJTrV3oTk3CZx7AoMwHUwngf4lPz71h6NZ3snivv7av7meoxhivniQ2vu981YXkCLR814clumQbYzLEAz196O1kfru4L0pOPPpiN0Eo4RUDQSU-uctoqyHolIIzrouAaPchpbe5vZmmbQUKCRnsupc1ikUseswZEFVnuW3KzW5HJqNpa6LOJV64nchuNBd0zor4XARoKOEE8Xa2DsfcK4i-odQSj)
When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. [**They must not be allowed to continue to serve in the House majority.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75gQrlraCQ1Fk3XZNCGJTrV3oyMLM6cfqlMMUyJ4qbbOQEbRlOtxk2-8ftWu3yfoNgiQfdkiF1XDrsz9DX2jb6tGcYLl871NXmP4aFOcY3Fj4u0fZGRGF83pdt_YzYtMHnn2IV6wGGcYHFDnBnD2pqPzSU8Gu-FIUN9E9I9Bro3m2xNiMTGS6YqHD3K6tfXVZKHhznSYK6vXQOeYOnq6XlpeUjoohZf2AJZgntfzvX_FJm)

[**Will you make a donation of $5 or $10 or even $15 right now to make sure I’m able to defeat the far-left Democrat I’m facing in November’s election?**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75gQrlraCQ1Fk3XZNCGJTrV3pDeoQiPZ3UoTfALd-tj87KEh4-qoCeFCAPteb4MsKM0IybIRyCqnh6Zx7zIFX7urcu59VdopWfbNzc9VBhQdZohbU_qHhVNlph1Xt9dHuQHmoWIqREfbQWkS15Zxem85pCT1X-PEpIkfJqQtrREzDrMpQxkWB4x5oQUNsRDKodmfkbUWcW-YYcmufVHpCba-xXQsUEse3QwNsyU72xPDgr) I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - **I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic.**

[**I’m in an extremely tight race against a progressive socialist - a race that is sure to be one of the most expensive in the nation, and any gift you can make today would be grateful appreciated.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75gQrlraCQ1Fk3XZNCGJTrV3ocQCoJFKqRuAJw0W41VNOYvLaJLOraTXGh0tRT3gWMZfETo3FKyVdX00m3kfcnaPzYMENCK7e-kC-SXwmPgJqlBrCVLojlFocXJBQgPUl0ggICYDI9He5us6ZqqAVGgPRnpUGINgFFTwL5eYafIljPiAVi7gxCLAp6lL2OgiGcPco_2ub4EDmK0juBIBafOKykfFJIbx6J-NusxAafY0rY)

**Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats** [** MAKE A GIFT OF $5 ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=d3eea58292c44799924c08774ff21468&_e=O-CA9rAObJteKwWncArwrvLm-PZijlzKpCX2ILw5WcBWlw-XOZhAoRvFOP35ofWa-yV8Ht9dnwwLg2mIRTmL8cAh5EgqpG8mcDyZ0FoKsfaRetvXoZRRMpQ_5RHg9g4_0SQY5b8cs7Nm1R5Ckuonm1sz9cdfUV3sn4nYO9yCabQe12MRrhrh9a0jBbPPwLTmFCh59--yhlDU9TnDdq75geluu4-wCTfRVWFgFeu3hxtE_iuZoWCLJaUVuwfNtwI6Eow-pFofk5KA-R5EoBP82gCpZSIDi6J1bRIQJqkFznRyvx6eCaTLxz3Ig0NeRIT9djJYnF0PfxdkTQo92VDt8-JbCG0woqlvyvC-f5dxZJ7e8Mf-AjgEhfjSAKykU2ZBgpq_XeHm5fUUDu-eb93a0Z3k0szyYTxC9P7CgjO_xp-WUM-7K-cAKHQ6KQCZFDq8ixF4sEKHD8l8fj4jWPe2SQ%3D%3D)
What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself?

What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run?

**I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week.**
