clean_body: 52% of Democrats would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | “I never thought I’d live to see the day half of Democrats would toss the whole country to the wolves if given the chance.” - Matthew Hennessey Peter, Did you see the Quinnipiac Poll that came out this week? If you didn’t read the headlines, you’ll want to continue reading this email. The polling firm found that when asked “What would you do if you were in the same position as Ukrainians are now, stay and fight or leave the country?” Can you guess what percentage of Democrats said they would cut and run if the U.S. were invaded? 52% Yep - 52% of Democrats - including grown men - responded that they would flee America rather than stand and defend the country that has given us so much. How pathetic. Makes me wonder how many Democrats in Congress would have answered in the affirmative if they were polled. I can tell you one thing first: the day in 2015 that an Islamic terrorist armed with more than 270 rounds of ammunition decided he’d like to blow up a train killing hundreds of civilians, I didn’t waiver; my friends and I identified the threat and neutralized it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. When push comes to shove, Democrats won’t stand up in defense of our freedoms. The Quinnipiac Poll proves that. I’m many things but one thing that I’m not is a coward - I’ll NEVER waiver if asked to defend my country from terrorists foreign OR domestic. Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats What happened to the men of this country - men like George H.W. Bush and Jimmy Carter - who willingly went to war in defense of not only their country, but for Democracy itself? What has happened to American Democrats in the 75 years since the end of WWII that has led to a majority of them to say that if a foreign force invaded the United States they would cut and run? I know what I stand for. And I’m willing to die for my freedom and yours any day of the week. And in case you were wondering – 70% of Republicans polled said that they would stay and fight. Thanks for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Help Me Stop Anti-American Democrats | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. clean_body: | | | We've told you about the Super PAC that is trying to buy Oregon's new Sixth congressional seat. Well, Willamette Week just reported the Super PAC has already dumped $1.37 million in Oregon to try and buy the congressional seat for Carrick Flynn. = = If they keep this up, they will spend more than $3.5 million by May just on TV ads! The Super PAC, Protect Our Future , is funded by a billionaire who reportedly is using his fortune to influence the regulation of the cryptocurrency industry in Congress. And he's using Oregon's elections as part of his grand scheme to get it done. = Andrea Salinas is running for Congress to help Oregon families. She's not beholden to billionaires or special interest groups. She's running to serve everyday Oregonians.And that's the way it should be. Andrea's got a tough race ahead, and she doesn't have billionaires backing her. That's where YOU come in. We know that we can win with the power of the grassroots. = Thank you so much for your support. With your help, we can send a fighter for Oregon families to Congress! name: Team Schmidt
subject: National Border Patrol Council endorses Derek for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We have some breaking news ... the National Border Patrol Council has endorsed Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas! Friend, We have some _breaking_ news ... the**National Border Patrol Council** has endorsed Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas! Here’s what NBPC President Brandon Judd has to say about Derek: _"We are proud to endorse Attorney General Derek Schmidt's campaign for Kansas Governor. As Kansas' chief law enforcement official for more than a decade, Derek has consistently advocated for the right policies when it comes to securing America's southern border and by extension keeping Kansas communities safe. Unlike the current Kansas Governor, he has taken the time to visit the border in Texas to better understand the current crisis and how to mitigate its effects on Kansas communities. _ _“Kansas deserves Attorney General Schmidt's clear-eyed leadership as its governor. Derek has successfully fought in court for smart federal policies like ‘Remain in Mexico’ migrant protection protocols. He's working to ban sanctuary city policies in Kansas after a local government ordered the police to ignore federal immigration law. He's signaled a willingness to send Kansas personnel or resources to aid Texas and Arizona state officials and serve as a force multiplier for the men and women of the National Border Patrol Council who are overwhelmed with the ongoing crisis at the southern border. And he’s the only candidate in this race who takes this issue seriously. _ “ _With the right leadership, American immigration policy should largely be a discussion at the federal level. However, the crisis created by the Biden Administration's deliberate failure to keep our border secure means every state - including Kansas - is now a border state. When it comes to public safety, it's never been more important that the people serving in the role of governor understand this fact and implement state policies accordingly._ _“For all of these reasons, the National Border Patrol Council asks that all Kansans vote for Attorney General Derek Schmidt for Governor." _ [**STAND WITH DEREK SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f4fabfbf53d748adbf95022e05f8b16d&_e=gzltlxjbjr_ZQ03_nw555t82hiGd67yEX7sZnp0kv_kOcv_W7Dk7yDZDovrAJjzhyO3VFLviV6MCM_p3Su40HIhieeAMADus4-1jJn8h6pVv6thasJx-rI-5yxdPAfcY_5PTYSSKC2PtzQrFC-WJWQbQ-bpKWsC40SqseI0RPeNNkMEH1pD0oMUoxxHIfOhO4A7Q9PmPmlClw1OuZZuQrZ85G5t2RLkWPO2D6pQwD8HSANUlYdyfoWf3WCJh26OyUr8NLOsBtIt1CjumpT3v_UKzAZym8F0eXeQnLRKAwnrgKwUZslSz0dqlJI6rMU9Ws7WtQ3EAgheB_rIomDRLP9xVifmh1IN-DL7hF03-HSZcQ2PiBE6DdXf-Qz2FdOVzB1owLnVCyH2SV0-UPUOPxRZrOP4lohMdbaefjn5-WlmdxW1LmS22QJ0Z4T3EtiSSjv-5j3AIXdZ2Pr-ATNTBAb0k0PO7REatOZoJFfrpiMG3k2QARZlbP9s22uBLcPaA) [**SECURE OUR BORDER**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f4fabfbf53d748adbf95022e05f8b16d&_e=gzltlxjbjr_ZQ03_nw555t82hiGd67yEX7sZnp0kv_kOcv_W7Dk7yDZDovrAJjzhyO3VFLviV6MCM_p3Su40HIhieeAMADus4-1jJn8h6pVv6thasJx-rI-5yxdPAfcY_5PTYSSKC2PtzQrFC-WJWQbQ-bpKWsC40SqseI0RPeNNkMEH1pD0oMUoxxHIfOhO4A7Q9PmPmlClw1OuZZuQrZ85G5t2RLkWPO2D6pQwD8HSANUlYdyfoWf3WCJh26OyUr8NLOsBtIt1CjumpT3v_UKzAZym8F0eXeQnLRKAwnpyznPO6XY3Ry3mt4GzNbwAh3Zk3hmfWdsEhT-zfOh5LrQXLumifz1-8yJnh8RZNllGanz6dIcl_Ag2VQKVQlH_hdt3HyI_elhzaKJ8Ysuu5Mq3dD2lMB3AoY51dO3ogaeOskgugE4Lppg3OFgRmgCfINTrwCG2i6IMIndV1ctPh6HDoQS4w3XBVRQvsqUwzrmVhti4c6WOPQ-x55YV5dPv) It’s clear that our nation is facing a MASSIVE crisis at the southwest border and it’s clear Joe Biden and Laura Kelly refuse to address it. We need a governor who understands the threat this poses to Kansas, and one who takes that threat seriously. Derek will be that governor. [**Will you take a stand with him and join Team Schmidt TODAY?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=f4fabfbf53d748adbf95022e05f8b16d&_e=gzltlxjbjr_ZQ03_nw555t82hiGd67yEX7sZnp0kv_kOcv_W7Dk7yDZDovrAJjzhyO3VFLviV6MCM_p3Su40HIhieeAMADus4-1jJn8h6pVv6thasJx-rI-5yxdPAfcY_5PTYSSKC2PtzQrFC-WJWQbQ-bpKWsC40SqseI0RPeNNkMEH1pD0oMUoxxHIfOhO4A7Q9PmPmlClw1OuZZuQrZ85G5t2RLkWPO2D6pQwD8HSANUlYdyfoWf3WCJh26OyUr8NLOsBtIt1CjumpT3v_UKzAZym8F0eXeQnLRKAwnozLyAI1_R01sDQDHyo3MR3i2HQeKH4i1stGZDgaNOe8yl0W9fTzkdmtW5Jan7uZH-muM1m1xk7p_jOGOF0ZFUmqTQCZjNUrlirn8BKrZhNW5Dn_xf8UEtMvqIbyalngQ5XK9KHQnAPF4JulsdsjuPcwOKRk2l9615qhIk-BftAI7TCfyrcPp41HYgDZaGmQyhsLysikoCPmYmwV6H6rr0P) – Team Schmidt | |

name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: Peter Franchot Calls for Three-Month Gas Tax Holiday
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
SIGN IF YOU AGREE: Maryland needs a three-month gas tax holiday and a second round of economic stimulus immediately. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jqBNUJT0VE-Cao3gVQPv5A2]
Dear Peter,
With gas prices skyrocketing at a time when Maryland families are already struggling to afford basic necessities, I am calling on the State to enact a three-month Maryland gas tax holiday and pass a second round of economic stimulus. I also echo lawmakers around the country in calling on the federal government to halt the federal gas tax for three months.
My proposed economic stimulus would include new $2,000 emergency survival checks for our low-wage earners and EITC recipients, $500 million in aid for our small businesses, and $500 million to help our struggling child care providers.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/jqBNUJT0VE-Cao3gVQPv5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jqBNUJT0VE-Cao3gVQPv5A2]
These measures would provide urgently needed relief to our working families and small businesses. There is no question of affordability here – Maryland’s historic surplus of $7.6 billion ensures that we are in a strong financial position to help our citizens weather these challenging economic times.
Before Vladimir Putin’s invasion of Ukraine, the average per gallon price for regular gas in Maryland was $3.23. As of March 9, it was $4.03 – and it’s only going to keep going up. Marylanders should not have to shoulder the burden of Putin’s criminal actions and the efforts of the Free World to stop the bloodshed and destruction he is causing in Ukraine.
If you agree with me, then we must make our voices heard. Will you sign my petition urging lawmakers to pass a three-month gas tax holiday and a second economic stimulus immediately? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jqBNUJT0VE-Cao3gVQPv5A2]
Maryland’s historic budget surplus isn’t the politicians’ money – it’s the people’s money. Those of us entrusted with public office should invest this surplus to offer much-needed relief for fellow Marylanders whose budgets aren’t experiencing revenue surpluses of historic proportions. With your help, we can build the critical mass of grassroots support needed to convince lawmakers to take action and deliver critically-important financial relief to Marylanders immediately.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

body:
| | | Hi there, [**In Congress, I will do everything I can to get Medicare for All on the House floor for a vote. Can you help me do that by chipping in now to help me win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42836994/334536770/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRjNTZhOS1lYmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=201dJO0zR5Eb_glaTVulCcVzhBAFigCeqzv99RwGIL4=) It’s still hard to comprehend that 1 million Americans have died of Covid — and according to a report from Public Citizen, 1/3 of those deaths were because of not having health insurance. One thing the last two years has proven is that our healthcare system is completely broken. Calling it a “sick care” system would be more accurate. Health insurance companies have raked in record profits during the pandemic, while small medical practices and rural hospitals have struggled to stay open. [**Medicare for All would solve this. If you can, please donate now, because I am the only candidate in this race who supports Medicare for All.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42836995/334536771/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRjNTZhOS1lYmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=201dJO0zR5Eb_glaTVulCcVzhBAFigCeqzv99RwGIL4=) With Medicare for All, people would get healthcare when they need it. name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I see firsthand how our healthcare system needs help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
Each day in the hospital, I talk with families who are worried about how they are going to pay their hospital bills, worried about unaffordable prescriptions, and struggling because of a lack of access to care.

| As a practicing pediatrician, I see firsthand how America’s healthcare system affects working families.

Each day in the hospital, I talk with families who are worried about how they are going to pay their hospital bills, worried about unaffordable prescriptions, and struggling because of a lack of access to care. It shouldn’t be this way — **nothing should come in the way of treating a sick child, or any American, in need of medical care.**

But this race isn’t about just what I think. I want to hear your thoughts on our nation’s current healthcare system. [Let me know your opinion today in a quick healthcare survey→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831292/334491099/44271077?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220310_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=oNW0STO1obv1r0CuXj8bF2gvFkUsggi4XOTPXJ1vylLZ/36eTD4fwCiL0I18bX6J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmVkYWFjZS1jMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WatEKzQsHGtf8kObtDU2p7KsRS3lnd6ojSvzEMRacGk=&emci=7fedaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82edaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)
| | [ADD YOUR RESPONSE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831293/334491100/44271077?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220310_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=oNW0STO1obv1r0CuXj8bF2gvFkUsggi4XOTPXJ1vylLZ/36eTD4fwCiL0I18bX6J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmVkYWFjZS1jMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WatEKzQsHGtf8kObtDU2p7KsRS3lnd6ojSvzEMRacGk=&emci=7fedaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82edaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)
---

We have so much work to do to improve our healthcare system, and with my experience and your input, I’m confident we could make an impact to change it for the better.

We need a healthcare system that works for patients, not drug companies and insurance companies. Our elected officials in Columbia and Washington haven’t prioritized improving our healthcare system, this is hurting too many children and families.

Before that happens though, I need to know your stance. [Participate in our healthcare survey today→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831294/334491101/44271077?refcode=AA_EM_SV_3MO_220310_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=oNW0STO1obv1r0CuXj8bF2gvFkUsggi4XOTPXJ1vylLZ/36eTD4fwCiL0I18bX6J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmVkYWFjZS1jMWEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WatEKzQsHGtf8kObtDU2p7KsRS3lnd6ojSvzEMRacGk=&emci=7fedaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82edaace-c1a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6125529)

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

Dr. Annie

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: DCCC named us a RED TO BLUE campaign!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831357/334491375/-280334095?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220310dccc2_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTY0YTkzMy1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=04s-fvMxCvAxN9tj9JabIJ4rfANt7vJvz03B8cZ5Zh8=)
---
Friend, did you see the big news earlier today? **The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) officially endorsed me for Congress and added our campaign to flip NM-02 to their highly competitive Red to Blue program.** This is a HUGE accomplishment — I’m so grateful to this people-powered team for getting us here, and honored to receive the support of the DCCC. The road to keeping the House blue runs directly through NM-02: _Republicans only need to gain five more House seats to take back the House majority._ But the good news is, we have a real shot at unseating far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell this November and flipping this critical seat from red to blue, especially with the DCCC by our side. **[We’ve come this far together. subject: Ukraine needs our help

body:
#

Friend**,**
I stand with President Biden in condemning Vladimir Putin’s unprovoked and unjust war against Ukraine.
Whether domestically or abroad, attacks on freedom and democracy should not be tolerated. The people of Ukraine deserve their freedom and democracy, and we should all stand united against Russia’s immoral actions.
Yesterday, as part of the Fiscal Year 2022 omnibus appropriations bill, I was proud to vote for $13.6 billion in humanitarian and security aid for Ukraine.
As we hold Putin and Russian military forces accountable for their unprovoked aggression, I also wanted to take a moment to share how our grassroots movement can take action and support those impacted by this ongoing war.
In recent weeks, millions of families have been displaced, forced to flee, or have become victims of violence. Several nonprofit organizations are working on the frontlines to protect the most vulnerable communities and need support. **If you can, please take a moment to pitch in to support their efforts. **
* [**Ukrainian Red Cross**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831391/334491606/-631897529?_cv=1&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896) is providing first aid to all people in need in areas where access to medical services are limited.

****[DONATE TO UKRAINIAN RED CROSS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831392/334491607/-631897529?_cv=1&refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)****
* [**Voices of Children**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831393/334491608/-833605803?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896) is providing non-stop emergency psychological assistance to affected children and families from all over Ukraine.

****[DONATE TO VOICES OF CHILDREN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831394/334491609/-833605803?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)****
* [**Insight**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831395/334491610/598959203?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)**** is providing support for LGBTQ+ people in Ukraine and helping cover needs such as protection, safety, and health.

****[DONATE TO INSIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42831396/334491611/598959203?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_CHA_GEN_AC_20220310_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGMxMjg2My1jMmEwLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdN8K2m2R_4bmH7fOa5gmucREyhcIPYm9k0YZ3Xo6GU=&emci=9de40c7a-89a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=30c12863-c2a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)****
I will continue monitoring the ongoing attacks in Ukraine and calling on Putin to be held accountable for his actions. Thank you for joining in my work to defend the people of Ukraine’s sovereignty.
Best,

clean_body: Friend, I stand with President Biden in condemning Vladimir Putin’s unprovoked and unjust war against Ukraine. Whether domestically or abroad, attacks on freedom and democracy should not be tolerated. The people of Ukraine deserve their freedom and democracy, and we should all stand united against Russia’s immoral actions. Yesterday, as part of the Fiscal Year 2022 omnibus appropriations bill, I was proud to vote for $13.6 billion in humanitarian and security aid for Ukraine. As we hold Putin and Russian military forces accountable for their unprovoked aggression, I also wanted to take a moment to share how our grassroots movement can take action and support those impacted by this ongoing war. In recent weeks, millions of families have been displaced, forced to flee, or have become victims of violence. Several nonprofit organizations are working on the frontlines to protect the most vulnerable communities and need support. If you can, please take a moment to pitch in to support their efforts. is providing first aid to all people in need in areas where access to medical services are limited. is providing non-stop emergency psychological assistance to affected children and families from all over Ukraine. ** ** is providing support for LGBTQ+ people in Ukraine and helping cover needs such as protection, safety, and health. I will continue monitoring the ongoing attacks in Ukraine and calling on Putin to be held accountable for his actions. Thank you for joining in my work to defend the people of Ukraine’s sovereignty. Best, Mondaire | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. name: John Fetterman
subject: Why underestimating Dr. Oz would be a huge mistake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I need your help to take on one of the top-spending U.S. Senate candidates in the entire country.
#
Derek, as soon as I found this out, I knew I had to send you an email to share the (infuriating) news:
**My GOP opponent Dr. Oz has spent more on TV ads than any other Senate candidate**** _in the entire country_****.**
**With a reported net worth of $100 million, Oz is spending virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. We can’t let that happen.
**
**[Can I count on you to donate $5 now to fight back against Dr. Oz, Derek? He’s got the biggest TV ad budget of ANY U.S. Senate candidate, so anything you can give today will help.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45231?refcode=em20220310-4921&t=1&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)**
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45231?amount=5&refcode=em20220310-4921&t=2&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)**
Yes, Dr. Oz is a celebrity doctor with no real qualifications in public service.
Yes, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of kooky medical conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated. **His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016.**
If you flip through the channels anywhere in PA, you’ll see for yourself — Dr. Oz is using his money and fame to drown our state in TV ads. He’s a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**The good news is we have been preparing for this.** We have — by far — the biggest grassroots campaign in the state. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why I’m asking you right now...
**[Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s TV ad onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45231?refcode=em20220310-4921&t=3&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45231?amount=5&refcode=em20220310-4921&t=22&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)**
__
Oz is a big threat. But he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Let’s win this thing,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220310-4921-footer&t=23&refcode2=4921_434096_glYt1c&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4921%2E434096%2EglYt1c)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Exposing Brad Little's Lies — Our Latest Video is Eye-Opening!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Piercy Robinson Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Brad Little shut down thousands of Idaho businesses and declared tens of thousands of Idahoans "non-essential"! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/03-10-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2d24bbc1b4&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| In a recent campaign email, Brad Little claimed "he kept Idaho OPEN when all other states were shutting down." That would be great if it were true, but it's a lie. Brad Little shut down thousands of Idaho businesses, declared tens of thousands of Idahoans "non-essential," and even dispatched the state police to harass and threaten businesses that tried to reopen. In the same email, Brad says he "never put a mask mandate or a vaccine mandate in place in Idaho," but, once again, he's lying to you. Under Brad's tenure, there have been a host of mask and vaccine mandates in Idaho for two years now, which is why when I was serving as acting Governor, I issued executive orders to END those mandates. Brad reversed my actions and reimposed these mandates on Idahoans — including on tens of thousands of healthy school children across the state. [**Please watch my latest campaign video**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b56279ca4d&e=823fa8e224) to learn more about how Brad governs like a liberal, but tries to make you believe the opposite.
---

subject: He will help us put our nation back on track
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e6ac45f3d8b44cafb7b14e1c3f8748fe&_e=RH1SUfLuXuEDyJFnpT4e2Qfyf1V_DnGZ5QU5Ou8A_h9UZ-fJyVw9u6IXyL9oiqRtblR-WGpDO72idgWn6IlH051bHspaR_QB_BEgkv8yKrCTLIkwObGAIJ2HpqDSSmEJCYx1eUlEPq5hQzjTGa_qbquGTOgFRxG3UtOeZGSQ0FQAt2kbpnfR4yIf6-QAv7d63RYQoDCEshO013qPz4FFNlXKXr9C5WwkbFNyEtMWZaCNpPBtOEiWRRJN9ijO_StmlyPEHHVTbDeh1kUoPBLAlVba7reL2vJUgzphxAro71hDTv9Xv1tAL6zhw8zBm86cpMtG8xv_Mz6O-zEVjFpt7MHrX91scN16idpQZRJZ2K02LyZ_0T4z2AAHPxm1hpuyhL0wpUTN8_hBzkba6IYd4U4YkBk8E10NSSYkd0FvrDw5mDTCZsaljKm6EX2ALI0uFDJIXidjiNudJQw-xyRMsg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I’ll get straight to the point.

I am emailing you today because I am endorsing Herschel Walker for the United States Senate. He’ll be a fantastic senator, and I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to watch why I am endorsing Herschel.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e6ac45f3d8b44cafb7b14e1c3f8748fe&_e=RH1SUfLuXuEDyJFnpT4e2Qfyf1V_DnGZ5QU5Ou8A_h9UZ-fJyVw9u6IXyL9oiqRtblR-WGpDO72idgWn6IlH051bHspaR_QB_BEgkv8yKrCTLIkwObGAIJ2HpqDSSmEJCYx1eUlEPq5hQzjTGa_qbquGTOgFRxG3UtOeZGSQ0FQAt2kbpnfR4yIf6-QAv7d63RYQoDCEshO013qPz4FFNlXKXr9C5WwkbFNyEtMWZaCNpPBtOEiWRRJN9ijO_StmZfiF_2Cq5Ikrt2Eo0YRHX-Sr5ZpcFCIJmnNgyNIy0zeqEyCGctrnz6X_jZMk8SfNcBAuEnthJ0Ds8Pz0JbaTgOF3PHT0vRFFERVsvkG_hBdmnIZ2sXdTtUtmAPyZeTF-02mdlErLcWvGYxJK7tqMoYIbbTIXmXB2D6LoliEa8v8Pdyl6WKBbiZWYfzrNybWRZkK7Auz6tY4CHqyqhpjbQQ%3D%3D)
While serving as the Secretary of State and Director of the CIA in the Trump Administration, I saw how important it is for our nation to have strong leaders in Washington who love America and will fight for our citizens.

_**Herschel Walker is the leader for the job.**_

Herschel has lived the American Dream, and he will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. Herschel has my full support, and I will do everything I can to help him win Georgia and put our nation back on the right track.

**[Peter, will you step forward to help Herschel win? $3 or even $5 will help him build momentum and flip this critical seat.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e6ac45f3d8b44cafb7b14e1c3f8748fe&_e=RH1SUfLuXuEDyJFnpT4e2Qfyf1V_DnGZ5QU5Ou8A_h9UZ-fJyVw9u6IXyL9oiqRtblR-WGpDO72idgWn6IlH051bHspaR_QB_BEgkv8yKrCTLIkwObGAIJ2HpqDSSmEJCYx1eUlEPq5hQzjTGa_qbquGTOgFRxG3UtOeZGSQ0FQAt2kbpnfR4yIf6-QAv7d63RYQoDCEshO013qPz4FFNlXKXr9C5WwkbFNyEtMWZaCNpPBtOEiWRRJN9ijO_StmSJoeZAYNvSRLvk6K_TeRpAeQA3GWRDKGnHjIPBeZ3cRX8WBjeyz4eXwd_zZQackWJkOFywAfOv3mNnycNEdLpg76hUu-1lZw9Dgt-RhN-doB51eOwqi8au8nvMqKErSj5Ir9zFH6-neCR9CLgmzue-ues6APU9upvBjNjWqEEI1cB5O1uSIXChxBcw5UK1VxJVUpwKFmHkwsY9XumxQYLw%3D%3D)**

**Herschel’s opponent, Raphael Warnock, is wrong for Georgia. Unfortunately, Democrat megadonors know how vulnerable he is, so they’ve rushed to provide him more money than any Senate candidate in the country.**

**Even though Senator Warnock is flooding Georgia with millions of dollars in ads, the race is in a statistical tie.**

Peter, taking back the Senate and stopping President Biden's reckless agenda depends on us sending a conservative fighter to the Senate. Herschel Walker will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I'm proud to endorse him because he will always champion American values.

**[Please join me in supporting Herschel today!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e6ac45f3d8b44cafb7b14e1c3f8748fe&_e=RH1SUfLuXuEDyJFnpT4e2Qfyf1V_DnGZ5QU5Ou8A_h9UZ-fJyVw9u6IXyL9oiqRtblR-WGpDO72idgWn6IlH051bHspaR_QB_BEgkv8yKrCTLIkwObGAIJ2HpqDSSmEJCYx1eUlEPq5hQzjTGa_qbquGTOgFRxG3UtOeZGSQ0FQAt2kbpnfR4yIf6-QAv7d63RYQoDCEshO013qPz4FFNlXKXr9C5WwkbFNyEtMWZaCNpPBtOEiWRRJN9ijO_StmpQF-zqMqdFuogtkOASxnsD2HG4HPexluM3c4AXGteji0Yq9Ao-xon3yJvL7OFWXkKl1ITSwIl4wJLkF947wUO2Xn_96s3Bczj2jjzVpEN1FqmCOGLJQkwpGjozsPGKmkWQa-ROrMZdg5S-oTzj0Fx3hjg6bhoLYkPuif5gTIFv_OWqMPVi41J6hokXIeZnc1Big_ptlmcjwT94c2XnlZyw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? I am supporting Herschel Walker to be the next United States Senator from Georgia. Will you join me in supporting him? | Peter, I’ll get straight to the point. I am emailing you today because I am endorsing Herschel Walker for the United States Senate. He’ll be a fantastic senator, and I hope you’ll take 30 seconds to watch why I am endorsing Herschel. While serving as the Secretary of State and Director of the CIA in the Trump Administration, I saw how important it is for our nation to have strong leaders in Washington who love America and will fight for our citizens. Herschel Walker is the leader for the job. Herschel has lived the American Dream, and he will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. Herschel has my full support, and I will do everything I can to help him win Georgia and put our nation back on the right track. Herschel’s opponent, Raphael Warnock, is wrong for Georgia. Unfortunately, Democrat megadonors know how vulnerable he is, so they’ve rushed to provide him more money than any Senate candidate in the country. Even though Senator Warnock is flooding Georgia with millions of dollars in ads, the race is in a statistical tie. Peter, taking back the Senate and stopping President Biden's reckless agenda depends on us sending a conservative fighter to the Senate. Herschel Walker will fight with all that he has to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I'm proud to endorse him because he will always champion American values. Thanks, Mike Pompeo | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | Peter, Ukraine is in the midst of a humanitarian crisis as innocent civilians continue to be killed and displaced due to the Russian invasion. This morning, video footage was released showing Congressman Madison Cawthorn ranting at a town hall event in Asheville, calling Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy “a thug” and his country “incredibly evil.” Once again, Cawthorn is showing all the signs of a young man who has been radicalized. We want to be clear: Cawthorn’s inflammatory and anti-democratic statements don’t represent who we are in Western North Carolina, or America. WNC is home to more than 2,000 Ukrainians, and we need to show our neighbors that we stand with them and their families during this frightening time. **These are four organizations doing life-saving work and we’re asking you to consider sending a donation to support their efforts:**
* **Razom for Ukraine** is collecting donations for its emergency response project to provide medical supplies, humanitarian aid and support volunteers on the ground.
* **The International Rescue Committee** is dedicated to providing aid to displaced families and is soliciting financial support to distribute resources.
* **Global Giving** has started a relief fund to provide food, water, and shelter for Ukrainian refugees.
* **Doctors without Borders** continues to provide medical care to those impacted by the ongoing conflict.

body:
Herschel’s race to win back Georgia’s Senate seat is likely to be the most competitive, most expensive, and most critical race in 2022. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c461aa11c19e489d814fb91ce850cd7c&_e=hZoX1tdsNaDdXFRcYmtbG6MuustNwBuAIz8FAcVhV-H0cI6Dg0BpQ04rB3OOM8KVRKjwLRxLgg6N9-PtR_iAB9sXKvVrURdmp0EU_yhWgnDiZqRG3yRjaoy9m_eKneE6Hm0d_53We_ahiBdLXu3XdMs0KvGbRCaTaSPOMSKk5xWK-7edSOW38rweC9xzIKZsdJ0BC1sRICMNw4oGNwmwmeI0kwrke41MH-bmXK3KaVyVc9IOPRjWaaJSbD0TmI1Vj1DZo1cV9kaSAYWY8SFClRnhyG1Fi4O7x-FLS17MtP10KWAFNBWaBtsWQgfDVqVW25xYqGj5l7rCn7NcWeverMrvtlua8WMumjc0os3fcvv8zb6tB-rSpkk1G3RheQ7k1vs_wBT23dexmn455udXLPrVwtNv4yMqiC3TbReYZXk%3D)

Peter,

We launched Elder for America PAC this year to build on the grassroots movement we started in 2021 and put it to work saving America by winning back Republican majorities in Congress and defeating the radical Left’s agenda.

Herschel’s race to win back Georgia’s Senate seat is likely to be the _**most competitive, most expensive, and most critical race in 2022.**_

More than any other, THIS is the seat that will tip the scales of power in the Senate, and I and Elder for America PAC are all in for Herschel.

[**Will you help me help Herschel defeat liberal Raphael Warnock and put Georgia’s Senate seat and the majority back in Republican hands by chipping in $10, $25, $50, even $100 today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c461aa11c19e489d814fb91ce850cd7c&_e=hZoX1tdsNaDdXFRcYmtbG6MuustNwBuAIz8FAcVhV-H0cI6Dg0BpQ04rB3OOM8KVRKjwLRxLgg6N9-PtR_iAB9sXKvVrURdmp0EU_yhWgnDiZqRG3yRjaoy9m_eKneE6Hm0d_53We_ahiBdLXu3XdMs0KvGbRCaTaSPOMSKk5xWK-7edSOW38rweC9xzIKZsdJ0BC1sRICMNw4oGNwmwmcETANe92dnToZc2pWvB3oGIAyVMfLY_GZmz8owp16vO7QdcAznT6Fq3pDmRVYU2Crk_mnIpRYcDVHcLPxLb1YnVJY4gpEKzXmSGI1tWj8ESGyk9UaQlUZP7a7krOWVnRaVa9aw445Bzr0TkKH15fDwz4c1eD63jmbhrTmgFGO2MN6dftGbxGFTeHU4l_l9HG7u6kRazVj1RvCuM4brvfAQ%3D)

Like me, Herschel comes from humble beginnings. But through hard work and perseverance, he was able to achieve his American Dream.

Now, he’s running to ensure all Americans can achieve their own American Dream.

He’s a fighter who doesn’t back down. He’s a hard worker who doesn’t quit. _**And he certainly doesn’t let anyone tell him he can’t be a black man in America AND a conservative Republican**_ who supports smaller government, greater freedoms, strong military & law enforcement, secure borders, and conservative family values.

Winning back Republican control of the Senate is the primary way to stand up to Biden’s failed agenda – **and helping Herschel flip Georgia is the #1 way to break the 50-50 split and end Kamala’s tie-breaking power.**

[**I’ll say it again, Peter – we’ve got a country to save, and this may be the most important race in 2022. Help me and Elder for America PAC get Herschel Walker elected, flip Georgia’s Senate seat, and win back the majority with a donation of $10, $25, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c461aa11c19e489d814fb91ce850cd7c&_e=hZoX1tdsNaDdXFRcYmtbG6MuustNwBuAIz8FAcVhV-H0cI6Dg0BpQ04rB3OOM8KVRKjwLRxLgg6N9-PtR_iAB9sXKvVrURdmp0EU_yhWgnDiZqRG3yRjaoy9m_eKneE6Hm0d_53We_ahiBdLXu3XdMs0KvGbRCaTaSPOMSKk5xWK-7edSOW38rweC9xzIKZsdJ0BC1sRICMNw4oGNwmwmZZ5Mnq7F9Xr63I5BA3Mb2QJ2zmmjpGjONDmfZ6QAqbmb9a5AERhjB476tCUrGRpdAEaEKQ7KCr2gm-eR_dy5jrCDWb_rhwJ1dJPSZoCXeAyzmw-8AR5xvr0GiLkRDq8vPOIN5KdGaqFk4JOy69FwfZAA-mdCWGWDMsH1hWG5L28MSC3Z-fwnJK6ZulaFlEYyPMw0cDuucZtbGzJyRrIhH8%3D)

My biggest job is to make sure we reach — and ideally, exceed — our monthly and quarterly fundraising goals. This month, hitting our goal is especially critical. Odessa announced her campaign to run in Tennessee’s 7th district earlier this week, and after crunching the numbers, [**_we’re setting a digital goal to raise $5,000 before Wednesday, March 15._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiCVoM6G4P-CZBKzA_oDkwXn2oeAR5_ZDubpsg_uH2Fd_LEjAsfvX7D3ORuHSDcdfh7RigbvedG_YWgF5UmsfHo_hXsZzCGNHmpyzF18hAZz9xl83VuwJZiemxdNT-FUO3TvqMavAipcvm4ZEo-wH9L-p678x1M25uMjxERbU8e1PbenVn-MpwUOQQOnqwmmcVy_gkDcCxd0JBd0QcPy3RVAywwsnkDdWAxeErWhQeaVx6bpwHc6QFd8p_zKx8tpb4PgfggocKhrSH89KfIK_-rQywjv2Krfcw_gkoO-hGmn85K7aw93t23dK-Kx17GWei9aPS8mrXAclJxd78cB8iBnXABZ9xxyAKG-L9cAaw0DjS1eDS0EnEm0QolOQFWfeAz6t1AT12q6u3t6KC0_f4XoHT7TgOu4_HWWUYR3UxxCI/3k8/8huysl7bSwGF0Q-hWra6GA/h1/rMBw4RaoFY-6gSJY4vBi8iXp0rvQsZVxmckhAV02j5o)[**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiLtsDWW6G3VKOh32TrNiT0toYdOeRiN95QzheOGxfKXm_RDwXlZSet2KIJetPSZEp3yjAW7TIHMyJanQJuAzxGzVYtT11rEmlkfFTCk9yEHIxF2dhvbNOwL19b3qc_AnUq5vT-1XL3C_QG180oMTuCIeqYclNKZiRtYPkWzlfMFLY_3V3l72tWfEprU5vJS9XOXLRjqg-jDpMvzukKOlJtKUw4T91bhUl06l786RaQGvbaeFuLEOUTQSPwfBSKFlcrRbEh1_vjQOlkU34PCUXbQ_6axk-hurwc-cKWpoJvdhptUyTrVu1-YY3DErBqJI2UfYmbsYo8ePDfS1qdGuBVlchxrwxRGj2uE_GoXivRTkFjtaeANSoMPeoOGO-vjRIE7THgfH3lCHLvjRCTXq3E7R9p_TE4CLhWsNTYSNxfLs/3k8/8huysl7bSwGF0Q-hWra6GA/h2/IR988gTZQmbsoafARtWjhUQPlycgdAamjbB2gFZorzc)
Here’s what you need to know: the newly-drawn 7th district is big. _Really_ big.__ It stretches from the top to the bottom of Tennessee and includes North Nashville, Clarksville, Waverly, and many other cities, suburbs, and rural areas. In short, we’ve got _a lot_ more ground to cover.
Odessa can’t wait to get out and earn the votes of Tennesseans all across the 7th district. But in order to win, we’re going to need more organizers, a bigger travel fund, and events across the district. The good news is that hitting our fundraising goal means we can put those plans in motion right away.
So what do you say?
[**_Will you help us reach our mid-month goal by making your first donation right now? I’m confident that if enough supporters like you take action in a big way before our Wednesday deadline, we’ll have the resources to hit the ground running in the 7th district and make some serious progress on flipping this seat._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiCVoM6G4P-CZBKzA_oDkwXn2oeAR5_ZDubpsg_uH2Fd97xvI_xYs2UFACf1TSFhlAkhA8jnPcHEnvPwbO7kqMJzUTBuLEBhrcdjEPRATymiW75VyO2UgkMciIqdS8Rf29l3Mt7ICi16DUBFV-46TD8cg0299xtTCYMaynrOf0NjYhHDle5B8xXKkEdiQUcS66XoY-QOEgl3LJGReTYoZhxhqE62X27IlG3E_dU6z28ofPg1lLciV1tRwN9WmK8q51qBJxgZXY4Vmkbb_Ul61vRiD6hXeRKQNltL9nztvkq0uK4aj7PVsduVPaQnOSCANYPhJzcdg_3dqho8fJ_IfJZc9olu98Fjrqfh4NQiHS1WvlFMftRHimmliHebg2Z4pHwcc2WchIEngl7kycLkBWLAxgB0Js4YaHOiqE37753oQ/3k8/8huysl7bSwGF0Q-hWra6GA/h3/Lc2vLSRB_PvrrPJX06QrRHDZ4GeAA_VdbGgM310TPPE) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiCVoM6G4P-CZBKzA_oDkwXn2oeAR5_ZDubpsg_uH2Fd9gEyM2Er-6jjmNTEcuXDI6OFfH_uxety3pzHEXqOh26sFWUKglkoau2Sulvu6k3n6sR9gEBJ2ONr9U1mgU9nYBZj1wJlODK618yGqver7DlhdDBVmZ9Ui8DX3nOTyYkOA1QtBhsn108MVDZpoS35iBfTjJQEu2scT8U8a_Hdbqo3T7Ar5TKOJlMohXTgG_1ZJr_zjJV7aSf9gA55rI5_c4ph2gbpT6F_OjXTnQGU02gGzmZP6KqRlMU-uD7Aq9rYmIG_jpL8scE07TWFpisLYA6acX_l9CVmJ_hXpmpQS1b-3Kf1NK527U92JOYdk6dKRVqyOvqOvaWnKkznjanqBqamDNeGDr2iQ20q50eK9ovzQCfFyOYVGKKXb0PJo6uqg/3k8/8huysl7bSwGF0Q-hWra6GA/h4/LuVzpzbpdQY7mFRpNzM_uTQgBOnjaO0Lo7E7pRqBLjQ) Thank you for all your help — let’s do this! clean_body: It’s been a while since I’ve reached out, but this is Aarica Marsh, the Finance Director for Odessa Kelly for U.S. Congress. | | | Peter, It’s been a while since I’ve reached out, but this is Aarica Marsh, the Finance Director for Odessa Kelly for U.S. Congress. My biggest job is to make sure we reach — and ideally, exceed — our monthly and quarterly fundraising goals. This month, hitting our goal is especially critical. Odessa announced her campaign to run in Tennessee’s 7th district earlier this week, and after crunching the numbers, Here’s what you need to know: the newly-drawn 7th district is big. Really big. It stretches from the top to the bottom of Tennessee and includes North Nashville, Clarksville, Waverly, and many other cities, suburbs, and rural areas. In short, we’ve got a lot more ground to cover. Odessa can’t wait to get out and earn the votes of Tennesseans all across the 7th district. But in order to win, we’re going to need more organizers, a bigger travel fund, and events across the district. The good news is that hitting our fundraising goal means we can put those plans in motion right away. So what do you say? Thank you for all your help — let’s do this! Aarica Aarica Marsh Finance Director Odessa Kelly for U.S. Congress | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Team NRSC
subject: Update on gas prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We want to hear your opinion
Fellow American

Biden announced on Tuesday that we will officially halt any investment into the Russian energy sector. This move comes on the day that gas prices around the country hit a record high.

Does President Biden have a plan for reducing gas prices here in the United States? Nobody seems to have an answer to this but . . .

**Here’s what we do know:**
* Gas Prices in the U.S. are at a record high.
* Last year, Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline which would have helped America become more energy independent with an additional 500-800 barrels of oil per day.
* As of right now, President Biden has no plans of resuming construction on the Keystone Pipeline project.
* This has led to American’s suffering at the pump.

**Here’s what we want to know:**

[**Should Biden take steps to make America more energy independent?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e5cc8319224a411a965b3f53b84ce193&_e=AwrNPjlcd1d0fygnCtcjySHTWjaweQO7FbTFEjByEEcAq9Ultt-XTEfM8NRYdVQo-jcph-6wT0m4Sgb0GLJHRCj-VzPxnflfV9izCMGt0y_zdrqHdMdAY_UhLINeZ9LaJdAFBZTr023BCBxQCUABg21jJ26_Y7296aY3qyx7WI21z6040PWeUYYUPQDotYXmPS-THq53VVHgE9feiFrfUTl1nTVgPlcFPhaOvBMpBRNkSY04leLVKs0OqwljC793IfqNv5P0SFpOwON7yz5K6RgTyulP9T2Tvp78oQd2F5k83umqqSxcrcvRy5DaBxX9yz1EqAmUpPsWWWQVt0u3vIa_mj2gtnMs0WF6RqyKMDGqQ-3KaHxcwkQF14vT4Qlwk9tF2HW2TknaEFs9lA9c0GB_O7fGqyhlzteezdT-74m6Qvc7fUnZD1gfOFRvV1JKnNlvGgq5_K1jp9eGVAw1UOxJwzdD6hemHmilG_Wx5sU%3D)

clean_body: We want to hear your opinion Fellow American Biden announced on Tuesday that we will officially halt any investment into the Russian energy sector. This move comes on the day that gas prices around the country hit a record high. Does President Biden have a plan for reducing gas prices here in the United States? Nobody seems to have an answer to this but . . . Here’s what we do know: Gas Prices in the U.S. are at a record high. Last year, Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline which would have helped America become more energy independent with an additional 500-800 barrels of oil per day. As of right now, President Biden has no plans of resuming construction on the Keystone Pipeline project. This has led to American’s suffering at the pump. Here’s what we want to know: Thank you, Team NRSC If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:
Politico just reported on a new poll of the North Carolina Senate race
#

Politico just reported that a new Data for Progress poll has North Carolina's U.S. Senate seat in the margin of error.
[**Please rush a donation to our campaign immediately to help us capitalize on this momentum and flip this seat >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220310-1-ma&refcode2=521.357359.50IRr8&t=1&akid=521%2E357359%2E50IRr8)

This is the second poll in a row showing Cheri in a statistical tie with Republicans. So no matter who Republicans nominate, we can defeat them.
Despite the millions of dollars that Ted Budd, Pat McCrory and their Super PACs have ALREADY SPENT on ads to voters across the state, this race is within the margin of error.
This shows just how much this seat is in play for Democrats in November. Cheri Beasley is our best hope to flip a seat to secure and even expand our Senate majority.

name: Rebecca Rodriguez
subject: What your money goes to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need YOUR help to make sure Alexandria gets reelected.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220310-2855-header&t=1&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)
We’re about to ask you to start a monthly recurring contribution — but before we do so, we hope you will allow us to explain why these sustaining contributions are so important to the success of our campaign:
In those dark, early months of the pandemic, our small dollar donors were the reason we could set-up a weekly food distribution out of our campaign office because we knew what funds we could rely on for the month. By the same token, monthly donors were the reason we could keep up a field program in the off-year, organizing our communities not just before election day but every day. They helped fund the multilingual vaccine outreach program that increased vaccination rates in our district. Monthly donors paid the organizers who knocked on doors for nine weeks after Hurricane Ida and helped devastated homeowners and renters apply for FEMA aid. And, monthly donors helped us advocate for the Child Tax Credit, Ban Conflicted Trading Act, the Green New Deal, and so much more.
**Now, we need YOUR help to make sure Alexandria gets reelected. From the beginning, Alexandria pledged to take $0 from super PACs or corporate lobbyists — so we’re relying on YOU to help us launch a campaign that will not only reelect Alexandria, but help her win big, and show anyone who would question the strength of our movement that she is here to stay.**
[What do you say — can we count on your monthly investment?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220310?refcode=em20220310-2855-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&recurring=1&t=3&refcode2=2855_2526796_kBx9IT&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)
**[Chip in monthly »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220310?refcode=em20220310-2855-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&recurring=1&t=4&refcode2=2855_2526796_kBx9IT&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)**
Your monthly investment would help allow our campaign to plan more strategically. If we know we can count on a certain amount of money coming in each month, then we can make more long-term investments — like hiring another field organizer or expanding our Homework Helpers program. Even committing just $2/month is more helpful to us than one $25 donation, because then we know we can count on that $2 coming in every month.
If it ever gets to be too much, you can just go in and cancel your monthly donation at any time. ActBlue will even send you a monthly email reminding you that you’re still giving — so it doesn’t become like one of those subscriptions you forget about for years (guilty).
Since 2018, we have created a campaign that works for us all rather than the wealthy few. If we can count on your monthly support, we will be in good shape to support Alexandria’s work in Congress as well as her reelection campaign to keep her in Congress.
Thank you for everything you do to sustain our movement.
Rebecca Rodriguez
Campaign Manager
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
**[Chip in monthly »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220310?refcode=em20220310-2855-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&recurring=1&t=5&refcode2=2855_2526796_kBx9IT&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220310?refcode=em20220310-2855-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=6&refcode2=2855_2526796_kBx9IT&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220310-2855-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=7&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2855%2E2526796%2EkBx9IT)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Peter,

Jennifer wants to be your voice in Congress, and to do that, she needs to know what issues matter the most to you.
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_topissues?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_Top-Issues-Poll_20220126&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Top-Issues-Poll&utm_agency=PG
There is a LOT that needs fixing in America right now, but we must prioritize what we focus on first. Is it taxes or the economy? Border security? Education? The pro-life movement or Second Amendment rights? Something else?

Please take a quick moment to take Jennifer’s Top Issues poll:
TAKE THE POLL >> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_topissues?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_Top-Issues-Poll_20220126&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Top-Issues-Poll&utm_agency=PG)

Thanks for your input!
